%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%% % %% Counting Sheep PSG % % EEGLAB-compatible manual sleep stage scoring, signal processing and event % marking of polysomnographic (PSG) data in MATLAB % %%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%% % % Stuart Fogel % School of Psychology, University of Ottawa, Canada % uOttawa Sleep Research Laboratory % https://www.uottawa-sleeplab.ca % sfogel@uottawa.ca % % A revision of sleepSMG. sleepSMG originally developed by: % Stephanie Greer and Jared Saletin % Walker Lab, UC Berkeley, 2011 % https://sleepsmg.sourceforge.net % % HOW TO CITE: % L.B. Ray, D. Baena & S.M. Fogel (2024). “Counting sheep PSG”: EEGLAB-compatible % open-source matlab software for signal processing, visualization, event marking % and staging of polysomnographic data, Journal of Neuroscience Methods, 407, 110162. % https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jneumeth.2024.110162. % % REQUIREMENTS: % MATLAB version R2020b or later % Signal Processing Toolbox % Statistics and Machine Learning Toolbox % EEGlab 2023 or later (https://eeglab.org) % % USAGE: % See included 'User Manual.pdf' for details. % 1. Launch by typing 'countingSheepPSG' at command prompt. % 2. Customize display montage in: % ~/montages/sleep_montage_default.m (rename and save to new file) % 3. Load an EEGLAB PSG dataset for signal preprocessing and annotation. % % Works best if recording includes: % - Recording start time event (at first data point) % - Lights Off and Lights On events % % Sleep scoring keyboard shortcuts: % 0 - Wake % 1 - NREM 1 % 2 - NREM 2 % 3 - SWS % 4 - REM % . - Unscored % backspace/delete - delete selected event(s) % % Event marking mode: % Single-point events can be created using single mouse click % Events with a duration can be created using mouse click-and-drag % Enable 'all channels' mode to mark events without a channel % Single-click existing event to select/deselect for delete/merge
% Copyright (C) Stuart Fogel & Sleep Well, 2022. % See the GNU General Public Licence v3.0 for more information. % % This file is part of 'Counting Sheep PSG'. % See https://github.com/stuartfogel/CountingSheepPSG for details. % % Redistribution and use in source and binary forms, with or without % modification, are permitted provided that the following conditions are met: % % 1. Redistributions of source code must retain the above author, licence, % copyright notice, this list of conditions, and the following disclaimer. % % 2. Redistributions in binary form must reproduce the above author, licence, % copyright notice, this list of conditions, and the following disclaimer in % the documentation and/or other materials provided with the distribution. % % THIS SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED BY THE COPYRIGHT HOLDERS AND CONTRIBUTORS "AS IS" % AND ANY EXPRESS OR IMPLIED WARRANTIES, INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, THE % IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY AND FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE % ARE DISCLAIMED. IN NO EVENT SHALL THE COPYRIGHT HOLDER OR CONTRIBUTORS BE % LIABLE FOR ANY DIRECT, INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, EXEMPLARY, OR % CONSEQUENTIAL DAMAGES (INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, PROCUREMENT OF % SUBSTITUTE GOODS OR SERVICES; LOSS OF USE, DATA, OR PROFITS; OR BUSINESS % INTERRUPTION) HOWEVER CAUSED AND ON ANY THEORY OF LIABILITY, WHETHER IN % CONTRACT, STRICT LIABILITY, OR TORT (INCLUDING NEGLIGENCE OR OTHERWISE) % ARISING IN ANY WAY OUT OF THE USE OF THIS SOFTWARE, EVEN IF ADVISED OF % THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGE. % % Counting Sheep PSG is intended for research purposes only. Any commercial % or medical use of this software and source code is strictly prohibited. % %%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
% Properties that correspond to app components properties (Access = public) handles % handle to store app data EEG % EEGLAB dataset (used to flag output argument to EEGLAB) filepath % path for current directory in list filename % name of file selected end
% Properties that correspond to app components properties (Access = private) fileSelectData % temp output from fileSelect saveDatasetData % temp output from saveDatasetAs montageEditorData % temp output from montageEditor end
methods (Access = public)
% fileSelect app calls this function to return values as argin function getFileSelectData(app,filepath,filename) app.filepath = filepath; app.filename = filename; end
% saveDatasetAs app calls this function to return vales as argin function getSaveDatasetData(app,filepath,filename) app.filepath = filepath; app.filename = filename; if isempty(filepath) || isempty(filename) saveON(app); else saveOFF(app); app.filename = filename; app.dataset_S.Text = filename; end end
% montageEditor app calls this function to return values as argin function getMontageData(app, montageData) app.montageEditorData = montageData; end end
methods (Access = private)
%% Ensures date format is valid for use with datetime function function validDate(app) % validate recStart time format if ~strcmp(app.handles.userRecStartFormat, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS') % not default datetime compatible format? if strcmp(app.handles.userRecStartFormat, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH:MM:SS.FFF') % old format? app.handles.userRecStartFormat = 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'; % update with datetime compatible time format elseif ~strcmp(app.handles.userRecStartFormat, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH:MM:SS.FFF') % not legacy default format? help datetime warning('Non-default MATLAB datetime format entered. Suggested format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS. See datetime help documentation above.') try datetime(char(datetime('now'), app.handles.userRecStartFormat), 'InputFormat', app.handles.userRecStartFormat); % check if user-defined time format works catch % that didn't work choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['Invalid / legacy MATLAB datetime format entered.', newline, 'Suggested format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS', newline, 'Would you like to automatically update your montage?'],'Invalid time format','Icon','question','Options',{'Yes','No'}); waitfor(choice); if strcmp(choice,'Yes') recStartFormat = 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'; newMontage_m_Callback(app,recStartFormat); end end else help datetime warning('Invalid MATLAB datetime format entered. Suggested format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS. See datetime help documentation above.') end end end
%% Loads new EEGlab dataset function loadNewDataset(app,clearSet,noPopUp) if clearSet == 0 % load the dataset if noPopUp == 0 if isfield(app.handles,'EEG') app.fileSelectData = fileSelect(app, app.handles.EEG.filepath, app.handles.EEG.setname, 'set'); else app.fileSelectData = fileSelect(app, '', '', 'set'); end waitfor(app.fileSelectData); if isempty(app.filename) returnFocus2Figure(app); return end app.handles.EEG.setname = app.filename(1:end-4); % ensures setname and filename match app.handles.EEG.filename = app.filename; app.handles.EEG.filepath = [app.filepath filesep]; progress = uiprogressdlg(app.CountingSheepMain,'Title','Loading Dataset','Indeterminate','on'); app.handles.EEG = pop_loadset(app.handles.EEG.filename, app.handles.EEG.filepath); % load the set file elseif noPopUp == 1 progress = uiprogressdlg(app.CountingSheepMain,'Title','Loading Dataset','Indeterminate','on'); app.handles.EEG = pop_loadset('filename',app.handles.EEG.filename,'filepath',app.handles.EEG.filepath); % load the set file end % rebuild the EEG.event.urevent field (needed for event handling) and check dataset app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG); app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG, 'makeur'); app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG,'eventconsistency'); % file name for countingSheep scoring data (*.mat) file timeStamp = char(datetime("now"),'yyyy-MM-dd-HH-mm-ss'); app.handles.stageFileIN = fullfile(app.handles.EEG.filepath,strcat(app.handles.EEG.setname, '_', timeStamp, '.mat')); close(progress); saveON(app); else clearDataset_m_Callback(app); saveOFF(app); end % progress bar progress = uiprogressdlg(app.CountingSheepMain,'Title','Intializing Dataset','Indeterminate','on'); % initialize sleep stage app.handles initStaging(app); % get recording start event getRecStart(app, clearSet); % get lights on / off tags getLightsOnOff(app, clearSet); % load montage plotFCN = app.plotSleepIN.Items; boxInd = ismember(plotFCN, app.plotSleepIN.Value); eval([plotFCN{boxInd}, '(app);']); % calls study-specific montage % get sleep stage events getSleepStages(app, clearSet); % get other events overwrite = 1; stageData = []; getEvents(app, stageData, clearSet, overwrite); % add the last of the plotting options and plot stages and data app.handles.hideChans = {}; app.handles.scaleChans = {''}; app.handles.curScale = 100; app.handles.scrollMode = []; app.handles.reScaledChannels = []; app.handles.reScaleFactors = ones(length(app.handles.EEG.chanlocs),1)'; app.handles.ica = 0; % turn off option to plot ICA data runPlot(app); % plot traces arrowLeft_B_Callback(app, []); % doesn't hurt and can resolve some issues when loading hypnogram % save it to the mat file app.handles.stageData.events = app.handles.EEG.event; stageData = app.handles.stageData; if isfield(app.handles, 'stageFileIN') save(app.handles.stageFileIN, 'stageData'); end close(progress); end
%% initialize sleep scoring defaults % recording start, lights off, lights on, stage lables, stage onsets, stage times function initStaging(app) winSize = str2double(app.handles.winIN); srate = app.handles.EEG.srate; % set stage info to user input app.handles.stageData = []; app.handles.stageData.win = winSize; % set defaults app.handles.stageData.recStart = datetime(year(now),month(1),day(1),0,0,0,000); app.handles.stageData.recStop = app.handles.stageData.recStart + seconds(app.handles.EEG.pnts/app.handles.EEG.srate - 1); app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF = app.handles.stageData.recStart; % lights off at start of recording app.handles.stageData.lightsON = app.handles.stageData.recStop; % lights on at end of recording app.handles.stageData.srate = srate; app.handles.stageData.stages = (ones(fix(length(app.handles.EEG.data)/(winSize*srate)), 1)*5)'; app.handles.stageData.onsets = ((0:(length(app.handles.stageData.stages) - 1)).*winSize*srate)+1; app.handles.stageData.stageTime = (0:(length(app.handles.stageData.stages) - 1))./(60/winSize); clear winSize srate % create default EEGlab event structure if empty if isempty(app.handles.EEG.event) app.handles.EEG.event = struct('type',[],'latency',[],'duration',[],'channel',[]); % default % this makes the new struct 'empty' fields = fieldnames(app.handles.EEG.event)'; fields{2,1} = {}; app.handles.EEG.event = struct(fields{:}); clear fields end % make sure channel is a field in the event structure if ~isfield(app.handles.EEG.event,'channel') app.handles.EEG.event(1).channel = []; end end
%% Get recording start date and time from EEGlab dataset function getRecStart(app,clearSet) recStartFound = 0; if clearSet ~= 1 % look for recording start in EEGlab dataset events % if found, will replace default entered by initStaging function call if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.event) app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG, 'eventconsistency'); app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG); idx = find([app.handles.EEG.event.latency] == 1); % default is that recording start marker is on the first data point if ~isempty(idx) for nevt = idx try app.handles.stageData.recStart = datetime(app.handles.EEG.event(nevt).type, 'InputFormat', app.handles.userRecStartFormat); % this can bug, so, we do it in a try - catch app.handles.EEG.comments = char(app.handles.stageData.recStart, app.handles.userRecStartFormat); % that worked, lets also put it in the comments recStartFound = 1; break catch continue end end end end if recStartFound == 0 % nothing found in the dataset events try % see if it's in the EEG.comments if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.comments) app.handles.stageData.recStart = datetime(datetime(app.handles.EEG.comments), 'InputFormat', app.handles.userRecStartFormat); % this can bug, so, we do it in a try - catch if ~isempty(app.handles.stageData.recStart) % add recording start marker at first data point app.handles.EEG.event(end+1).type = char(app.handles.stageData.recStart, app.handles.userRecStartFormat); app.handles.EEG.event(end).latency = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(end).duration = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(end).channel = ''; else error('No recording date found in EEG.comments') % force catch below end else error('No recording date found in EEG.comments') % force catch below end catch % nothing found in the file, lets just ask for it choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['No recording start time found at start of EEG dataset. If unexpected, check montage date format.' newline newline 'Do you want to enter a Recording Start time?'],'Missing Tag','Icon','question','Options',{'Yes','No'}); app.handles.userRecStartFormat = 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'; % use default format if strcmp(choice,'Yes') prompt = {['Default Recording Start Time: ',char(app.handles.stageData.recStart,'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'),newline,newline, ... % use the default time format ' Enter recording start time in 24-hr time format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS',newline]}; dlgtitle = 'Enter Recording Start Time'; dims = [1 100]; definput = {char(app.handles.stageData.recStart, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS')}; recStart = inputdlg(prompt,dlgtitle,dims,definput); returnFocus2Figure(app); if ~isempty(recStart) try app.handles.stageData.recStart = datetime(recStart, 'InputFormat', app.handles.userRecStartFormat); % this can bug, so, we do it in a try - catch if ~isempty(app.handles.stageData.recStart) % add valid date to the comments if isempty(app.handles.EEG.comments) app.handles.EEG.comments = char(app.handles.stageData.recStart, app.handles.userRecStartFormat); end if ~any(ismember({app.handles.EEG.event.type},{char(app.handles.stageData.recStart, app.handles.userRecStartFormat)})) % make sure it does not already exist in event structure app.handles.EEG.event(end+1).type = char(app.handles.stageData.recStart, app.handles.userRecStartFormat); app.handles.EEG.event(end).latency = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(end).duration = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(end).channel = ''; end end catch choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['Incorrect date format entered.',newline,'Clear dataset and reload.'],'Input Error','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return end end else % none of that worked, just put the default if isempty(app.handles.EEG.comments) app.handles.EEG.comments = char(app.handles.stageData.recStart, app.handles.userRecStartFormat); end % add recording start marker at first data point app.handles.EEG.event(end+1).type = char(app.handles.stageData.recStart, app.handles.userRecStartFormat); app.handles.EEG.event(end).latency = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(end).duration = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(end).channel = ''; end end end % we also need to include the recording end time app.handles.stageData.recStop = app.handles.stageData.recStart + seconds(app.handles.EEG.pnts/app.handles.EEG.srate - 1); end app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG, 'eventconsistency'); clear idx clearSet nevt end
%% Get lights on and off from EEGlab dataset function getLightsOnOff(app, clearSet) if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.event) app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG, 'eventconsistency'); app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG); % look for lights OFF event types = {app.handles.EEG.event.type}; lightsOffIdx = strcmpi(types, app.handles.userlightsOFFtag); if any(lightsOffIdx) if sum(lightsOffIdx) > 1 % there are duplicate lights off tags. WTF. choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Your EEGlab dataset has more than one ''Lights Off'' tag. That can''t be correct! Please fix ''Lights off'' tag in EEGlab dataset.','Multiple Tags','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); return else app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF = app.handles.stageData.recStart + seconds((app.handles.EEG.event(lightsOffIdx).latency - 1)/app.handles.EEG.srate); end else % there is no lights OFF tag in the EEG dataset if clearSet ~= 1 choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['No ''Lights Off'' tag found in EEG dataset. If unexpected, check montage or datset.' newline newline 'Do you want to enter a ''Lights Off'' time?'],'Missing Tag','Icon','question','Options',{'Yes','No'}); if strcmp(choice,'Yes') prompt = {['Default ''Lights Off'' Time: ' char(app.handles.stageData.recStart, app.handles.userRecStartFormat) newline newline... 'Enter a ''Lights Off'' time in 24-hr time format: ' app.handles.userRecStartFormat,newline]}; dlgtitle = 'Enter Lights Off time'; dims = [1 100]; definput = {char(app.handles.stageData.recStart, app.handles.userRecStartFormat)}; lightsOff = inputdlg(prompt,dlgtitle,dims,definput); returnFocus2Figure(app); if ~isempty(lightsOff) try app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF = datetime(lightsOff{:}, 'Inputformat', app.handles.userRecStartFormat); catch choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Incorrect date format entered','Input Error','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return end else % put it at the start of the recording app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF = app.handles.stageData.recStart; end else % put it at the start of the recording app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF = app.handles.stageData.recStart; end end % lights OFF app.handles.EEG.event(end+1).type = app.handles.userlightsOFFtag; app.handles.EEG.event(end).latency = (seconds(app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF - app.handles.stageData.recStart) * app.handles.stageData.srate) + 1; app.handles.EEG.event(end).duration = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(end).channel = ''; end clear lightsOffIdx % look for lights ON event types = {app.handles.EEG.event.type}; lightsOnIdx = strcmpi(types, app.handles.userlightsONtag); if any(lightsOnIdx) if sum(lightsOnIdx) > 1 % there are duplicate lights off tags. WTF. choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Your EEGlab dataset has more than one ''Lights On'' tag. That can''t be correct! Please fix ''Lights on'' tag in EEGlab dataset.','Multiple tags','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); return else app.handles.stageData.lightsON = app.handles.stageData.recStart + seconds((app.handles.EEG.event(lightsOnIdx).latency - 1)/app.handles.EEG.srate); end else % there is no lights ON tag in the EEG dataset if clearSet ~= 1 choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['No ''Lights On'' tag found in EEG dataset. If unexpected, check montage or datset.' newline newline 'Do you want to enter a ''Lights On'' time?'],'Missing Tag','Icon','question','Options',{'Yes','No'}); if strcmp(choice,'Yes') prompt = {['Default ''Lights On'' Time: ' char(app.handles.stageData.recStop, app.handles.userRecStartFormat) newline newline... 'Enter a ''Lights On'' time in 24-hr time format: ' app.handles.userRecStartFormat,newline]}; dlgtitle = 'Enter Lights On time'; dims = [1 100]; definput = {char(app.handles.stageData.recStop, app.handles.userRecStartFormat)}; lightsOn = inputdlg(prompt,dlgtitle,dims,definput); returnFocus2Figure(app); if ~isempty(lightsOn) try app.handles.stageData.lightsON = datetime(lightsOn{:}, 'Inputformat', app.handles.userRecStartFormat); catch choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Incorrect date format entered','Input Error','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return end else % put it at the end of the recording app.handles.stageData.lightsON = app.handles.stageData.recStop; end else % put it at the end of the recording app.handles.stageData.lightsON = app.handles.stageData.recStop; end end % lights ON app.handles.EEG.event(end+1).type = app.handles.userlightsONtag; app.handles.EEG.event(end).latency = (seconds(app.handles.stageData.lightsON - app.handles.stageData.recStart) * app.handles.stageData.srate) + 1; if app.handles.EEG.event(end).latency > app.handles.EEG.pnts % just in case it is past the end of dataset app.handles.EEG.event(end).latency = app.handles.EEG.pnts; end app.handles.EEG.event(end).duration = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(end).channel = ''; end clear lightsOnIdx else % no events in dataset; insert Lights ON and OFF events using defaults app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF = app.handles.stageData.recStart; % lights off at start of recording app.handles.stageData.lightsON = app.handles.stageData.recStop; % lights on at end of recording % lights OFF app.handles.EEG.event(end+1).type = app.handles.userlightsOFFtag; app.handles.EEG.event(end).latency = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(end).duration = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(end).channel = ''; % lights ON app.handles.EEG.event(end+1).type = app.handles.userlightsONtag; app.handles.EEG.event(end).latency = app.handles.EEG.pnts; app.handles.EEG.event(end).duration = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(end).channel = ''; end app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG, 'eventconsistency'); app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG); end
%% Get sleep stage events from EEGlab dataset function getSleepStages(app, clearSet) % look for stage data in existing dataset % if found, will replace default entered by initStaging function call % select only events that match sleep stage labels app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG, 'eventconsistency'); app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG); EEGtemp = app.handles.EEG; if clearSet == 0 EEGtemp = pop_selectevent(EEGtemp,'type',app.handles.userStageNames(1:6),'deleteevents','on'); else EEGtemp.event = []; end % delete boundary events (n.b., not deleted by pop_selectevent by default) if ~isempty(EEGtemp.event) boundaryIdx = eeg_findboundaries(EEGtemp); EEGtemp.event(boundaryIdx) = []; % delete boundary events end if ~isempty(EEGtemp.event) % check for gaps in sleep scoring (from first event to last) if any(diff(round(diff([EEGtemp.event.latency]'),0)) ~= 0) win = app.handles.stageData.win*app.handles.EEG.srate; diffIdx = find(round(diff([EEGtemp.event.latency]'),0) ~= win); % find the gaps for nIdx = 1:length(diffIdx) latDiff = EEGtemp.event(diffIdx(nIdx)+1).latency - EEGtemp.event(diffIdx(nIdx)).latency; % get the length of the gap in sleep stages if mod(latDiff,win) == 0 % make sure the gap is a multiple of the epoch window length % fill in the gap with 'Unscored' sleep stages EEGtemp = eeg_checkset(EEGtemp,'eventconsistency'); for nUnscored = 1:latDiff/win EEGtemp.event(end+1).type = 'Unscored'; EEGtemp.event(end).latency = EEGtemp.event(diffIdx(nIdx)).latency + win; EEGtemp.event(end).duration = win; EEGtemp.event(end).channel = ''; EEGtemp.event(end).urevent = []; end EEGtemp = eeg_checkset(EEGtemp,'eventconsistency'); else choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['Inconsistent stage scoring epoch lengths, or missing stage scores.' newline newline 'Check montage settings and consistency of events.'],'Check Montage or Dataset','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); return end end end % now, check that sleep stages will fit in scoring matrix if length(EEGtemp.event)-1 > length(app.handles.stageData.stages) choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['Too many sleep stage events to fit.' newline newline 'Check event type, event alignment with data, and number of stage events.'],'Check Dataset','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); return else % first, convert event type strings to numeric stage codes tempevents = EEGtemp.event; % recode to numerical stages for nStage = 1:length(app.handles.userStageNames) stageIdx = find(strcmp({EEGtemp.event.type},app.handles.userStageNames{nStage})); if ~isempty(stageIdx) for nIdx = stageIdx tempevents(nIdx).type = nStage-1; % this will recode to numerical stages clear stageIdx end end end EEGtemp.event = tempevents; % get timing of first epoch, and determine if aligned with stageData.onsets if not, round down to align firstIdx = find(app.handles.stageData.onsets == fix(EEGtemp.event(1).latency)); % one data point precision if ~isempty(firstIdx) % find if exact match exists in stageTimes nEpochs = length(EEGtemp.event) - length(app.handles.stageData.stages(firstIdx:end)); if length(EEGtemp.event) <= length(app.handles.stageData.stages(firstIdx:end)) % it fits for nEvt = 1:length(EEGtemp.event) app.handles.stageData.stages(firstIdx) = EEGtemp.event(nEvt).type; firstIdx = firstIdx + 1; end else for nEvt = 1:length(app.handles.stageData.stages(firstIdx:end)) % it doesn't quite fit. This will truncate extra stage labels app.handles.stageData.stages(firstIdx) = EEGtemp.event(nEvt).type; firstIdx = firstIdx + 1; end choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['Existing sleep scoring exceeds record by ' num2str(nEpochs) ' or fewer epochs. If this is unexpected, check dataset.'],'Warning','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); end else % its misaligned by more than one data point % find the closest value to realign stages minOffset = min(abs(app.handles.stageData.onsets - EEGtemp.event(1).latency)); minOffsetIdx = find(abs(app.handles.stageData.onsets - EEGtemp.event(1).latency) == minOffset); offsetInPnts = app.handles.stageData.onsets(minOffsetIdx) - EEGtemp.event(1).latency; % User confirm that they are ok to realign stage labels to epoch boundaries dlgTitle = 'Warning!'; dlgQuestion = {['Realigning latency of sleep scoring events to epoch boundaries by ' num2str(offsetInPnts/EEGtemp.srate) ' seconds.' newline newline 'Do you wish to continue?']}; choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,dlgQuestion,dlgTitle,'Options',{'Yes','No'}); if strcmp(choice,'Yes') if length(EEGtemp.event) <= length(app.handles.stageData.stages(minOffsetIdx:end)) firstIdx = minOffsetIdx; for nEvt = 1:length(EEGtemp.event) app.handles.stageData.stages(firstIdx) = EEGtemp.event(nEvt).type; firstIdx = firstIdx + 1; end else % the number of stages are too many to fit. Need to truncate. choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['Too many sleep stage events to fit.' newline newline 'Check event type, event alignment with data, and number of stage events.'],'Check Dataset','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); firstIdx = minOffsetIdx; for nEvt = 1:length(app.handles.stageData.stages(minOffsetIdx:end)) app.handles.stageData.stages(firstIdx) = EEGtemp.event(nEvt).type; firstIdx = firstIdx + 1; end end else choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['Latencies of stage scoring events are not aligned with epoch boundaries.' newline newline 'This can be corrected by truncating start of dataset to be aligned with latency of first sleep stage event.'],'Check Dataset','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); return end clear dlgTitle dlgQuestion choice end end clear EEGtemp nEvt nStage stageIdx nIdx tempevents minOffsetIdx minOffset offsetInPnts firstIdx nEpochs else if clearSet ~= 1 choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['No sleep stages found.' newline newline 'If this is unexpected, check montage settings to define sleep stage labels.'],'Unscored record?','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); end end end
%% Get events from EEGlab dataset function getEvents(app, stageData, clearSet, overwrite) % now, lets add the events that are not sleep stages % remove old sleep stages, keep other original events if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.setname) % this checks if its an empty dataset if ~isempty(stageData) EEGtemp = app.handles.EEG; EEGtemp.event = stageData.events; EEGtemp = pop_selectevent(EEGtemp,'type',app.handles.userStageNames(1:6),'select','inverse','deleteevents','on'); % select events to import tempEvents = unique({EEGtemp.event.type}); [idx,~] = listdlg('PromptString','Select event types to import', 'SelectionMode', 'multiple', 'ListString', tempEvents, 'ListSize', [250,250]); if ~isempty(idx) evtIdx = ismember({stageData.events.type},tempEvents(idx)); EEGtemp.event = stageData.events(evtIdx); % need to make sure the fields are the same eegfields = fieldnames(app.handles.EEG.event(1)); for i = 1:length(eegfields) if ~isfield(EEGtemp.event(1),eegfields{i}) EEGtemp.event(1).(eegfields{i}) = []; % add an empty entry to create field end end Mrkfields = fieldnames(EEGtemp.event(1)); for i = 1:length(Mrkfields) if ~isfield(app.handles.EEG.event(1),Mrkfields{i}) app.handles.EEG.event(1).(Mrkfields{i}) = []; % add an empty entry to create field end end returnFocus2Figure(app); else choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['No events found.' newline newline 'If this is unexpected, check original dataset.'],'No events found','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); end else EEGtemp = pop_selectevent(app.handles.EEG,'type',app.handles.userStageNames(1:6),'select','inverse','deleteevents','on'); end else EEGtemp.event = []; % for when we are clearing the dataset end if ~isempty(EEGtemp.event) % change from 0, which is not a valid channel, to empty char, which means 'no channel'. for nEvt = 1:length(EEGtemp.event) if any(double(EEGtemp.event(nEvt).channel) == 0) || isempty(EEGtemp.event(nEvt).channel) EEGtemp.event(nEvt).channel = ''; end end if overwrite == 1 app.handles.EEG.event = EEGtemp.event; app.handles.stageData.events = EEGtemp.event; else % merge app.handles.EEG.event = [app.handles.EEG.event EEGtemp.event]; app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG, 'eventconsistency'); app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG); app.handles.stageData.events = app.handles.EEG.event; end else if clearSet == 0 choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['No events found.' newline newline 'If this is unexpected, check original dataset.'],'No events found','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); end app.handles.EEG.event = []; end clear EEGtemp emptyChIdx chIdx end
%% Saves EEGlab dataset function saveDataset(app,saveAs) progress = uiprogressdlg(app.CountingSheepMain,'Title','Saving Dataset','Indeterminate','on'); if isfield(app.handles, 'stageData') % check if rescaling was done previously if ~isempty(app.handles.reScaledChannels) chIdx = app.handles.reScaledChannels; for nIdx = 1:length(chIdx) % undo scaling of EEG data app.handles.EEG.data(chIdx(nIdx),:) = app.handles.EEG.data(chIdx(nIdx),:)*1/app.handles.reScaleFactors(chIdx(nIdx)); end % reset scaling handles app.handles.reScaledChannels = []; app.handles.reScaleFactors = ones(length(app.handles.EEG.chanlocs),1)'; % plot rescaled data curX = xlim(app.traces); range = fix(curX(1):curX(2)); plotSleepData(app, range); end app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG, 'eventconsistency'); app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG); % convert stage times to onsets in data points winlen = app.handles.stageData.win * app.handles.EEG.srate; stages = num2cell(app.handles.stageData.stages); onsets = app.handles.stageData.onsets; % convert stage codes to labels stages(app.handles.stageData.stages == 0) = app.handles.userStageNames(1); % wake stages(app.handles.stageData.stages == 1) = app.handles.userStageNames(2); % NREM1 stages(app.handles.stageData.stages == 2) = app.handles.userStageNames(3); % NREM2 stages(app.handles.stageData.stages == 3) = app.handles.userStageNames(4); % SWS stages(app.handles.stageData.stages == 4) = app.handles.userStageNames(5); % REM stages(app.handles.stageData.stages == 5) = app.handles.userStageNames(6); % Unscored % create empty EEGlab event structure to match existing to merge with if isempty(app.handles.EEG.event) % very unlikely, but just checking stageEvents = struct('type',[],'latency',[],'duration',[],'channel',[]); else fields = fieldnames(app.handles.EEG.event)'; fields{2,1} = {}; stageEvents = struct(fields{:}); clear fields end % create eeglab stage events from countingSheep scoring for nevt = 1:length(onsets) if nevt == length(onsets) % if its the last event, so only make duration up until end of recording if necessary if ischar(stages{nevt}) stageEvents(end+1).type = char(stages(nevt)); stageEvents(end).latency = onsets(nevt); if stageEvents(end).latency + winlen > app.handles.EEG.pnts choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['Duration of last epoch exceeds end of recording by ' num2str((app.handles.EEG.pnts - stageEvents(end).latency + winlen)/app.handles.EEG.srate) ' seconds. Truncating last epoch.' newline],'Truncate last event','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); stageEvents(end).duration = app.handles.EEG.pnts - stageEvents(end).latency; else stageEvents(end).duration = winlen; end end else % add the stage scoring events stageEvents(end+1).type = char(stages(nevt)); stageEvents(end).latency = onsets(nevt); stageEvents(end).duration = winlen; end end % now, lets add it to the events structure stageEvents = [stageEvents app.handles.EEG.event]; EEGtemp = app.handles.EEG; EEGtemp.event = stageEvents; % change from [], which is not consistent, to empty char, which means 'no channel'. evidx = find(isempty([EEGtemp.event.channel])); for nEvt = evidx if isempty(EEGtemp.event(nEvt).channel) EEGtemp.event(nEvt).channel = ''; end end % sort and check dataset EEGtemp = eeg_checkset(EEGtemp,'eventconsistency'); EEGtemp = eeg_checkset(EEGtemp,'makeur'); EEGtemp = eeg_checkset(EEGtemp); % save it to the mat file app.handles.stageData.events = EEGtemp.event; stageData = app.handles.stageData; stageData.events = EEGtemp.event; save(app.handles.stageFileIN, 'stageData'); clear EEG stageEvents evidx nEvt else EEGtemp = app.handles.EEG; end % save out the eeglab dataset if saveAs == 0 % saves over current dataset without pop-up save(fullfile(app.handles.EEG.filepath, app.handles.EEG.filename), '-v7.3', '-mat', '-struct', 'EEGtemp'); elseif saveAs == 1 % pop-up with option to save as another dataset app.saveDatasetData = saveDatasetAs(app, app.handles.EEG.filepath, app.handles.EEG.setname, 'set'); waitfor(app.saveDatasetData); if isempty(app.filename) returnFocus2Figure(app); return end EEGtemp.setname = app.filename; EEGtemp.filename = [app.filename '.set']; if app.filepath(end) ~= filesep EEGtemp.filepath = [app.filepath filesep]; end save(fullfile(EEGtemp.filepath, EEGtemp.filename), '-v7.3', '-mat', '-struct', 'EEGtemp'); timeStamp = strrep(strrep(char(datetime("now")),' ','-'),':','-'); app.handles.stageFileIN = fullfile(EEGtemp.filepath,strcat(EEGtemp.setname, '_', timeStamp, '.mat')); save(app.handles.stageFileIN, 'stageData'); app.handles.EEG.setname = EEGtemp.setname; app.handles.EEG.filename = EEGtemp.filename; app.handles.EEG.filepath = EEGtemp.filepath; end close(progress); returnFocus2Figure(app); end
%% Create and save new montage .m file function createMontage(app,scriptname) curDir = pwd; montageDir = which('sleep_montage_default'); montageDir = fileparts(montageDir); cd(montageDir) fid = fopen(scriptname, 'w'); fprintf(fid, ['function [electrodes , colors] = ' scriptname(1:end-2) '(app)\n']); fprintf(fid, ['electrodes = {''' strjoin(app.handles.userChannelLabels,''';''') '''};\n']); if iscell(app.handles.userChannelColors) color = ''; for nCh = 1:length(app.handles.userChannelColors) colorTemp = strcat(app.handles.userChannelColors{nCh}, ','); color = strcat(color, colorTemp); end color = char(color); color(end) = []; else color = app.handles.userChannelColors; end fprintf(fid, ['colors = ''' color ''';\n']); fprintf(fid, ['stages = {''' strjoin(app.handles.userStageNames,''';''') '''};\n']); fprintf(fid, ['winSize = ' app.handles.winIN ';\n']); fprintf(fid, ['lightsONtag = ''' app.handles.userlightsONtag ''';\n']); fprintf(fid, ['lightsOFFtag = ''' app.handles.userlightsOFFtag ''';\n']); fprintf(fid, ['recStartFormat = ''' app.handles.userRecStartFormat ''';\n']); fprintf(fid, 'app.handles.userChannelLabels = electrodes;\n'); fprintf(fid, 'app.handles.userChannelColors = colors;\n'); fprintf(fid, 'app.handles.userStageNames = stages;\n'); fprintf(fid, 'app.handles.userlightsONtag = lightsONtag;\n'); fprintf(fid, 'app.handles.userlightsOFFtag = lightsOFFtag;\n'); fprintf(fid, 'app.handles.userRecStartFormat = recStartFormat;\n'); fprintf(fid, 'app.handles.winIN = num2str(winSize);\n'); fprintf(fid, 'end'); fclose(fid); cd(curDir) clear curDir montageDir updateMontageList(app); end
%% Set Montage List based on montage directory function updateMontageList(app) sleepPath = app.handles.sleepPath; montageNames = dir(fullfile([fileparts(sleepPath) filesep 'montages'])); montages = []; if any(contains({montageNames(:).name},'_montage','IgnoreCase',1)) montageIdx = find(contains({montageNames(:).name},'_montage','IgnoreCase',1)); for idx=1:length(montageIdx) montages{idx} = montageNames(montageIdx(idx)).name(1:end-2); end else choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['No montage files found.' newline newline 'Requires at least one montage m-file using the word ''montage'' in the filename. If default montage has been moved, modified or deleted, please reinstall Counting Sheep PSG.'],'Missing Montage Files','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); return end app.plotSleepIN.Items = montages; end
%% jump to epoch function jumpto(app, ptX) winSize = str2double(app.handles.winIN); srate = app.handles.EEG.srate; newX = [ptX+1, ptX + winSize*srate]; range = fix(newX(1):newX(2)); plotSleepData(app, range); end
%% plot EEG data function runPlot(app) winSize = str2double(app.handles.winIN); if ~isfield(app.handles,'EEG') srate = 500; else srate = app.handles.EEG.srate; end range = fix(1:(winSize*srate)); plotSleepData(app, range); end
%% call user-defined montages and loads them function plotSleepData(app, range) plotFCN = app.plotSleepIN.Items; boxInd = ismember(plotFCN, app.plotSleepIN.Value); [electrodes , colors] = eval([plotFCN{boxInd}, '(app);']); % calls study-specific montage, then, load montage validDate(app); % validate recStart time format loadMontage(app, range, electrodes, colors); % loads montage and plots data updateStage(app, []); % plot hypnogram end
%% Plots custom montage, stage scoring and events: traces function loadMontage(app, range, electrodes, colors)
% check that montage matches data if isfield(app.handles, 'EEG') && ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.chanlocs) && app.handles.ica ~= 1 if ~all(ismember(app.handles.userChannelLabels,{app.handles.EEG.chanlocs.labels}')) dlgTitle = 'Montage incorrect'; dlgQuestion = ['Missing channel(s) in selected montage.' newline newline 'Would you like to create a new montage?']; choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,dlgQuestion,dlgTitle,'Options',{'Edit','Cancel'}); if strcmp(choice,'Edit') recStartFormat = 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'; newMontage_m_Callback(app,recStartFormat); return else return end end end
% handle channel scaling and hidden channels if isfield(app.handles,'curScale') scaleSpace = app.handles.curScale; else scaleSpace = 100; end if isfield(app.handles,'hideChans') hideCh = app.handles.hideChans; else hideCh = {}; end if isfield(app.handles,'scaleChans') scaleCh = app.handles.scaleChans; else scaleCh = {''}; end hold(app.traces, 'off');
% plot the axes labels and ranges set(gca,'TickLabelInterpreter','none'); maxY = scaleSpace*(length(electrodes) + 1); set(app.traces, 'Ylim', [0, maxY], 'YTick', scaleSpace:scaleSpace:(maxY - scaleSpace), 'YTickLabel', electrodes); % plot x axes, venst and data if isfield(app.handles, 'EEG') srate = app.handles.EEG.srate; newX = [range(1), range(end)]; xlim(app.traces, newX); set(app.traces, 'XTick', newX(1):1*srate:newX(2), 'XTickLabel', ((newX(1) - 1)/srate):1:((newX(2) - 1)/srate), 'XGrid', 'on'); % Plot all of the electrode data on the main axes (app.traces) % Choose EEG or ICA if isfield(app.handles, 'EEG') if app.handles.ica == 1 % Display ICA components plotICAData(app, range, electrodes, colors, scaleSpace, scaleCh); else % Display EEG data plotEEGData(app, range, electrodes, colors, scaleSpace, hideCh, scaleCh); end end plotLights(app, srate, maxY); % plot lights on/off events plotWatermark(app); % plot sleep stage watermark plotEvents(app, range, scaleSpace, electrodes); % plot events app.dataset_S.Text = app.handles.EEG.setname; % update setname end
% Function to plot ICA data function plotICAData(app, range, electrodes, colors, scaleSpace, scaleCh) % handle colors if any(contains(colors,'#')) % check if new hex colour format colorsTemp = strrep(colors,',',' '); colors = strsplit(colorsTemp); end % plot ICA data for e = 1:length(electrodes) if range(1) > 0 && range(end) < length(app.handles.EEG.icaact) centerData = -app.handles.EEG.icaact(e, range); if any(contains(colors,'#')) % check if new hex colour format color = colors{e}; else color = colors(e); end plotData(app, range, centerData, e, color, scaleSpace); plotScaleLines(app, range, centerData, e, electrodes, scaleSpace, scaleCh); end end end
% Function to plot EEG data function plotEEGData(app, range, electrodes, colors, scaleSpace, hideCh, scaleCh) % handle colors if any(contains(colors,'#')) % check if new hex colour format colorsTemp = strrep(colors,',',' '); colors = strsplit(colorsTemp); end % plot EEG data for e = 1:length(electrodes) for c = 1:length(app.handles.EEG.chanlocs) Elect = app.handles.EEG.chanlocs(c).labels; if strcmp(electrodes{e}, Elect) && ~ismember(electrodes{e}, hideCh) if range(1) > 0 && range(end) < length(app.handles.EEG.data) centerData = -app.handles.EEG.data(c, range); if any(contains(colors,'#')) % check if new hex colour format color = colors{e}; else color = colors(e); end plotData(app, range, centerData, e, color, scaleSpace); plotScaleLines(app, range, centerData, e, electrodes, scaleSpace, scaleCh); end end end end end
% Function to plot data function plotData(app, range, centerData, e, color, scaleSpace) plotLines = plot(app.traces, range, centerData + e * scaleSpace, 'color', color, 'PickableParts', 'none'); for i = 1:length(plotLines) set(plotLines(i), 'Tag', sprintf('scale:%d;chan:%d', e * scaleSpace, e)); end hold(app.traces, 'on'); end
% Function to plot scale lines function plotScaleLines(app, range, centerData, e, electrodes, scaleSpace, scaleCh) if ismember(electrodes{e}, scaleCh) plot(app.traces, range, zeros(size(centerData)) + e * scaleSpace - 75, 'r'); plot(app.traces, range, zeros(size(centerData)) + e * scaleSpace - 37.5, 'r'); plot(app.traces, range, zeros(size(centerData)) + e * scaleSpace, 'r--'); plot(app.traces, range, zeros(size(centerData)) + e * scaleSpace + 37.5, 'r'); plot(app.traces, range, zeros(size(centerData)) + e * scaleSpace + 75, 'r'); text(app.traces, range(end)-250, e*scaleSpace + 85, '-75 µV', 'Interpreter','none'); end end
% plot lights on and lights off lines function plotLights(app, srate, maxY) onT = (seconds(app.handles.stageData.lightsON - app.handles.stageData.recStart))*srate; offT = (seconds(app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF - app.handles.stageData.recStart))*srate; plot(app.traces, [onT, onT], [0, maxY], 'r', 'LineWidth', 4); plot(app.traces, [offT, offT], [0, maxY], 'g', 'LineWidth', 4); end
% add stage label watermark label to traces function plotWatermark(app) if app.numEpochs.Value > 1 curStage = app.handles.stageData.stages(find(ismember(app.handles.stageData.onsets, app.traces.XLim(1):app.traces.XLim(end)))); else curStage = app.handles.stageData.stages(find(app.handles.stageData.onsets == app.traces.XLim(1))); end % convert stage codes to labels if ~isempty(curStage) curStage = {app.handles.userStageNames{curStage+1}}; x = 1:length(curStage)+length(curStage)-1; idx = mod(x,2); odd_num = x(logical(idx)); counter = 1; for nSt = odd_num xpos = app.traces.XLim(1) + (app.traces.XLim(2) - (app.traces.XLim(1)-1))*(nSt/(length(curStage)*2)); ypos = (app.traces.YLim(2) - (app.traces.YLim(1)))/2; text(app.traces,xpos,ypos,curStage{counter},'FontSize',100,'Color',[0 0 0 0.25],'HorizontalAlignment','center','VerticalAlignment','middle','PickableParts','none'); counter = counter + 1; end clear counter end clear curStage if gca ~= app.traces % fixes axes, if needed axes(app.traces); end end
% handle events function plotEvents(app, range, scaleSpace, electrodes) if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.event) % checks for events if isfield(app.handles,'hideEvents') % check for events to hide hideEvt = app.handles.hideEvents; else hideEvt = {}; end if isfield(app.handles, 'recPosition') app.handles = rmfield(app.handles, 'recPosition'); % clear cache of any previous event selections app.handles = rmfield(app.handles, 'curPosition'); % clear cache of any previous event selections app.handles = rmfield(app.handles, 'recLabel'); % clear cache of any previous event selections end
% Checks for any events in the current data range and plot them % create empty EEGlab event structure to match existing to merge with fields = fieldnames(app.handles.EEG.event)'; fields{2,1} = {}; tempEvent = struct(fields{:}); clear fields % find events in current epoch rangeStart = range(1); rangeEnd = range(end); % Get latency and duration of all events in one go latencies = [app.handles.EEG.event.latency]; durations = [app.handles.EEG.event.duration]; % Calculate event end times evtEnd = latencies + durations - 1; % Vectorized check for overlap with range evtIn = ~(evtEnd < rangeStart | latencies > rangeEnd); clear rangeStart rangeEnd if any(evtIn) curEvt = app.handles.EEG.event(find(evtIn)); for nEvt = 1:length(curEvt) if curEvt(nEvt).latency < range(1) % starts before current epoch curEvt(nEvt).duration = curEvt(nEvt).duration - (range(1) - curEvt(nEvt).latency); curEvt(nEvt).latency = range(1); % change latency to min of current epoch for display purposes end if curEvt(nEvt).latency+curEvt(nEvt).duration-1 > range(end) % extends past current epoch curEvt(nEvt).duration = range(end)-curEvt(nEvt).latency; % change durantion to max of current epoch for display purposes end tempEvent = [tempEvent curEvt(nEvt)]; % concatenate end end clear curEvt evtIn % plot labels for events maxY = scaleSpace * (length(electrodes) + 1); scaleHeight = 100; for nEvt = 1:length(tempEvent) evt = tempEvent(nEvt); % Filter events: skip if outside range or hidden if evt.latency < range(1) || evt.latency > range(end) || ismember(evt.type, hideEvt) continue; end % Default rectangle height & position hasChannel = isfield(evt, 'channel') && ~isempty(evt.channel) && str2double(evt.channel) ~= 0; chIdx = []; if hasChannel chIdx = find(strcmp(electrodes, evt.channel), 1); hasChannel = ~isempty(chIdx); % ensure channel exists end if hasChannel yPos = chIdx * scaleSpace - 50; height = scaleHeight; yTextLong = chIdx * scaleSpace - 30; yTextShort = chIdx * scaleSpace - 20; else yPos = 0; height = maxY; yTextLong = 30; yTextShort = 20; end xy = [evt.latency, yPos, evt.duration, height]; % Text position and orientation if evt.duration > 1 text(app.traces, evt.latency + 50, yTextLong, evt.type, ... 'Interpreter', 'none'); else text(app.traces, evt.latency - 100, yTextShort, evt.type, ... 'Interpreter', 'none', 'Rotation', 90); end % Plot rectangle rectProps = { 'Position', xy, ... 'FaceColor', [1 1 0], ... 'LineWidth', 1.5, ... 'PickableParts', 'visible', ... 'HitTest', 'on', ... 'ButtonDownFcn', @selectEvent, ... }; if app.handles.matLabIsOld == 1 rectProps{4} = [1 1 0 0.25]; % FaceColor with alpha else rectProps = [rectProps, {'FaceAlpha', 0.25}]; end rectangle(rectProps{:}); end end end
% start cursor line and data point cp = app.traces.CurrentPoint; app.handles.dot = plot(app.traces,cp(1,1),cp(1,2),'.','MarkerSize',20,'Color','r'); app.handles.xl = xline(cp(1,1), 'LineWidth',1); % plot line at cursor x value app.handles.dot.Visible = 'off'; app.handles.xl.Visible = 'off';
% button down function for event rectangle objects function selectEvent(rectangle,eventData) if ~isfield(app.handles, 'recPosition') app.handles.curPosition = []; app.handles.recPosition = []; app.handles.recLabel = []; end LineWidth = eventData.Source.LineWidth; curPosition = eventData.IntersectionPoint; recPosition = eventData.Source.Position; label = eventData.Source.Tag; if LineWidth == 1.5 % if not already selected, change line and colour if app.handles.matLabIsOld == 1 set(rectangle,'FaceColor',[1 0 0 0.25]); else set(rectangle,'FaceColor',[1 0 0],'FaceAlpha',0.25); end set(rectangle, 'LineWidth',3); app.handles.curPosition{end+1} = curPosition; app.handles.recPosition{end+1} = recPosition; app.handles.recLabel{end+1} = label; else % otherwise, it has already been selected, so change back line and colour if app.handles.matLabIsOld == 1 set(rectangle,'FaceColor',[1 1 0 0.25]); else set(rectangle,'FaceColor',[1 1 0],'FaceAlpha',0.25); end set(rectangle, 'LineWidth',1.5); app.handles.curPosition = []; app.handles.recPosition = []; app.handles.recLabel = []; end end
end
%% update sleep stages: hypnogram function app = updateStage(app, stageCode) if isfield(app.handles, 'stageData') winSize = app.handles.stageData.win; srate = app.handles.stageData.srate; curWin = xlim(app.traces); ind = fix(curWin(2)/(winSize*srate)); if ind < 1 % at start of file ind = 1; elseif ind >= length(app.handles.stageData.stageTime) % at end of file ind = length(app.handles.stageData.stageTime); end rstart = app.handles.stageData.recStart + (fix(curWin(1)/srate)/86400); app.time_S.Text = sprintf('Date: %s Time: %s Epoch: %d', char(rstart, 'yyyy-MM-dd'), char(rstart, 'HH:mm:ss'), ind); onT = minutes(app.handles.stageData.lightsON - app.handles.stageData.recStart); offT = minutes(app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF - app.handles.stageData.recStart); if ~isempty(stageCode) if ~isempty(app.handles.stageData.stages) app.handles.stageData.stages(ind) = stageCode; app.handles.stageData.onsets(ind) = curWin(1); end else if ~isempty(app.handles.stageData.stages) stageCode = app.handles.stageData.stages(ind); end end hold(app.hypnogram, 'off') if ~isempty(app.handles.stageData.stageTime) curT = app.handles.stageData.stageTime(ind); else curT = 0; end plot(app.hypnogram, [curT, curT], [0, 5], 'k', 'LineWidth', 2); hold(app.hypnogram, 'on'); plot(app.hypnogram, [onT, onT], [0, 5], 'r', 'LineWidth', 2); plot(app.hypnogram, [offT, offT], [0, 5], 'g', 'LineWidth', 2); plotmap = [5 3 2 1 4 0]; stageColors = [0.4660 0.6740 0.1880; 0.3010 0.7450 0.9330; 0 0.4470 0.7410; 0.9290 0.6940 0.1250; 0.6350 0.0780 0.1840; 0.4940 0.1840 0.5560]; % stageColors = {'#77AC30'; '#4DBEEE'; '#0072BD'; '#EDB120'; '#A2142F'; '#7E2F8E'}; stageNames = {'Wake'; 'NREM1'; 'NREM2'; 'SWS'; 'REM'}; % internal names of button functions connectData = ones(length(app.handles.stageData.stageTime),1)'*5; for i = 0:5 curInds = find(app.handles.stageData.stages == i); plot(app.hypnogram, app.handles.stageData.stageTime(curInds), ones(length(curInds), 1)*plotmap(i + 1), '.', 'MarkerSize', 20, 'Color', stageColors(i+1, :), 'PickableParts', 'none'); connectData(curInds) = plotmap(i + 1); if i < 5 b = app.([stageNames{i + 1} '_B']); if i == stageCode set(b, 'BackgroundColor', stageColors(i + 1, :)); plot(app.hypnogram, 0.1, plotmap(i + 1), '<', 'Color', stageColors(i + 1, :), 'MarkerSize', 7, 'LineWidth', 3, 'PickableParts', 'none'); else set(b, 'BackgroundColor', [1 1 1]); end end end plot(app.hypnogram, app.handles.stageData.stageTime, connectData, 'k', 'PickableParts', 'none'); if app.hypnogram.XLim(2) < 60 % less than 1 hour set(app.hypnogram, 'XTick', 1:app.hypnogram.XLim(2), 'XTickLabel', 1:app.hypnogram.XLim(2)); else % more than 1 hour set(app.hypnogram, 'XTick', 1:60:app.hypnogram.XLim(2), 'XTickLabel', 0:1:app.hypnogram.XLim(2)/60); end if ~isempty(app.handles.stageData.stageTime) set(app.hypnogram, 'Xlim', app.handles.stageData.stageTime([1, end]), 'Ylim', [0, 5], 'YTick', 0:5, 'YTickLabel', {'None'; 'SWS'; 'N2'; 'N1'; 'REM'; 'Wake'}); else set(app.hypnogram, 'Xlim', [0, 1], 'Ylim', [0, 5], 'YTick', 0:5, 'YTickLabel', {'None'; 'SWS'; 'N2'; 'N1'; 'REM'; 'Wake'}); end end end
%% Turn off interactivity with items when no dataset loaded function menuItemsOFF(app) % menu items if app.handles.ica == 0 app.ImportSleepStagesMat_m.Enable = "off"; app.ImportEventsMat_m.Enable = "off"; app.clearDataset_m.Enable = 'off'; app.saveDataset_m.Enable = "off"; app.saveDatasetAs_m.Enable = "off"; app.generateEventReport_m.Enable = "off"; app.generateHypnogram_m.Enable = "off"; app.clearDataset_m.Enable = "off"; end app.editSetname_m.Enable = "off"; app.hideChan_m.Enable = "off"; app.showChan_m.Enable = "off"; app.setScale_m.Enable = "off"; app.rescaleSelectedChannels_m.Enable = "off"; app.markChannelAsBadData_m.Enable = "off"; app.interpolateBadChannel_m.Enable = "off"; app.turnOnOffCursorDataMode_m.Enable = "off"; app.filterChannels_m.Enable = "off"; app.downsampleChannels_m.Enable = "off"; app.rereferenceChannels_m.Enable = "off"; app.currentDataset_m.Enable = "off"; app.ASR_m.Enable = "off"; app.ICA_m.Enable = "off"; if app.handles.ica == 0 app.runICA_m.Enable = "off"; app.displayICA_m.Enable = "off"; app.deleteICA_m.Enable = "off"; end app.FFT_m.Enable = "off"; app.CurrentDatasetArt_m.Enable = "off"; app.CurrentDatasetSp_m.Enable = "off"; app.CurrentDatasetSW_m.Enable = "off"; app.CurrentDatasetEM_m.Enable = "off"; app.OnOffEventMark_m.Enable = "off"; app.hideEvents_m.Enable = "off"; app.showEvents_m.Enable = "off"; app.clearEvents_m.Enable = "off"; app.editLightsTags_m.Enable = "off"; app.editRecordingStart_m.Enable = "off"; % toolbar buttons if app.handles.ica == 0 app.save_t.Enable = "off"; app.scaleSmall_t.Enable = "off"; app.scaleBigger_t.Enable = "off"; app.resetScale_t.Enable = "off"; app.playPause_t.Enable = "off"; app.lightsOff_t.Enable = "off"; app.lightsOn_t.Enable = "off"; app.jumpTo_t.Enable = "off"; app.ICA_t.Enable = "off"; end app.cursorMode_t.Enable = "off"; app.markMode_t.Enable = "off"; % buttons app.markStr.Enable = "off"; app.delMark.Enable = "off"; app.mergeMark.Enable = "off"; app.numEpochs.Editable = "off"; app.numEpochs.Enable = "off"; app.scroll.Enable = "off"; app.allChannelsMode.Enable = 'off'; if app.handles.ica == 0 app.arrowLeft_B.Enable = "off"; app.arrowRight_B.Enable = "off"; end app.Wake_B.Enable = "off"; app.REM_B.Enable = "off"; app.SWS_B.Enable = "off"; app.NREM1_B.Enable = "off"; app.NREM2_B.Enable = "off"; end
%% Turn on interactivity with items when dataset loaded function menuItemsON(app) % menu items app.editSetname_m.Enable = "on"; app.ImportSleepStagesMat_m.Enable = "on"; app.ImportEventsMat_m.Enable = "on"; app.generateEventReport_m.Enable = "on"; app.generateHypnogram_m.Enable = "on"; app.clearDataset_m.Enable = 'on'; app.clearDataset_m.Enable = "on"; app.hideChan_m.Enable = "on"; app.showChan_m.Enable = "on"; app.rescaleSelectedChannels_m.Enable = "on"; app.setScale_m.Enable = "on"; app.markChannelAsBadData_m.Enable = "on"; app.interpolateBadChannel_m.Enable = "on"; app.turnOnOffCursorDataMode_m.Enable = "on"; app.filterChannels_m.Enable = "on"; app.downsampleChannels_m.Enable = "on"; app.rereferenceChannels_m.Enable = "on"; app.currentDataset_m.Enable = "on"; app.ASR_m.Enable = "on"; app.ICA_m.Enable = "on"; app.runICA_m.Enable = "on"; if app.handles.ica == 1 app.displayICA_m.Enable = "off"; app.deleteICA_m.Enable = "off"; end app.FFT_m.Enable = "on"; app.CurrentDatasetArt_m.Enable = "on"; app.CurrentDatasetSp_m.Enable = "on"; app.CurrentDatasetSW_m.Enable = "on"; app.CurrentDatasetEM_m.Enable = "on"; app.OnOffEventMark_m.Enable = "off"; app.OnOffEventMark_m.Enable = "on"; app.hideEvents_m.Enable = "on"; app.showEvents_m.Enable = "on"; app.clearEvents_m.Enable = "on"; app.editLightsTags_m.Enable = "on"; app.editRecordingStart_m.Enable = "on"; % toolbar buttons app.scaleSmall_t.Enable = "on"; app.scaleBigger_t.Enable = "on"; app.playPause_t.Enable = "on"; app.resetScale_t.Enable = "on"; app.lightsOff_t.Enable = "on"; app.lightsOn_t.Enable = "on"; app.jumpTo_t.Enable = "on"; app.cursorMode_t.Enable = "on"; app.markMode_t.Enable = "on"; if app.handles.ica == 1 app.ICA_t.Enable = "on"; end % buttons app.delMark.Enable = "on"; app.mergeMark.Enable = "on"; app.arrowLeft_B.Enable = "on"; app.arrowRight_B.Enable = "on"; app.Wake_B.Enable = "on"; app.REM_B.Enable = "on"; app.SWS_B.Enable = "on"; app.NREM1_B.Enable = "on"; app.NREM2_B.Enable = "on"; end
%% Enable the save button function saveON(app) app.saveDataset_m.Enable = "on"; app.saveDatasetAs_m.Enable = "on"; app.save_t.Enable = "on"; end
%% Disable the save button function saveOFF(app) app.saveDataset_m.Enable = "off"; app.saveDatasetAs_m.Enable = "off"; app.save_t.Enable = "off"; end
%% Return focus to figure function returnFocus2Figure(app) % gives focus to main figure window to keypresses can be processed after button push focus(app.CountingSheepMain); end
function quitCountingSheep(app) % Minimize MATLAB desktop (optional) try desktop = com.mathworks.mde.desk.MLDesktop.getInstance(); desktop.getMainFrame().setMaximized(true); catch % Might fail in newer MATLAB releases end % handle output arguments, e.g., if EEG structure used as input argument if app.EEG == 1 % EEG was used as input argument assignin('base','EEG',app.handles.EEG); % output EEG to base workspace end app.delete; end
end
% Callbacks that handle component events methods (Access = private)
% Code that executes after component creation function countingSheep_OpenFcn(app, EEG)
% initialization drawnow; app.CountingSheepMain.WindowState = "maximized"; progress = uiprogressdlg(app.CountingSheepMain,'Title',['Initializing Counting Sheep PSG' newline]); pause(0.5); app.handles.settings = settings; try app.handles.settings.matlab.appearance.MATLABTheme.TemporaryValue = "Light"; catch % in case this property does not exist in older versions end app.save_t.Enable = "off"; if isMATLABReleaseOlderThan('R2022a') choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'MATLAB R2022a or newer required','Version Error','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); quitCountingSheep(app) return elseif isMATLABReleaseOlderThan('R2024a') app.handles.matLabIsOld = 1; else app.handles.matLabIsOld = 0; end disableDefaultInteractivity(app.traces); disableDefaultInteractivity(app.hypnogram); warning off backtrace warning off verbose zoom off
% Minimize MATLAB desktop (optional) try desktop = com.mathworks.mde.desk.MLDesktop.getInstance(); desktop.getMainFrame().setMinimized(true); catch % Might fail in newer MATLAB releases end
% add Counting Sheep directories to path progress.Value = 1/5; progress.Message = ['Adding directories to path...' newline]; pause(0.5); sleepPath = which('countingSheepPSG'); addpath(genpath(fileparts(sleepPath))); app.handles.sleepPath = sleepPath;
% run startup functions getEEGLABpath(app); progress.Value = 2/5; progress.Message = ['Checking for updates...' newline]; pause(1); checkForUpdates(app); progress.Value = 4/5; progress.Message = ['Loading montage...' newline]; pause(0.5); sleep_montage_default(app); updateMontageList(app); checkIfICA(app); if nargin == 2 createNewMontage(app,EEG); else promptMontageSelect(app); end progress.Value = 5/5; progress.Message = ['Initialization complete...' newline]; pause(0.5); close(progress); returnFocus2Figure(app);
function getEEGLABpath(app) % Get eeglab path matlabSetPathDirsString = path(); if ispc % on Windows dirSep = ';'; elseif ismac % on MAC dirSep = ':'; elseif isunix dirSep = ':'; end matlabSetPathDirs = split(matlabSetPathDirsString, dirSep); eeglabPath = matlabSetPathDirs(contains(matlabSetPathDirs, 'eeglab202')); % eeglab is not on the Matlab path, try to add it if it is on the user environment path if isempty(eeglabPath) userpath('reset') dirNames = dir(fullfile([userpath() filesep 'eeglab202*'])); try eeglabPath = dirNames(startsWith({dirNames([dirNames.isdir]).name}, 'eeglab202')).folder; folderName = dirNames(logical(startsWith({dirNames([dirNames.isdir]).name}, 'eeglab202') .* ~endsWith({dirNames([dirNames.isdir]).name}, '_old'))).name; if isempty('dirName') || isempty('folderName') choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Please add EEGLAB version 2023 (or newer) main folder to Matlab path.','EEGLAB not found','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); quitCountingSheep(app) return else addpath(fullfile(eeglabPath, folderName)); end catch choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Please add EEGLAB version 2023 (or newer) main folder to Matlab path.','EEGLAB not found','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); quitCountingSheep(app) return end end app.handles.eeglabPath = eeglabPath; % load eeglab to add subdirectories to path if isempty(which('eeglab')) choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Please add EEGLAB main folder to Matlab path.','EEGLAB not found','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); quitCountingSheep(app) return elseif ~isempty(which('eeglab')) && isempty(which('pop_loadset')) disp('EEGLAB is loading, please wait...') eeglab nogui;clc end end
function checkForUpdates(app) % check version against EEGLAB plugin database eeglabPath = app.handles.eeglabPath; sleepPath = app.handles.sleepPath; eeglabVers = ''; if any(contains(eeglabPath, 'CountSheepPSG')) % check if the plugin exists in EEGLAB plugins folder csPSGdir = eeglabPath(find(contains(eeglabPath, 'CountSheepPSG'))); [sleepFilePath,sleepFileName] = fileparts(sleepPath); sleepPathCheck = [sleepFilePath filesep sleepFileName]; if strcmp(sleepPathCheck, [csPSGdir{1} filesep 'countingSheepPSG']) % check if launched version is also the EEGLAB plugin % Code adapted from plugin_getweb.m function from EEGLAB 2025.0.0 type = 'update'; % to show updated plugins from database option_showpendingplugins = 0; % 0 = show approved plugins only try disp('Retrieving download statistics...'); [plugin, status] = urlread(['http://sccn.ucsd.edu/eeglab/plugin_uploader/plugin_getcountall_nowiki_json.php?type=' type '&upload=' num2str(option_showpendingplugins)]); if isempty(plugin) || isequal(plugin, 'Couldn''t make connection to DB.') disp('Issue with retrieving statistics for extensions'); return; else plugin = jsondecode(plugin); pluginIdx = find(ismember({plugin.plugin},{'CountSheepPSG'})); updateInfo = plugin(pluginIdx); eeglabVers = updateInfo.curversion; end catch disp('Cannot connect to the internet to retrieve statistics for extensions'); return end if status == 0 disp('Cannot connect to the internet to retrieve extension list'); return end end end % check EEGLAB version against GitHub gitVers = ''; try gitText = webread('https://github.com/mrverrall/CountingSheepPSG/blob/main/eegplugin_countingSheepPSG.m'); % load script on github website as text gitVers = extractBetween(gitText,'vers = ''',''';'); % extract version from text % get local version to check for updates localText = fileread('eegplugin_countingSheepPSG.m'); % load script as text localVers = extractBetween(localText,'vers = ''',''';'); % extract version from text disp(['Current version: V' localVers{:}]) % check if update required if ~isempty(eeglabVers) % launched eeglab plugin version if ~strcmp(eeglabVers,localVers) % EEGLAB version needs to be updated choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['A new version of Counting Sheep is available on EEGLAB!' newline newline ... 'Please update via EEGLAB extension manager.'], ... 'New version available','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); disp(['Available update version: V' eeglabVers]) else disp('Counting Sheep PSG is up to date') end else % launched from elsehwere if ~isempty(gitVers) && isempty(eeglabVers) && ~strcmp(gitVers,localVers) choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['A new version of Counting Sheep is available on GitHub!' newline newline ... 'Update via Git, MATLAB Source Control, or visit GitHub:' newline ... 'https://github.com/stuartfogel/CountingSheepPSG'], ... 'New version available','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); disp(['Available update version: V' gitVers{:}]) else disp('Counting Sheep PSG is up to date') end end catch disp('Unable to connect to update server. Check internet connection.') end end
function [OK] = checkForLicence(app) %#ok<INUSD> % registration removed — always approved OK = 1; end
function checkIfICA(app) % Check for ICA data if isfield(app.handles, 'EEG') if isfield(app.handles.EEG, 'icaact') if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.icaact) app.handles.ica = 1; % turn on option to plot ICA data else app.handles.ica = 0; % turn off option to plot ICA data end else app.handles.ica = 0; % turn off option to plot ICA data end else app.handles.ica = 0; % turn off option to plot ICA data end end
function createNewMontage(app,EEG) % if EEG structure used as input argument EEG.setname = EEG.filename(1:end-4); app.handles.EEG = EEG; app.EEG = 1; % EEG dataset was used as input argument timeStamp = strrep(strrep(char(datetime("now")),' ','-'),':','-'); app.handles.stageFileIN = fullfile(app.handles.EEG.filepath,strcat(app.handles.EEG.setname, '_', timeStamp, '.mat')); % create new montage, based on channel info and defaults prompt = {['Enter name for new montage:',newline]}; dlgtitle = 'Save new montage for new dataset'; dims = [1 50]; definput = {'new_dataset'}; scriptname = inputdlg(prompt,dlgtitle,dims,definput); returnFocus2Figure(app); scriptname = ['sleep_montage_' scriptname{:}]; alphanum = ~isstrprop(scriptname, 'alphanum'); scriptname(alphanum) = '_'; app.handles.userChannelLabels = flip({app.handles.EEG.chanlocs(:).labels}'); % based on channel list colors(1:length({app.handles.EEG.chanlocs.labels})) = 'k'; % all black. boring! app.handles.userChannelColors = colors; app.handles.userRecStartFormat = 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'; % default createMontage(app,[scriptname '.m']); app.plotSleepIN.Value = scriptname; % load with new montage clearSet = 0; noPopUp = 1; loadNewDataset(app,clearSet,noPopUp); menuItemsON(app); end
function promptMontageSelect(app) % pop-up for montage selection montages = app.plotSleepIN.Items; [idx,ok] = listdlg('PromptString','Select a montage to load:','ListString',montages,'ListSize',[250,250],'SelectionMode','single'); % load montage if ok == 1 eval([montages{idx}, '(app);']); % calls study-specific montage app.plotSleepIN.Value = montages{idx}; runPlot(app); % plot traces end app.handles.ica = 0; % turn off option to plot ICA data menuItemsOFF(app); end
end
% Callback function: CountingSheepMain, quit_m function countingSheep_CloseFcn(app, event) % Executes just before countingSheep closes if app.save_t.Enable == "on" dlgTitle = 'Save changes?'; dlgQuestion = ['Warning: You have unsaved changes to the dataset.' newline newline 'Do you want to save your changes?']; choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,dlgQuestion,dlgTitle,'Options',{'Yes','No'}); if strcmp(choice,'No') try if app.handles.settings.matlab.appearance.MATLABTheme.PersonalValue == "Dark" app.handles.settings.matlab.appearance.MATLABTheme.TemporaryValue = "Dark"; end catch % in case this property does not exist in older versions end quitCountingSheep(app) else saveDataset_m_Callback(app) quitCountingSheep(app) end else try if app.handles.settings.matlab.appearance.MATLABTheme.PersonalValue == "Dark" app.handles.settings.matlab.appearance.MATLABTheme.TemporaryValue = "Dark"; end catch % in case this property does not exist in older versions end quitCountingSheep(app) end end
% Value changed function: plotSleepIN function plotSleepIN_Callback(app, event) % load montage from drop-down and plot the data validDate(app); % validate recStart time format curX = xlim(app.traces); range = fix(curX(1):curX(2)); plotSleepData(app, range); returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Callback function: open_t function open_t_Callback(app, event) loadDataset_m_Callback(app, event); returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Callback function: save_t function save_t_Callback(app, event) saveDataset_m_Callback(app, event); returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Callback function: scaleSmall_t function scaleSmall_t_Callback(app, event) % decrease channel scaing if isfield(app.handles, 'curScale') app.handles.curScale = app.handles.curScale + 10; curX = xlim(app.traces); range = fix(curX(1):curX(2)); plotSleepData(app, range); end returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Callback function: scaleBigger_t function scaleBigger_t_Callback(app, event) % increase channel scaing if isfield(app.handles, 'curScale') app.handles.curScale = app.handles.curScale - 10; if app.handles.curScale <= 0 % can't be zero or negative app.handles.curScale = 1; end curX = xlim(app.traces); range = fix(curX(1):curX(2)); plotSleepData(app, range); end returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Callback function: resetScale_t function resetScale_t_Callback(app, event) % reset to default channel scaing if isfield(app.handles, 'curScale') app.handles.curScale = 100; curX = xlim(app.traces); range = fix(curX(1):curX(2)); plotSleepData(app, range); end returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Callback function: playPause_t function playPause_t_Callback(app, event) while app.playPause_t.State == "on" pause(0.25) scroll_B_Callback(app, event) pause(0.25) end returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Callback function: lightsOff_t function lightsOff_t_Callback(app, event) % jump to lights off winSize = str2double(app.handles.winIN); srate = app.handles.EEG.srate; pt = minutes(app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF - app.handles.stageData.recStart); ptX = fix(pt(1)*(60/winSize))*winSize*srate; jumpto(app, ptX); end
% Callback function: lightsOn_t function lightsOn_t_Callback(app, event) % jump to lights on winSize = str2double(app.handles.winIN); srate = app.handles.EEG.srate; pt = minutes(app.handles.stageData.lightsON - app.handles.stageData.recStart); ptX = (fix(pt(1)*(60/winSize))*winSize*srate); EOF = (fix(app.handles.EEG.pnts/app.handles.EEG.srate/60*(60/winSize))*winSize*srate); if ptX == EOF % its the end of the file, so, we subtract one epoch to jump to ptX = ptX - winSize*srate; end jumpto(app, ptX); returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Callback function: jumpTo_t function jumpTo_t_Callback(app, event) % jump to a user-specified epoch app.handles.scrollMode = []; % reset if in scroll mode out = inputdlg('Enter Epoch #:'); returnFocus2Figure(app); if ~isempty(out) epoch = out{1}; else epoch = ''; end if ~isempty(epoch) epochNum = fix((str2double(epoch))); if epochNum < 1 % can't be lower than 1 epochNum = 1; end if epochNum > length(app.handles.stageData.stages) % can't be higher than number of epochs epochNum = length(app.handles.stageData.stages); end winSize = str2double(app.handles.winIN); srate = app.handles.EEG.srate; jumpto(app, (epochNum - 1)*winSize*srate); end returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% On callback: markMode_t function markMode_On_t_Callback(app, event) % turn on event marking mode if app.cursorMode_t.State == "on" cursorModeOff_t_Callback(app); % turns off cursor mode (in conflict) progress = uiprogressdlg(app.CountingSheepMain,'Title','Cursor Mode Warning','Message','Cursor Mode turned off','Indeterminate','on'); pause(2); close(progress); end app.markMode_t.State = "on"; app.markStr.Enable = 'on'; app.delMark.Enable = 'on'; app.mergeMark.Enable = 'on'; app.numEpochs.Editable = "on"; app.numEpochs.Enable = "on"; app.scroll.Enable = 'on'; app.allChannelsMode.Enable = 'on'; returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Off callback: markMode_t function markMode_Off_t_Callback(app, event) % turn off event marking mode app.markMode_t.State = "off"; app.markStr.Enable = 'off'; app.delMark.Enable = 'on'; app.mergeMark.Enable = 'on'; app.numEpochs.Editable = "off"; app.numEpochs.Enable = "off"; app.scroll.Enable = 'off'; app.allChannelsMode.Enable = 'off'; returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% On callback: cursorMode_t function cursorModeOn_t_Callback(app, event) app.cursorMode_t.State = "on"; if app.markMode_t.State == "on" markMode_Off_t_Callback(app); % turns off marker mode (in conflict) progress = uiprogressdlg(app.CountingSheepMain,'Title','Marker Mode Warning','Message','Marker Mode turned off','Indeterminate','on'); pause(2); close(progress); end end
% Off callback: cursorMode_t function cursorModeOff_t_Callback(app, event) app.cursorMode_t.State = "off"; app.voltage_S.Text = '0 µV'; end
% Window button motion function: CountingSheepMain function tracesCursorMotion_Callback(app, event) if isfield(app.handles, 'EEG') && ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.data) && strcmp(app.cursorMode_t.State, 'on') hAxes = overobj('axes'); if ~isempty(hAxes) if ~isempty(findobj(hAxes.Children, 'Type', 'Line')) curX = xlim(app.traces); curY = ylim(app.traces); range = fix(curX(1):curX(2)); centerData = (app.handles.EEG.data(:,range)); cp = app.traces.CurrentPoint; xIdx = find(ismember(range, round(cp(1,1)))); channels = length(app.handles.userChannelLabels); for nCh = 1:channels if (cp(1,2) > (curY(2)/(channels+1))*nCh - (curY(2)/(channels+1)/2)) && (cp(1,2) < (curY(2)/(channels+1))*nCh + (curY(2)/(channels+1)/2)) dataChIdx = {app.handles.EEG.chanlocs.labels}'; userChIdx = app.handles.userChannelLabels; [~,idx] = ismember(userChIdx,dataChIdx); e = idx(nCh); amplitude = centerData(e,xIdx); app.voltage_S.Text = sprintf('%s', num2str(round(amplitude,1)),' µV'); % update cursor info app.handles.dot.Visible = 'on'; app.handles.xl.Visible = 'on'; app.handles.dot.XData = cp(1,1); % update x value app.handles.dot.YData = (curY(2)/(channels+1)*nCh)+(amplitude*-1); % update y value app.handles.xl.Value = cp(1,1); % update x value end end end end else app.handles.dot.Visible = 'off'; app.handles.xl.Visible = 'off'; end end
% On callback: ICA_t function ICA_On_t_Callback(app, event) if isfield(app.handles.EEG, 'icaact') if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.icaact) % Display independent components app.handles.ica = 1; % turn on option to plot ICA data menuItemsOFF(app); % create new montage, based on ICA channel info and show ICA data scriptname = 'sleep_montage_ICA'; app.handles.userChannelLabels = cellstr(strcat('ICA_', num2str([1:size(app.handles.EEG.icaact,1)]')))'; % based on output from ICA colors(1:size(app.handles.EEG.icaact,1)) = 'k'; % all black. boring! app.handles.userChannelColors = colors; app.handles.userRecStartFormat = 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'; % default createMontage(app,[scriptname '.m']); app.plotSleepIN.Value = scriptname; runPlot(app); clear scriptname colors end end end
% Off callback: ICA_t function ICA_Off_t_Callback(app, event) % Close ICA montages = app.plotSleepIN.Items; % pop-up for montage selection [idx,ok] = listdlg('PromptString','Select a montage to load:','ListString',montages,'ListSize',[250,250],'SelectionMode','single'); % load montage if ok == 1 app.handles.ica = 0; % turn off option to plot ICA data menuItemsON(app); eval([montages{idx}, '(app);']); % calls study-specific montage app.plotSleepIN.Value = montages{idx}; runPlot(app); % plot traces else app.handles.ica = 1; % keep option to plot ICA data on end returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Button pushed function: delMark function delMark_B_Callback(app, event) % delete a user-selected event if isfield(app.handles, 'recPosition') cursorData = app.handles.recPosition; if ~isempty(cursorData) for nCursor = 1:length(cursorData) evtIdx1 = find(ismember([app.handles.EEG.event.latency], [cursorData{nCursor}(1)])); % find matching latency evtIdx = zeros(size(evtIdx1)); evtCount = 1; if length(evtIdx1) > 1 % check duration to make sure you have the matching event for nEvt = evtIdx1 evtIdx2 = find(ismember([app.handles.EEG.event.duration], [app.handles.EEG.event(nEvt).duration])); % find matching duration evtIdx3 = find(ismember([app.handles.EEG.event.type], [app.handles.EEG.event(nEvt).type])); % find matching label evtIdx(evtCount) = intersect(evtIdx1,evtIdx2); evtIdx(evtCount) = intersect(evtIdx(evtCount),evtIdx3); evtCount = evtCount + 1; end else % there is only one match for that latency, so that must be the one evtIdx = evtIdx1; end if ~isempty(evtIdx) app.handles.EEG.event(evtIdx) = []; % delete 'em end end app.handles.stageData.events = app.handles.EEG.event; stageData = app.handles.stageData; save(app.handles.stageFileIN, 'stageData'); app.handles = rmfield(app.handles, 'recPosition'); % clear cache of any previous event selections app.handles = rmfield(app.handles, 'curPosition'); % clear cache of any previous event selections app.handles = rmfield(app.handles, 'recLabel'); % clear cache of any previous event selections curX = xlim(app.traces); range = fix(curX(1):curX(2)); plotSleepData(app, range); saveON(app); end end returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Button pushed function: mergeMark function mergeMark_B_Callback(app, event) % merge two user-selected events if isfield(app.handles, 'recPosition') cursorData = app.handles.recPosition; if ~isempty(cursorData) && length(cursorData) == 2 % merge if only 2 events selected if cursorData{1}(1) > cursorData{2}(1) % sort them cdTemp(1) = cursorData(2); cdTemp(2) = cursorData(1); cursorData = cdTemp; clear cdTemp end for nCursor = 1:2 evtIdx1 = find(ismember([app.handles.EEG.event.latency], [cursorData{nCursor}(1)])); % find matching latency if length(evtIdx1) > 1 % check duration to make sure you have the matching event for nEvt = evtIdx1 evtIdx2 = find(ismember([app.handles.EEG.event.duration], [app.handles.EEG.event(evtIdx1).duration])); % find matching duration evtIdx(nCursor) = intersect(evtIdx1,evtIdx2); end else % there is only one match for that latency, so that must be the one evtIdx(nCursor) = evtIdx1; end end if ~isempty(evtIdx) app.handles.EEG.event(evtIdx(1)).duration = app.handles.EEG.event(evtIdx(2)).latency + app.handles.EEG.event(evtIdx(2)).duration - app.handles.EEG.event(evtIdx(1)).latency; % calculate new event duration for first event app.handles.EEG.event(evtIdx(2)) = []; % delete original 2nd event end app.handles.stageData.events = app.handles.EEG.event; stageData = app.handles.stageData; save(app.handles.stageFileIN, 'stageData'); app.handles = rmfield(app.handles, 'recPosition'); % clear cache of any previous event selections app.handles = rmfield(app.handles, 'curPosition'); % clear cache of any previous event selections app.handles = rmfield(app.handles, 'recLabel'); % clear cache of any previous event selections curX = xlim(app.traces); range = fix(curX(1):curX(2)); plotSleepData(app, range); saveON(app); end end returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Value changed function: numEpochs function numEpochs_B_Callback(app, event) if app.numEpochs.Value > 1 winSize = str2double(app.handles.winIN); srate = app.handles.EEG.srate; curX = xlim(app.traces); range = fix(curX(1):curX(1)+(winSize*srate*app.numEpochs.Value)-1); plotSleepData(app, range); else winSize = str2double(app.handles.winIN); srate = app.handles.EEG.srate; curX = xlim(app.traces); range = fix(curX(1):curX(1)+(winSize*srate)-1); plotSleepData(app, range); end end
% Value changed function: allChannelsMode function allChannelsMode_B_Callback(app, event) returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Key press function: CountingSheepMain function CountingSheepMainKeyPress_Callback(app, event) if isfield(app.handles, 'EEG') % process keypresses c = str2double(event.Key); if (~isempty(c) && c >= 0 && c <= 4) % sleep stage if (app.numEpochs.Value == 1 || strcmp(app.markStr.Enable, 'off')) && isempty(app.handles.scrollMode) app = updateStage(app, c); arrowRight_B_Callback(app, event); saveON(app); end elseif strcmp(event.Key, 'period') % unscored if (app.numEpochs.Value == 1 || strcmp(app.markStr.Enable, 'off')) && isempty(app.handles.scrollMode) app = updateStage(app, 5); arrowRight_B_Callback(app, event); saveON(app); end elseif strcmp(event.Key, 'leftarrow') arrowLeft_B_Callback(app, event); elseif strcmp(event.Key, 'rightarrow') arrowRight_B_Callback(app, event); elseif strcmp(event.Key, 'backspace') % delete event delMark_B_Callback(app, event); saveON(app); end end end
% Button pushed function: scroll function scroll_B_Callback(app, event) arrowRight_B_Callback(app, event); returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Button pushed function: arrowLeft_B function arrowLeft_B_Callback(app, event) % scroll left (back) from button push winSize = str2double(app.handles.winIN); srate = app.handles.EEG.srate; curX = xlim(app.traces); if ~isempty(app.handles.scrollMode) % previsouly in scroll mode app.Wake_B.Enable = 'on'; app.NREM1_B.Enable = 'on'; app.NREM2_B.Enable = 'on'; app.SWS_B.Enable = 'on'; app.REM_B.Enable = 'on'; newX = app.handles.scrollMode; else newX = [curX(1) - winSize*srate, curX(1) - 1]; end if app.numEpochs.Value > 1 && isempty(app.handles.scrollMode) % if in multi-epoch mode & not scroll mode range = fix(newX(1) - winSize*srate*(app.numEpochs.Value-1):newX(2)); elseif app.numEpochs.Value > 1 && ~isempty(app.handles.scrollMode) % if in multi-epoch mode & scroll mode range = fix(newX(1):newX(2)); app.handles.scrollMode = []; app.numEpochs.Editable = "on"; app.numEpochs.Enable = "on"; else range = fix(newX(1):newX(2)); app.handles.scrollMode = []; app.numEpochs.Editable = "on"; app.numEpochs.Enable = "on"; end if ~any(range<0) % plot only if not moving before start of recording plotSleepData(app, range); end returnFocus2Figure(app); end
