% Button pushed function: arrowRight_B function arrowRight_B_Callback(app, event) % scroll right (forward) from button push winSize = str2double(app.handles.winIN); srate = app.handles.EEG.srate; curX = xlim(app.traces); % determine if advancing 1 epoch or scrolling by 1 second if isprop(event, 'Key') if strcmp(event.Key, 'rightarrow') || strcmp(event.Key, 'period') || str2double(event.Key) >= 0 && str2double(event.Key) <= 4 % advance one epoch app.Wake_B.Enable = 'on'; app.NREM1_B.Enable = 'on'; app.NREM2_B.Enable = 'on'; app.SWS_B.Enable = 'on'; app.REM_B.Enable = 'on'; if ~isempty(app.handles.scrollMode) % previsouly in scroll mode curX = app.handles.scrollMode; newX = [curX(2) + 1, curX(2) + winSize*srate]; app.handles.scrollMode = []; else newX = [curX(2) + 1, curX(2) + winSize*srate]; end end elseif isprop(event, 'EventName') if strcmp(event.EventName, 'ButtonPushed') && strcmp(event.Source.Text, '>') || strcmp(event.EventName, 'ToolClicked') % advance 1 second app.Wake_B.Enable = 'off'; app.NREM1_B.Enable = 'off'; app.NREM2_B.Enable = 'off'; app.SWS_B.Enable = 'off'; app.REM_B.Enable = 'off'; if ~isempty(app.handles.scrollMode) % already in scroll mode if curX(2) < app.handles.scrollMode(2) + (winSize-1)*srate % don't exceed 1 epoch advance in 1 sec scroll mode newX = [curX(1) + 1*srate, curX(2) + 1*srate]; else % advance 1 epoch newX = [app.handles.scrollMode(2) + 1, app.handles.scrollMode(2) + winSize*srate]; app.handles.scrollMode = []; end elseif isempty(app.handles.scrollMode) % start scroll mode newX = [curX(1) + 1*srate, curX(2) + 1*srate]; % advance 1 second app.handles.scrollMode = curX; % keep record of curX before scrolling by 1 sec end elseif strcmp(event.EventName, 'ButtonPushed') && strcmp(event.Source.Text, '>>') || strcmp(event.Source.Text, 'Wake') || strcmp(event.Source.Text, 'N1') || strcmp(event.Source.Text, 'N2') || strcmp(event.Source.Text, 'SWS') || strcmp(event.Source.Text, 'REM') % advance 1 epoch if ~isempty(app.handles.scrollMode) % previsouly in scroll mode curX = app.handles.scrollMode; newX = [curX(2) + 1, curX(2) + winSize*srate]; app.handles.scrollMode = []; else newX = [curX(2) + 1, curX(2) + winSize*srate]; end end end % now advance by either 1 epoch, or scroll 1 second if app.numEpochs.Value > 1 && isempty(app.handles.scrollMode) % if in multi-epoch mode & scroll mode range = fix(newX(1):newX(2)+winSize*srate*(app.numEpochs.Value-1)); else range = fix(newX(1):newX(2)); end if ~any(range>app.handles.EEG.pnts) % plot only if not moving beyond end of recording plotSleepData(app, range); if isempty(app.handles.scrollMode) app.numEpochs.Editable = "on"; app.numEpochs.Enable = "on"; else app.numEpochs.Editable = "off"; app.numEpochs.Enable = "off"; end end returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Button pushed function: Wake_B function Wake_B_Callback(app, event) % score Wake if isempty(app.handles.scrollMode) app = updateStage(app, 0); arrowRight_B_Callback(app, event); saveON(app); returnFocus2Figure(app); end end
% Button pushed function: NREM1_B function NREM1_B_Callback(app, event) % score NREM1 if isempty(app.handles.scrollMode) app = updateStage(app, 1); arrowRight_B_Callback(app, event); saveON(app); returnFocus2Figure(app); end end
% Button pushed function: NREM2_B function NREM2_B_Callback(app, event) % score NREM2 if isempty(app.handles.scrollMode) app = updateStage(app, 2); arrowRight_B_Callback(app, event); saveON(app); returnFocus2Figure(app); end end
% Button pushed function: SWS_B function SWS_B_Callback(app, event) % score SWS if isempty(app.handles.scrollMode) app = updateStage(app, 3); arrowRight_B_Callback(app, event); saveON(app); returnFocus2Figure(app); end end
% Button pushed function: REM_B function REM_B_Callback(app, event) % score REM if isempty(app.handles.scrollMode) app = updateStage(app, 4); arrowRight_B_Callback(app, event); saveON(app); returnFocus2Figure(app); end end
% Menu selected function: newMontage_m function newMontage_m_Callback(app, event) % Create a new montage from user input if ischar(event) app.handles.userRecStartFormat = event; end if strcmp(app.handles.userRecStartFormat, 'yyyy-mm-dd HH:MM:SS.FFF') % old format? app.handles.userRecStartFormat = 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'; % update with datetime compatible time format end % Call app to get montage settings defStages = [app.handles.userStageNames{1} ' ' app.handles.userStageNames{2} ' ' app.handles.userStageNames{3} ' ' app.handles.userStageNames{4} ' ' app.handles.userStageNames{5} ' ' app.handles.userStageNames{6}]; defChannels = ''; updated = logical([0 0 0 0 0 0 0]); if isfield(app.handles, 'EEG') app.montageEditorData = montageEditor(app, app.handles.EEG); % call montage editor app else app.montageEditorData = montageEditor(app); % call montage editor app end waitfor(app.montageEditorData); % processs output if isfield(app.montageEditorData,'StageNames') if ~isempty(app.montageEditorData.StageNames) if length(strsplit(app.montageEditorData.StageNames,' ')) == 6 % make sure the input has the right number of elements if ~strcmp(defStages, app.montageEditorData.StageNames) % check if the input was updated / different from default current app.handles.userStageNames = strsplit(app.montageEditorData.StageNames,' ')'; updated(1) = 1; end else returnFocus2Figure(app); choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['Incorrect number of sleep stage labels.' newline newline 'There must be 6 stage labels:' newline 'e.g., W N1 N2 SWS REM Unscored.'],'Missing Entry','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); return end end else return end if ~isempty(app.montageEditorData.EpochDuration) if ~strcmp(app.handles.winIN, app.montageEditorData.EpochDuration) app.handles.winIN = app.montageEditorData.EpochDuration; updated(2) = 1; end end if ~isempty(app.montageEditorData.LightsOff) if ~strcmp(app.handles.userlightsOFFtag, app.montageEditorData.LightsOff) app.handles.userlightsOFFtag = app.montageEditorData.LightsOff; updated(3) = 1; end end if ~isempty(app.montageEditorData.LightsOn) if ~strcmp(app.handles.userlightsONtag, app.montageEditorData.LightsOn) app.handles.userlightsONtag = app.montageEditorData.LightsOn; updated(4) = 1; end end if ~isempty(app.montageEditorData.RecordingStart) if ~strcmp(app.handles.userRecStartFormat, app.montageEditorData.RecordingStart) app.handles.userRecStartFormat = app.montageEditorData.RecordingStart; updated(5) = 1; end end if ~isempty(app.montageEditorData.ChannelList) if any(~strcmp(defChannels, app.montageEditorData.ChannelList)) app.handles.userChannelLabels = flip(app.montageEditorData.ChannelList)'; updated(6) = 1; end end if ~isempty(app.montageEditorData.ChannelColours) if any(~strcmp(app.handles.userChannelColors, flip(app.montageEditorData.ChannelColours))) app.handles.userChannelColors = flip(app.montageEditorData.ChannelColours); updated(7) = 1; end end % save as new montage if any(updated) dlgTitle = 'Montage Updated'; dlgQuestion = ['Montage updated.' newline newline 'Would you like to save it as a new montage?']; choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,dlgQuestion,dlgTitle,'Options',{'Yes','No'}); if strcmp(choice,'Yes') prompt = {['Enter suffix for study name:',newline]}; dlgtitle = 'Save new montage'; dims = [1 50]; definput = {'NewSleepStudy'}; FileSuffix = inputdlg(prompt,dlgtitle,dims,definput); FileSuffix = FileSuffix{:}; FileSuffix(~isstrprop(FileSuffix,'alphanum')) = '_'; % get rid of non alphanumeric characters returnFocus2Figure(app); scriptname = ['sleep_montage_' FileSuffix '.m']; createMontage(app,scriptname); app.plotSleepIN.Value = scriptname(1:end-2); plotFCN = app.plotSleepIN.Items; boxInd = ismember(plotFCN, app.plotSleepIN.Value); eval([plotFCN{boxInd}, '(app);']); % calls study-specific montage plotSleepIN_Callback(app, event); else return end clear dlgTitle dlgQuestion choice prompt dlgtitle dims definput FileSuffix scriptname out end clear updated returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Menu selected function: deleteMontage_m function deleteMontage_m_Callback(app, event) % delete an existing montage file sleepPath = which('countingSheepPSG'); montageNames = dir(fullfile([fileparts(sleepPath) filesep 'montages'])); montages = []; if any(contains({montageNames(:).name},'_montage','IgnoreCase',1)) montageIdx = find(contains({montageNames(:).name},'_montage','IgnoreCase',1)); for idx=1:length(montageIdx) montages{idx} = montageNames(montageIdx(idx)).name; end if any(contains(montages,'sleep_montage_default','IgnoreCase',1)) % don't list default montage montageIdx = contains(montages,'sleep_montage_default','IgnoreCase',1); montages(montageIdx) = []; end else choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['No montage files found.' newline newline 'Requires at least one montage m-file using the word ''montage'' in the filename. If default montage has been modified or deleted, please reinstall Counting Sheep PSG.'],'No Montage Found','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); return end clear idx montageIdx % create list box [idx,tf] = listdlg('PromptString','Select a montage to delete:','ListString',montages,'ListSize',[250,250],'SelectionMode','single'); if tf == 1 montageIdx = find(matches({montageNames(:).name},montages(idx))); recycle('on'); delete([montageNames(montageIdx).folder filesep montageNames(montageIdx).name]); if strcmp(montageNames(montageIdx).name(1:end-2), app.plotSleepIN.Value) % check if deleting current montage app.plotSleepIN.Value = 'sleep_montage_default'; plotSleepIN_Callback(app, event); end end updateMontageList(app); returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Menu selected function: importEDFeeglab_m, importEDFmatlab_m function importEDF_m_Callback(app, event) clearDataset_m_Callback(app, event); % import EDF dataset if isfield(app.handles,'EEG') app.fileSelectData = fileSelect(app, app.handles.EEG.filepath, app.handles.EEG.setname, 'edf'); else app.fileSelectData = fileSelect(app, '', '', 'edf'); end waitfor(app.fileSelectData); if isempty(app.filename) returnFocus2Figure(app); return end % file name for countingSheep scoring data (*.mat) file timeStamp = strrep(strrep(char(datetime("now")),' ','-'),':','-'); app.handles.stageFileIN = fullfile([app.filepath filesep],[app.filename(1:end-4),'_' timeStamp '.mat']); progress = uiprogressdlg(app.CountingSheepMain,'Title','Importing EDF','Message','Reading EDF file. This might take a while...','Indeterminate','on'); pause(.5); if strcmp(event.Source.Tag, 'importEDFmatlab_m') % USE MATLAB IMPORTER - VERY SLOW, BUT EFFECTIVE % create a new empty dataset structure app.handles.EEG = eeg_emptyset; % import EDF file [hdr, record] = cspsg_edfread2013([app.filepath filesep app.filename]); % take only channels at the same sampling rate as EEG srate = max(hdr.samples); % use max srate, normally EEG if ~all(hdr.samples == srate) choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Selecting only channels with same sampling rate as EEG.','Differing sampling rates','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); end chidx = hdr.samples == srate; data = record(chidx,:); % setup basic dataset header info app.handles.EEG.setname = app.filename(1:end-4); app.handles.EEG.filename = strrep(app.filename,'edf','set'); app.handles.EEG.filepath = [app.filepath filesep]; app.handles.EEG.data = data; app.handles.EEG.srate = srate; % take the srate for the EEG channels app.handles.EEG.times = (1:length(app.handles.EEG.data))/app.handles.EEG.srate; app.handles.EEG.trials = 1; app.handles.EEG.nbchan = size(app.handles.EEG.data,1); app.handles.EEG.pnts = size(app.handles.EEG.data,2); app.handles.EEG.xmin = app.handles.EEG.times(1); app.handles.EEG.xmax = app.handles.EEG.times(end); try recStart = char(datetime([replace(hdr.startdate,'.','-') ' ' replace(hdr.starttime,'.',':') '.000'], 'Inputformat', 'dd-MM-yy HH:mm:ss.SSS'),'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'); % recording start date and time if isempty(app.handles.EEG.comments) app.handles.EEG.comments = recStart; end catch warning('No recording start found in EDF') end app.handles.EEG.chanlocs = struct('labels', hdr.label(chidx)); elseif strcmp(event.Source.Tag, 'importEDFeeglab_m') % USE EEGLAB IMPORTER; DEFAULT & FAST bioSigPath = which('pop_biosig'); if ~isempty(bioSigPath) app.handles.EEG.setname = app.filename(1:end-4); app.handles.EEG = pop_biosig([app.filepath filesep app.filename], 'importevent','off','importannot','off'); % import edf using EEGLAB, no popup app.handles.EEG.filename = strrep(app.filename,'edf','set'); app.handles.EEG.filepath = [app.filepath filesep]; if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.etc.T0) % if possible, default for EEGLAB import to put this here try recStart = char(datetime(app.handles.EEG.etc.T0), 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'); if isempty(app.handles.EEG.comments) app.handles.EEG.comments = recStart; end catch warning('No recording start found in EDF') end else if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.comments) if ischar(app.handles.EEG.comments) try recStart = app.handles.EEG.comments; catch warning('No recording start found in EDF') end end end end else choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'BioSig toolbox not installed in EEGLAB','Missing Toolbox','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return end end % insert recording start marker progress.Value = 1/3; progress.Message = 'Creating markers...'; pause(1); if ischar(recStart) app.handles.EEG.event(1).type = recStart; app.handles.EEG.event(1).latency = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(1).duration = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(1).channel = ''; app.handles.EEG.event(1).urevent = 1; end % insert lights on marker at start of recording app.handles.EEG.event(2).type = 'Lights Off'; app.handles.EEG.event(2).latency = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(2).duration = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(2).channel = ''; app.handles.EEG.event(2).urevent = 2; % insert lights off marker at end of recording app.handles.EEG.event(3).type = 'Lights On'; app.handles.EEG.event(3).latency = app.handles.EEG.pnts; app.handles.EEG.event(3).duration = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(3).channel = ''; app.handles.EEG.event(3).urevent = 3; % check everything app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkchanlocs(app.handles.EEG); app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG); % create new montage, based on channel info and defaults progress.Value = 2/3; progress.Message = 'Creating new montage...'; pause(1); app.handles.userStageNames = app.handles.userStageNames; % default app.handles.winIN = '30'; % default app.handles.userlightsOFFtag = 'Lights Off'; % default app.handles.userlightsONtag = 'Lights On'; % default app.handles.userRecStartFormat = 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'; % default app.handles.userChannelLabels = flip({app.handles.EEG.chanlocs(:).labels}'); % based on EDF colors(1:length({app.handles.EEG.chanlocs.labels})) = 'k'; % all black. boring! app.handles.userChannelColors = flip(colors); createMontage(app,'sleep_montage_EDF_import.m'); app.plotSleepIN.Value = 'sleep_montage_EDF_import'; progress.Value = 3/3; progress.Message = 'EDF import complete'; pause(1); close(progress); % load the new dataset saveDatasetAs_m_Callback(app); clearSet = 0; noPopUp = 1; loadNewDataset(app,clearSet,noPopUp); clear colors clearSet noPopUp srate chidx data prompt dlgtitle dims definput menuItemsON(app); saveOFF(app); curX = xlim(app.traces); range = fix(curX(1):curX(2)); plotSleepData(app, range); end
% Menu selected function: importBrainProducts_m function importBrainProducts_m_Callback(app, event) bvPath = which('pop_loadbv'); if ~isempty(bvPath) clearDataset_m_Callback(app, event); % import Brain Products dataset bpFields = {'bvtime','bvmknum','visible','code'}; % Specify Brain Products event fields to remove. Default: Yes = {'bvtime','bvmknum','visible','code'}, No = []. % select Brain Products dataset if isfield(app.handles,'EEG') app.fileSelectData = fileSelect(app, app.handles.EEG.filepath, app.handles.EEG.setname, 'vhdr'); else app.fileSelectData = fileSelect(app, '', '', 'vhdr'); end waitfor(app.fileSelectData); if isempty(app.filename) returnFocus2Figure(app); return end % file name for countingSheep scoring data (*.mat) file timeStamp = strrep(strrep(char(datetime("now")),' ','-'),':','-'); app.handles.stageFileIN = fullfile([app.filepath filesep],[app.filename(1:end-5),'_' timeStamp '.mat']); % load Brain Products dataset progress = uiprogressdlg(app.CountingSheepMain,'Title','Importing Brain Products','Message','Reading Brain Products file. This might take a while...'); pause(.5); EEGtemp = pop_loadbv([app.filepath filesep], app.filename); progress.Value = 1/4; progress.Message = 'Creating header...'; pause(1); EEGtemp.setname = app.filename(1:end-5); EEGtemp.filename = [EEGtemp.setname '.set']; EEGtemp.filepath = [app.filepath filesep]; EEGtemp.data = double(EEGtemp.data); % fixes some issues with import process EEGtemp.times = (1:length(EEGtemp.data))/EEGtemp.srate; EEGtemp.xmin = EEGtemp.times(1); EEGtemp.xmax = EEGtemp.times(end); progress.Value = 2/4; progress.Message = 'Importing markers...'; pause(1); if ~isempty(EEGtemp.event) EEGtemp.event = rmfield(EEGtemp.event,bpFields); % remove Brain Products specific fields evtIdx = find(strcmp({EEGtemp.event.type}, 'empty')); % remove unecessary BP events called 'empty' EEGtemp.event(evtIdx) = []; evtIdx = find(strcmp({EEGtemp.event.type}, 'boundary')); % remove unecessary BP events called 'boundary' EEGtemp.event(evtIdx) = []; elseif isempty(EEGtemp.event) % Well... that's awkward. Nothing really to do here. So, how's your day going so far? end % set the original event info EEGtemp.urevent = EEGtemp.event; % check updated dataset EEGtemp = eeg_checkset(EEGtemp); EEGtemp = eeg_checkset(EEGtemp, 'eventconsistency'); EEGtemp = eeg_checkset(EEGtemp, 'makeur'); EEGtemp = eeg_checkset(EEGtemp, 'checkur'); app.handles.EEG = EEGtemp; % create new montage, based on channel info and defaults prompt = {['Enter name for new montage:',newline]}; dlgtitle = 'Save new montage for Brain Products import'; dims = [1 50]; definput = {'BP_import'}; scriptname = inputdlg(prompt,dlgtitle,dims,definput); returnFocus2Figure(app); if isempty(scriptname{:}) choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Name for new montage required','Missing Input'); waitfor(choice); scriptname = inputdlg(prompt,dlgtitle,dims,definput,opts); returnFocus2Figure(app); end progress.Value = 3/4; progress.Message = 'Creating new montage...'; pause(1); scriptname = ['sleep_montage_' scriptname{:}]; alphanum = ~isstrprop(scriptname, 'alphanum'); scriptname(alphanum) = '_'; app.handles.userStageNames = app.handles.userStageNames; % default app.handles.winIN = '30'; % default app.handles.userlightsOFFtag = 'Lights Off'; % default app.handles.userlightsONtag = 'Lights On'; % default app.handles.userRecStartFormat = 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'; % default app.handles.userChannelLabels = flip({app.handles.EEG.chanlocs(:).labels}'); % based on import colors(1:length({app.handles.EEG.chanlocs.labels})) = 'k'; % all black. boring! app.handles.userChannelColors = flip(colors); createMontage(app,[scriptname '.m']); app.plotSleepIN.Value = scriptname; progress.Value = 4/4; progress.Message = 'Brain Products import complete'; pause(1); close(progress); % load new dataset saveDatasetAs_m_Callback(app); clearSet = 0; noPopUp = 1; loadNewDataset(app,clearSet,noPopUp); clear EEGtemp colors clearSet noPopUp evtIdx scriptname prompt dlgtitle dims definput menuItemsON(app); saveOFF(app); curX = xlim(app.traces); range = fix(curX(1):curX(2)); plotSleepData(app, range); else choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'BVA-io for Brain Vision toolbox not installed in EEGLAB','Missing Toolbox','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return end end
% Menu selected function: ImportSleepStagesMat_m function importSleepStagesMat_m_Callback(app, event) if isfield(app.handles,'EEG') app.fileSelectData = fileSelect(app, app.handles.EEG.filepath, app.handles.EEG.setname, 'mat'); else app.fileSelectData = fileSelect(app, '', '', 'mat'); end waitfor(app.fileSelectData); if isempty(app.filename) returnFocus2Figure(app); return end load([app.filepath filesep app.filename], 'stageData'); if exist('stageData','var') f1 = fieldnames(stageData); f2 = fieldnames(app.handles.stageData); if isequal(f1,f2) % imported stageData matches requirementes if stageData.win ~= app.handles.stageData.win choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Incorrect epoch length','Import Error','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return elseif stageData.srate ~= app.handles.stageData.srate choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Incorrect sampling rate','Import Error','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return elseif length(stageData.stages) ~= length(app.handles.stageData.stages) choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Incorrect number of stages','Import Error','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return elseif length(stageData.onsets) ~= length(app.handles.stageData.onsets) choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Incorrect number of onsets','Import Error','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return elseif length(stageData.stageTime) ~= length(app.handles.stageData.stageTime) choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Incorrect number of stage times','Import Error','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return else % everything checks out app.handles.stageData.stages = stageData.stages; runPlot(app); saveON(app); returnFocus2Figure(app); end else choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Not a valid Counting Sheep PSG format mat file','Import Error','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return end else choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Not a valid Counting Sheep PSG format mat file','Import Error','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return end end
% Menu selected function: ImportEventsMat_m function importEventsMat_m_Callback(app, event) if isfield(app.handles,'EEG') app.fileSelectData = fileSelect(app, app.handles.EEG.filepath, app.handles.EEG.setname, 'mat'); else app.fileSelectData = fileSelect(app, '', '', 'mat'); end waitfor(app.fileSelectData); if isempty(app.filename) returnFocus2Figure(app); return end load([app.filepath filesep app.filename], 'stageData'); if exist('stageData','var') f1 = fieldnames(stageData); f2 = fieldnames(app.handles.stageData); if isequal(f1,f2) % imported stageData matches requirementes if stageData.srate ~= app.handles.stageData.srate choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Incorrect sampling rate','Import Error','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return else % everything checks out if isempty(app.handles.stageData.events) % this is pretty much impossible, but we should check anyways app.handles.EEG.event = stageData.events; app.handles.stageData.events = stageData.events; else % in this case, EEG.event are not empty % ask if you want to merge or overwrite events dlgTitle = 'Import Events'; dlgQuestion = ['Do you want to merge imported events with existing events, or overwrite existing events?' newline newline 'Only events that are not sleep stages will be imported.']; choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,dlgQuestion,dlgTitle,'Options',{'Merge','Overwrite','Cancel'}); if strcmp(choice,'Overwrite') overwrite = 1; clearSet = 0; getEvents(app, stageData, clearSet, overwrite); elseif strcmp(choice,'Merge') overwrite = 0; clearSet = 0; getEvents(app, stageData, clearSet, overwrite); else return end curX = xlim(app.traces); range = fix(curX(1):curX(2)); plotSleepData(app, range); stageData = app.handles.stageData; save(app.handles.stageFileIN, 'stageData'); saveON(app); returnFocus2Figure(app); end end else choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Not a valid Counting Sheep PSG format mat file','Import Error','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return end else choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Not a valid Counting Sheep PSG format mat file','Import Error','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return end end
% Menu selected function: loadDataset_m function loadDataset_m_Callback(app, event) % validate recStart time format validDate(app); % load an existing EEGlab dataset markMode_Off_t_Callback(app); cursorModeOff_t_Callback(app); menuItemsON(app); clearSet = 0; noPopUp = 0; loadNewDataset(app,clearSet,noPopUp); % handle ICA menu and toolbar items if isfield(app.handles, 'EEG') if isfield(app.handles.EEG, 'icaact') if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.icaact) app.ICA_m.Enable = "on"; % enable main menu app.ICA_t.Enable = "on"; % enable display ICA toolbar button app.displayICA_m.Enable = "on"; % enable menu item to display ICA app.deleteICA_m.Enable = "on"; % enable menu item to remove component else app.ICA_t.Enable = "off"; % disable display ICA toolbar button app.displayICA_m.Enable = "off"; % disable menu item to display ICA app.deleteICA_m.Enable = "off"; % disable menu item to remove component end else app.ICA_t.Enable = "off"; % disable display ICA toolbar button app.displayICA_m.Enable = "off"; % disable menu item to display ICA app.deleteICA_m.Enable = "off"; % disable menu item to remove component end else app.ICA_t.Enable = "off"; % disable display ICA toolbar button app.displayICA_m.Enable = "off"; % disable menu item to display ICA app.deleteICA_m.Enable = "off"; % disable menu item to remove component end end
% Menu selected function: saveDataset_m function saveDataset_m_Callback(app, event) % save current dataset without popup saveAs = 0; saveDataset(app,saveAs); saveOFF(app); end
% Menu selected function: saveDatasetAs_m function saveDatasetAs_m_Callback(app, event) % save current dataset as new file saveAs = 1; saveDataset(app,saveAs); saveOFF(app); end
% Menu selected function: editSetname_m function editSetname_m_Callback(app, event) prompt = {['Current Setname: ' app.handles.EEG.setname newline]}; dlgtitle = 'Edit Setname'; definput = {app.handles.EEG.setname}; dims = [1 100]; out = inputdlg(prompt,dlgtitle,dims,definput); if ~isempty(out) app.handles.EEG.setname = out{:}; app.handles.EEG.filename = [app.handles.EEG.setname '.set']; app.filename = app.handles.EEG.filename; app.dataset_S.Text = app.handles.EEG.setname; % save current dataset as new file saveAs = 1; saveDataset(app,saveAs); saveOFF(app); end end
% Menu selected function: generateSleepReport_m function generateSleepReport_m_Callback(app, event) % generate a sleep architecture report in Excel (useful for stats) if isfield(app.handles, 'EEG') if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.data) completed = cspsg_generateSleepReport(app); else if isfield(app.handles,'EEG') app.fileSelectData = fileSelect(app, app.handles.EEG.filepath, app.handles.EEG.setname, 'mat', 'multiselect','on'); else app.fileSelectData = fileSelect(app, '', '', 'mat', 'multiselect','on'); end waitfor(app.fileSelectData); if isempty(app.filename) returnFocus2Figure(app); return end completed = cspsg_generateSleepReport(app,app.filename,app.filepath); end else if isfield(app.handles,'EEG') app.fileSelectData = fileSelect(app, app.handles.EEG.filepath, app.handles.EEG.setname, 'mat', 'multiselect','on'); else app.fileSelectData = fileSelect(app, '', '', 'mat', 'multiselect','on'); end waitfor(app.fileSelectData); if isempty(app.filename) returnFocus2Figure(app); return end completed = cspsg_generateSleepReport(app,app.filename,app.filepath); end if completed == 1 choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Sleep report generated.','Sleep Report','Icon','success'); waitfor(choice); end end
% Menu selected function: generateEventReport_m function generateEventReport_m_Callback(app, event) % generate a list of events and summary info in Excel (useful for stats) events = struct2table(app.handles.EEG.event); events.urevent = []; evtType = unique({app.handles.EEG.event.type}); for nEvtType = 1:length(evtType) evtIdx = find(strcmp(events.type,evtType{nEvtType})); count(nEvtType) = length(evtIdx); duration(nEvtType) = mean(events.duration(evtIdx)); clear evtIdx end summary.type = evtType'; summary.count = count'; summary.duration = duration'; summary = struct2table(summary); writetable(summary, [app.handles.EEG.filepath app.handles.EEG.setname '_events.xlsx'],'Sheet','Summary'); writetable(events, [app.handles.EEG.filepath app.handles.EEG.setname '_events.xlsx'],'Sheet','RawData'); choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Sleep report generated.','Sleep Report','Icon','success'); waitfor(choice); end
% Menu selected function: generateHypnogram_m function generateHypnogram_m_Callback(app, event) % generate a hypnogram (useful for... looking at sleep architecture) stageLabels = app.handles.userStageNames; % labels of sleep stage epoch, default: {{'W'},{'REM'},{'N1'},{'N2'},{'SWS'},{'Unscored'}}. NOTE: order important for plotting stages = app.handles.stageData.stages; % recode to plot stageRecode(stages == 0) = 1; stageRecode(stages == 1) = 3; stageRecode(stages == 2) = 4; stageRecode(stages == 3) = 5; stageRecode(stages == 4) = 2; stageRecode(stages == 5) = 6; % convert to seconds for nicer / more conventional looking hypnogram plot nRecode = 1; stages = ones(length(stageRecode)*app.handles.stageData.win,1)'; for nStage = 1:app.handles.stageData.win:length(stages) stages(nStage:nStage+app.handles.stageData.win-1) = stageRecode(nRecode); nRecode = nRecode + 1; end times = 1:1:length(stages); % plot the sleep stage data figure('units', 'normalized', 'outerposition', [0 0 1 1]); plot(times,stages, 'color',[0 0 0], 'LineWidth', 2); hold; % plot REM as thick line R = (stages == 2)*2; R(R == 0) = NaN; plot(times, R, 'color',[0 0 0], 'LineWidth', 16); % set axes ylim([min(stages)-1 max(stages)+1]); % upper and lower limits of y-axis to fit stage labels set(gca, 'YDir', 'reverse'); % reverse the y-axis yticklabels([' ', [stageLabels(1),stageLabels(5),stageLabels(2),stageLabels(3),stageLabels(4),stageLabels(6)], ' ']); % label y-axis tick marks xlim([0 times(end)]); % set upper and lower limits of x-axis to fit xticks(0:(60*60):times(end)); set(gca,'XMinorTick','on'); xticklabels(0:1:(times(end)/(60*60))); colorbar('off'); % labels title(['Hypnogram: ' app.handles.EEG.setname], 'fontweight', 'bold', 'fontsize', 16, 'Interpreter', 'none'); % figure title xlabel('Time', 'fontweight', 'bold', 'fontsize', 16); % x-axis label ylabel('Sleep Stage', 'fontweight', 'bold', 'fontsize', 16); % y-axis label set(get(gca, 'YAxis'), 'FontWeight', 'bold', 'fontsize', 16); % change font set(get(gca, 'XAxis'), 'FontWeight', 'bold', 'fontsize', 16); % change font set(gca, 'LineWidth', 2); % adjust line width % Save it saveas(gcf,[app.handles.EEG.filepath app.handles.EEG.setname '_hypnogram.png']); end
% Menu selected function: clearDataset_m function clearDataset_m_Callback(app, event) % clears current dataset without saving if app.save_t.Enable == "on" dlgTitle = 'Save changes?'; dlgQuestion = ['Warning: You have unsaved changes to the dataset.' newline newline 'Do you want to save your changes?']; choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,dlgQuestion,dlgTitle,'Options',{'Yes','No'}); returnFocus2Figure(app); if strcmp(choice,'Yes') saveDataset_m_Callback(app); end markMode_Off_t_Callback(app); cursorModeOff_t_Callback(app); menuItemsOFF(app); saveOFF(app); if isfield(app.handles, 'stageFileIN') app.handles.EEG = eeg_emptyset(); app.handles = rmfield(app.handles, 'stageFileIN'); clearSet = 1; noPopUp = 0; loadNewDataset(app,clearSet,noPopUp); end else markMode_Off_t_Callback(app); cursorModeOff_t_Callback(app); menuItemsOFF(app); saveOFF(app); if isfield(app.handles, 'stageFileIN') app.handles.EEG = eeg_emptyset(); app.handles = rmfield(app.handles, 'stageFileIN'); clearSet = 1; noPopUp = 0; loadNewDataset(app,clearSet,noPopUp); end end app.numEpochs.Value = 1; app.dataset_S.Text = 'No Dataset Loaded'; end
% Menu selected function: hideChan_m function hideChan_m_Callback(app, event) % hide a channel from user input if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.chanlocs) if ~isfield(app.handles, 'hideChans') app.handles.hideChans = {}; end channels = {app.handles.EEG.chanlocs.labels}; channels = channels(~ismember(channels,app.handles.hideChans)); [idx,~] = listdlg('PromptString','Select channel to hide', 'SelectionMode', 'multiple', 'ListString', channels, 'ListSize', [250,250]); if ~isempty(idx) for nCh = 1:length(idx) app.handles.hideChans(end + 1) = channels(idx(nCh)); end curX = xlim(app.traces); range = fix(curX(1):curX(2)); plotSleepData(app, range); end else choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Please load a dataset','No Dataset','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); return end returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Menu selected function: showChan_m function showChan_m_Callback(app, event) % show a channel from user input if isfield(app.handles, 'hideChans') if ~isempty(app.handles.hideChans) if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.chanlocs) channels = app.handles.hideChans; if ~isempty(channels) [idx,~] = listdlg('PromptString','Select channel to show', 'SelectionMode', 'multiple', 'ListString', channels, 'ListSize', [250,250]); if ~isempty(idx) for nCh = 1:length(idx) app.handles.hideChans(find(strcmp(app.handles.hideChans, channels(idx(nCh))))) = []; end curX = xlim(app.traces); range = fix(curX(1):curX(2)); plotSleepData(app, range); end end end else choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'All channels are already visible.','Show channels','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); end end returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Menu selected function: rescaleSelectedChannels_m function rescaleSelectedChannels_m_Callback(app, event) % select channel(s) to rescale if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.chanlocs) channels = {app.handles.EEG.chanlocs.labels}; [idx,~] = listdlg('PromptString','Select channel(s) to rescale', 'SelectionMode', 'multiple', 'ListString', channels, 'ListSize', [250,250]); if ~isempty(idx) prompt = {['Enter a scaling factor (0 to <1: downscale; >1 to inf: upscale; 1: reset scaling)',newline]}; dlgtitle = 'Rescale selected channels'; dims = [1 90]; definput = {'1'}; scaleFactor = inputdlg(prompt,dlgtitle,dims,definput); returnFocus2Figure(app); if isempty(scaleFactor) returnFocus2Figure(app); return end scaleFactor = str2double(scaleFactor); if ~isempty(app.handles.reScaledChannels) if any(ismember(app.handles.reScaledChannels, idx)) % if already scaled, reset scaling to 1 oldIdx = app.handles.reScaledChannels(ismember(app.handles.reScaledChannels, idx)); notOldIdx = app.handles.reScaledChannels(~ismember(app.handles.reScaledChannels, idx)); for nIdx = 1:length(oldIdx) app.handles.EEG.data(oldIdx(nIdx),:) = app.handles.EEG.data(oldIdx(nIdx),:)*1/app.handles.reScaleFactors(oldIdx(nIdx)); % undo scaling of EEG data end app.handles.reScaledChannels = sort([notOldIdx idx]); app.handles.reScaleFactors(oldIdx) = 1; % reset scaling factor end else app.handles.reScaledChannels = idx; end app.handles.reScaleFactors(idx) = scaleFactor; app.handles.EEG.data(idx,:) = app.handles.EEG.data(idx,:)*scaleFactor; curX = xlim(app.traces); range = fix(curX(1):curX(2)); plotSleepData(app, range); else returnFocus2Figure(app); return end end returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Menu selected function: setScale_m function setScale_m_Callback(app, event) % select channel to show/hide scale lines if isfield(app.handles, 'scaleChans') if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.chanlocs) channels = {app.handles.EEG.chanlocs.labels}; [idx,~] = listdlg('PromptString','Select channel to show/hide scale', 'SelectionMode', 'single', 'ListString', channels, 'ListSize', [250,250]); if ~isempty(idx) inds = find(strcmp(app.handles.scaleChans, app.handles.EEG.chanlocs(idx).labels)); if isempty(inds) app.handles.scaleChans{end + 1} = app.handles.EEG.chanlocs(idx).labels; else app.handles.scaleChans(inds) = []; end curX = xlim(app.traces); range = fix(curX(1):curX(2)); plotSleepData(app, range); end end end returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Menu selected function: zeroBadData_m function zeroBadData_mMenuSelected(app, event) events = unique({app.handles.EEG.event.type}); % zero data before lights off [idx,~] = listdlg('PromptString','Select ''Lights Off'' tag', 'SelectionMode', 'single', 'ListString', events, 'ListSize', [250,250]); if ~isempty(idx) dlgTitle = 'Confirm Clear Data'; dlgQuestion = ['WARNING: This will permanently clear data before ''Lights Off'' tag.' newline newline 'Continue?']; choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,dlgQuestion,dlgTitle,'Options',{'Yes','No'}); if strcmp(choice,'Yes') lightsOffTag = events(idx); [~,evttIdx] = pop_selectevent(app.handles.EEG,'type',lightsOffTag); evtLat = app.handles.EEG.event(evttIdx).latency; app.handles.EEG.data(:,1:evtLat) = 0; end end % zero data after lights on [idx,~] = listdlg('PromptString','Select ''Lights On'' tag', 'SelectionMode', 'single', 'ListString', events, 'ListSize', [250,250]); if ~isempty(idx) dlgTitle = 'Confirm Clear Data'; dlgQuestion = ['WARNING: This will permanently clear data after ''Lights On'' tag.' newline newline 'Continue?']; choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,dlgQuestion,dlgTitle,'Options',{'Yes','No'}); if strcmp(choice,'Yes') lightsOnTag = events(idx); [~,evttIdx] = pop_selectevent(app.handles.EEG,'type',lightsOnTag); evtLat = app.handles.EEG.event(evttIdx).latency; app.handles.EEG.data(:,evtLat:end) = 0; end end curX = xlim(app.traces); range = fix(curX(1):curX(2)); plotSleepData(app, range); saveON(app); returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Menu selected function: markChannelAsBadData_m function markChannelAsBadData_m_Callback(app, event) if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.chanlocs) channels = {app.handles.EEG.chanlocs.labels}; % create list box [idx,~] = listdlg('PromptString','Select a channel to mark as ''Bad Data:''', 'ListString', channels, 'ListSize', [250,250]); if ~isempty(idx) app.handles.EEG.event(end+1).type = 'Bad Data'; app.handles.EEG.event(end).latency = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(end).duration = app.handles.EEG.pnts-1; app.handles.EEG.event(end).channel = app.handles.EEG.chanlocs(idx).labels; app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG, 'eventconsistency'); app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG); runPlot(app); saveON(app); end end returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Menu selected function: interpolateBadChannel_m function interpolateBadChannel_m_Callback(app, event) if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.chanlocs) && isfield(app.handles.EEG.chanlocs, 'theta') && ~all(cellfun('isempty', { app.handles.EEG.chanlocs.theta })) % select bad channel to interpolate using good channels app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkchanlocs(app.handles.EEG); app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG); channels = {app.handles.EEG.chanlocs.labels}; % select bad channel(s) to interpolate [idx,~] = listdlg('PromptString','Select bad channel(s) to interpolate', 'SelectionMode', 'multiple', 'ListString', channels, 'ListSize', [400,500]); if ~isempty(idx) badCh = idx; channels = {app.handles.EEG.chanlocs.labels}; % select good channels to use to interpolate bad channel(s) [idx,~] = listdlg('PromptString','Select good channel(s) to use to interpolate bad channel(s)', 'ListString', channels, 'ListSize', [400,500]); goodCh = idx; goodCh = goodCh(~ismember(goodCh,badCh)); % take out any overlap between good and bad channels % enter time point to start interpolation (optional) srate = app.handles.stageData.srate; curWin = xlim(app.traces); startTime = app.handles.stageData.recStart + (fix(curWin(1)/srate)/86400); prompt = {['Enter time in 24-hr time format: yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS. Leave blank for none.',newline]}; dlgtitle = 'Enter Interpolation Start Time'; dims = [1 100]; definput = {char(startTime, app.handles.userRecStartFormat)}; interpStart = inputdlg(prompt,dlgtitle,dims,definput); if isempty(interpStart{:}) interpStart = 0; % if empty, start interpolation from recording start else interpStart = seconds(interpStart - app.handles.stageData.recStart); end app.handles.EEG = cspsg_eeg_interp(app.handles.EEG, badCh, goodCh, interpStart); clear idx channels badCh goodCh runPlot(app); saveON(app); else return end else dlgTitle = 'Missing Channel Information'; dlgQuestion = ['You will be prompted to either import channel info, or manually enter chanel info.' newline newline 'Do you wish to continue?']; choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,dlgQuestion,dlgTitle,'Options',{'Yes','No'}); if strcmp(choice,'Yes') editChannels_m_Callback(app, []); interpolateBadChannel_m_Callback(app); % now you can run interpolate else return end end returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Menu selected function: turnOnOffCursorDataMode_m function turnOnOffCursorDataMode_mMenuSelected(app, event) if strcmp(app.cursorMode_t.State, 'off') cursorModeOn_t_Callback(app, event); else cursorModeOff_t_Callback(app, event); end end
% Menu selected function: currentDataset_m function editChannels_m_Callback(app, event) % edit channels (e.g., channel type) using EEGlab pop_chanedit dlgTitle = 'Edit Channel warning'; dlgQuestion = ['Warning: This will alter the raw data.', 'You will have the option to save your changes.' newline newline 'Do you wish to continue?']; choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,dlgQuestion,dlgTitle,'Options',{'Yes','No'}); if strcmp(choice,'Yes') app.handles.EEG = pop_chanedit(app.handles.EEG); % create new montage, based on channel info and defaults prompt = {['Enter name for new montage:',newline]}; dlgtitle = 'Save new montage'; dims = [1 50]; definput = {'chanedit'}; scriptname = inputdlg(prompt,dlgtitle,dims,definput); returnFocus2Figure(app); if ~isempty(scriptname) scriptname = ['sleep_montage_' scriptname{:}]; alphanum = ~isstrprop(scriptname, 'alphanum'); scriptname(alphanum) = '_'; app.handles.userChannelLabels = flip({app.handles.EEG.chanlocs(:).labels}'); % based on output from reref colors(1:length({app.handles.EEG.chanlocs.labels})) = 'k'; % all black. boring! app.handles.userChannelColors = flip(colors); app.handles.userRecStartFormat = 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'; % default createMontage(app,[scriptname '.m']); app.plotSleepIN.Value = scriptname; % save new data and reload saveDatasetAs_m_Callback(app); clearSet = 0; noPopUp = 1; loadNewDataset(app,clearSet,noPopUp); clear prompt clearSet noPopUp dlgtitle dims definput scriptname colors else return end else return end clear prompt dlgTitle dlgQuestion choice returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Menu selected function: batchEditCh_m function batchEditCh_m_Callback(app, event) if ~isfield(app.handles, 'EEG') cspsg_batchEditChan(app); % call edit channel function returnFocus2Figure(app); else if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.data) dlgTitle = 'Warning!'; dlgQuestion = ['This will clear the current dataset.' newline newline 'You will be prompted to select datasets to batch process.' newline newline 'Continue?']; choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,dlgQuestion,dlgTitle,'Options',{'Yes','No'}); if strcmp(choice,'Yes') clearDataset_m_Callback(app); if isempty(app.handles.EEG.data) cspsg_batchEditChan(app); % call edit channel function returnFocus2Figure(app); else return end else return end else cspsg_batchEditChan(app); % call edit channel function returnFocus2Figure(app); end end end
% Menu selected function: batchPreprocessChannels_m function batchPreprocess_m_Callback(app, event) if ~isfield(app.handles, 'EEG') cspsg_batchPreprocess(app); % call preprocess batch function returnFocus2Figure(app); else if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.data) dlgTitle = 'Warning!'; dlgQuestion = ['This will clear the current dataset.' newline newline 'You will be prompted to select datasets to batch process.' newline newline 'Continue?']; choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,dlgQuestion,dlgTitle,'Options',{'Yes','No'}); if strcmp(choice,'Yes') clearDataset_m_Callback(app); if isempty(app.handles.EEG.data) cspsg_batchPreprocess(app); % call preprocess batch function returnFocus2Figure(app); else return end else return end else cspsg_batchPreprocess(app); % call preprocess batch function returnFocus2Figure(app); end end end
% Menu selected function: downsampleChannels_m function downsample_m_Callback(app, event) % downsample channels using EEGlab pop_resample dlgTitle = 'Downsample warning'; dlgQuestion = ['Warning: This will alter the raw data, but not automatically save changes.' newline newline 'Do you wish to continue?']; choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,dlgQuestion,dlgTitle,'Options',{'Yes','No'}); if strcmp(choice,'Yes') evtIdx = find([app.handles.EEG.event.duration] == 1); app.handles.EEG = pop_resample(app.handles.EEG); if ~isempty(evtIdx) for nEvt = evtIdx app.handles.EEG.event(nEvt).duration = 1; % when downsampling, it will turn single point events into less than 1 point, and when upsampling it will make them accordingly longer. This makes no sense. Need to fix it. end end app.handles.stageData.srate = app.handles.EEG.srate; winSize = str2double(app.handles.winIN); srate = app.handles.EEG.srate; app.handles.stageData.onsets = ((0:(length(app.handles.stageData.stages) - 1)).*winSize*srate)+1; app.handles.stageData.stageTime = (0:(length(app.handles.stageData.stages) - 1))./(60/winSize); app.handles.stageData.events = app.handles.EEG.event; runPlot(app); saveON(app); else return end clear dlgTitle dlgQuestion choice returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Menu selected function: rereferenceChannels_m function rereference_m_Callback(app, event) % re-reference channels using EEGlab pop_reref dlgTitle = 'Rereference warning'; dlgQuestion = ['Warning: This will alter the raw data.', 'You will have the option to save your changes.' newline newline 'Do you wish to continue?']; choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,dlgQuestion,dlgTitle,'Options',{'Yes','No'}); if strcmp(choice,'Yes') app.handles.EEG = pop_reref(app.handles.EEG); % create new montage, based on channel info and defaults prompt = {['Enter name for new montage:',newline]}; dlgtitle = 'Save new montage'; dims = [1 50]; definput = {'reref'}; scriptname = inputdlg(prompt,dlgtitle,dims,definput); returnFocus2Figure(app); scriptname = ['sleep_montage_' scriptname{:}]; alphanum = ~isstrprop(scriptname, 'alphanum'); scriptname(alphanum) = '_'; app.handles.userChannelLabels = flip({app.handles.EEG.chanlocs(:).labels}'); % based on output from reref colors(1:length({app.handles.EEG.chanlocs.labels})) = 'k'; % all black. boring! app.handles.userChannelColors = flip(colors); app.handles.userRecStartFormat = 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS'; % default createMontage(app,[scriptname '.m']); app.plotSleepIN.Value = scriptname; % save new data and reload saveDatasetAs_m_Callback(app); clearSet = 0; noPopUp = 1; loadNewDataset(app,clearSet,noPopUp); clear prompt clearSet noPopUp dlgtitle dims definput scriptname colors else return end clear prompt dlgTitle dlgQuestion choice returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Menu selected function: filterChannels_m function filter_m_Callback(app, event) % filter channels using EEGlab pop_eegfiltnew dlgTitle = 'Filter warning'; dlgQuestion = ['Warning: This will alter the raw data, but not automatically save changes.' newline newline 'Do you wish to continue?']; choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,dlgQuestion,dlgTitle,'Options',{'Yes','No'}); if strcmp(choice,'Yes') returnFocus2Figure(app); progress = uiprogressdlg(app.CountingSheepMain,'Title','Filtering Dataset','Indeterminate','on'); app.handles.EEG = pop_eegfiltnew(app.handles.EEG); runPlot(app); saveON(app); close(progress); else return end clear dlgTitle dlgQuestion choice returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Menu selected function: ASR_m function ASR_m_Callback(app, event) asrPath = which('clean_rawdata'); if isempty(asrPath) choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['''clean_rawdata'' EEGlab pluging not found.' newline newline 'Please install/update ''clean_rawdata'' EEGlab plugin.'],'Missing EEGLAB Plugin','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); else saveDataset_m_Callback(app); % This will merge events with sleep stages. Required for ASR. No pop-up. app.handles.EEG = pop_loadset('filename',app.handles.EEG.filename,'filepath',app.handles.EEG.filepath); % load the just-saved dataset, no pop-up. % select channels of interest channels = {app.handles.EEG.chanlocs.labels}; [chIdx,~] = listdlg('PromptString','Select channel(s) for ASR', 'SelectionMode', 'multiple', 'ListString', channels, 'ListSize', [250,250]); if ~isempty(chIdx) EEGasr = pop_select(app.handles.EEG,'channel',chIdx); end % select sleep stages of interest events = app.handles.userStageNames; [stageIdx,~] = listdlg('PromptString','Select sleep stages for ASR', 'SelectionMode', 'multiple', 'ListString', events, 'ListSize', [250,250]); if ~isempty(stageIdx) stageOfInterest = events(stageIdx); end clear stageIdx events % Input Dialog to get ASR cutoff value prompt = ['ASR cutoff value (Default 30-45 SD) :',newline]; dlgtitle = 'Artifact Subspace Reconstruction (ASR) cutoff'; dims = [1 75]; definput = {'30'}; answer = inputdlg(prompt,dlgtitle,dims,definput); if isempty(answer) % remove sleep stages from EEG.event structure app.handles.EEG = pop_selectevent(app.handles.EEG,'type',app.handles.userStageNames(1:6),'select','inverse','deleteevents','on'); runPlot(app); returnFocus2Figure(app); return else SD = str2double(answer{:}); end clear prompt dlgtitle dims definput answer progress = uiprogressdlg(app.CountingSheepMain,'Title','Artifact Subspace Reconstruction','Message','Running ASR Analysis...'); pause(1); % Identify start and end of stage of interest periods % convert eeglab event structure to table events = struct2table(EEGasr.event); % filter events table so that it only contains sleep stages events(~ismember(events.type,stageOfInterest),:)=[]; % run ASR on each sleep period for nStage=1:length(stageOfInterest) progress.Value = nStage/(length(stageOfInterest)+1); progress.Message = 'Running ASR processing for each sleep stage...'; pause(1); % find start and end of EEG periods stageIdx = ismember(events{:,'type'},stageOfInterest(nStage)); StartIdx = strfind([ 0 stageIdx'],[0 1]); EndIdx = strfind([stageIdx',0],[1 0]); StartPeriod = events{[StartIdx(:)],'latency'}; EndPeriod = events{[EndIdx(:)],'latency'} + events{[EndIdx(:)],'duration'} - 1; [stage{1:length(StartPeriod)}] = deal(stageOfInterest{nStage}); sleepPeriod = 1:length(StartPeriod); clear stageIdx StartIdx EndIdx % put it in a table for output sleepPeriods = table(stage',sleepPeriod(:),StartPeriod(:),EndPeriod(:),'VariableNames',{'Stage','SleepPeriod','StartPeriod','EndPeriod'}); clear StartPeriod EndPeriod stage sleepPeriod % run for each sleep period for nPer = 1:height(sleepPeriods) disp([newline 'Running ASR on stage ' stageOfInterest{nStage} ' period ' num2str(nPer) ' of ' num2str(height(sleepPeriods)) newline]) EEGtemp = pop_select(EEGasr,'point',[sleepPeriods.StartPeriod(nPer) sleepPeriods.EndPeriod(nPer)]); % select just the one period % clean_asr USAGE: Signal = clean_asr(Signal,StandardDevCutoff,WindowLength,BlockSize,MaxDimensions,ReferenceMaxBadChannels,RefTolerances,ReferenceWindowLength,UseGPU,UseRiemannian,MaxMem); try EEGtemp = clean_asr(EEGtemp,SD,3,[],[],[],[],2,[],[],[]); % call ASR function from clean_rawdata plugin catch warning([newline 'ASR skipped/failed for this section of data. Likely due to not enough clean data in baseline, re; short section of data.']) end EEGasr.data(:,sleepPeriods.StartPeriod(nPer):sleepPeriods.EndPeriod(nPer)) = EEGtemp.data(:,:); % return the ASR cleaned adat to the original end clear sleepPeriods EEGtemp end clear SD progress.Value = (nStage+1)/(length(stageOfInterest)+1); progress.Message = 'Replacing original data...'; pause(1); % replace original data with cleaned data for nCh=1:length(chIdx) app.handles.EEG.data(chIdx(nCh),:) = EEGasr.data(nCh,:); end % remove sleep stages from EEG.event structure app.handles.EEG = pop_selectevent(app.handles.EEG,'type',app.handles.userStageNames(1:6),'select','inverse','deleteevents','on'); runPlot(app); saveON(app); close(progress); end clear asrPath returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Menu selected function: runICA_m function runICA_m_Callback(app, event) % run independent component analysis on EEG signals progress = uiprogressdlg(app.CountingSheepMain,'Title','Running ICA. This can take a while.','Indeterminate','on'); app.handles.EEG = pop_runica(app.handles.EEG); saveON(app); app.ICA_m.Enable = "on"; % disable main menu app.ICA_t.Enable = "on"; % enable display ICA toolbar button app.displayICA_m.Enable = "on"; % enable menu item to display components app.deleteICA_m.Enable = "on"; % enable menu item to remove component close(progress) returnFocus2Figure(app); % save dataset dlgTitle = 'Save changes?'; dlgQuestion = ['ICA complete.' newline newline 'Do you want to save dataset?']; choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,dlgQuestion,dlgTitle,'Options',{'Yes','No'}); if strcmp(choice,'Yes') % save new data and reload saveDatasetAs_m_Callback(app); clearSet = 0; noPopUp = 1; loadNewDataset(app,clearSet,noPopUp); end app.ICA_t.State = "on"; % Call display ICA function end
% Menu selected function: displayICA_m function displayICA_m_Callback(app, event) if app.ICA_t.State == "on" app.ICA_t.State = "off"; % Call ICA off function elseif app.ICA_t.State == "off" app.ICA_t.State = "on"; % Call display ICA function end end
% Menu selected function: deleteICA_m function deleteICA_m_Callback(app, event) % Remove selected indepedent components from EEG signals if isfield(app.handles.EEG, 'icaact') if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.icaact) app.handles.EEG = pop_subcomp(app.handles.EEG); ICA_Off_t_Callback(app); saveON(app); app.ICA_m.Enable = "off"; % disable main menu app.ICA_t.Enable = "off"; % disable display ICA toolbar button app.displayICA_m.Enable = "off"; % disable menu item to display components app.deleteICA_m.Enable = "off"; % disable menu item to display components % save dataset dlgTitle = 'Save changes?'; dlgQuestion = ['ICA components removed.' newline newline 'Do you want to save dataset?']; choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,dlgQuestion,dlgTitle,'Options',{'Yes','No'}); if strcmp(choice,'Yes') % save new data and reload saveDatasetAs_m_Callback(app); clearSet = 0; noPopUp = 1; loadNewDataset(app,clearSet,noPopUp); end end end end
% Menu selected function: FFT_m function FFT_m_Callback(app, event) % Runs power spectral density (PSD) on FFT using a Hamming % window to have a better estimate for non stationary signal. % By default, uses a window of 5 seconds, for 6 windows per % 30 sec sleep stage to get a frequency resolution of 0.2Hz. % Output is in dB. saveDataset_m_Callback(app); % This will merge events with sleep stages. Required for PSD. No pop-up. EEGtemp = pop_loadset('filename',app.handles.EEG.filename,'filepath',app.handles.EEG.filepath); % load the just-saved dataset, no pop-up. % Input Dialog to get min frequency, max frequency, bad date labels, channel labels prompt = {'Minimum frequency (default 1):','Maximum Frequency (default 30):','Bad data event labels (comma-separated):','Channels to include (comma-separated):'}; dlgtitle = 'Power Spectral Density Study-Specific Parameters'; dims = [1 100]; definput = {'1','30','Movement, BadData',strjoin({EEGtemp.chanlocs.labels},', ')}; answer = inputdlg(prompt,dlgtitle,dims,definput); if isempty(answer) return else badData = {strsplit(answer{3},{', ',','})}; [~,chIdx] = ismember(strsplit(answer{4},{', ',','}),{EEGtemp.chanlocs.labels}); PARAM = struct(... 'epoch', 30, ... length in seconds of sleep stage epoch {default: 30} 'winsize', 5, ... size of FFT window in seconds {default: 5}. Use default for 6 windows per 30 sec sleep stage and a freq resolution of 0.2Hz. 'plot', 'off', ... ['on'|'off'], plot result, {default: 'off'} 'stages', {app.handles.userStageNames(1:end-1)'}, ... labels of sleep stage epoch, default: {'W','N1','N2','SWS','REM'} 'filename', app.handles.EEG.setname, ... filename from dataset 'resultDir', app.handles.EEG.filepath, ... path from dataset ... end of hard-coded parameters 'freqrange', [str2double(answer{1}) str2double(answer{2})], ... range of frequencies {default: [1 30]}. NOTE: standard PSG processing filters EEG from 0.3 to 35Hz. If so, use default to avoid edges of filters. 'baddata', badData, ... label for bad data, {default: {{'Movement'}}} 'plotchans', chIdx ... vector of channel indices to include in PSD {default: [3:5 7:9 11:14]; i.e., C3,C4,Cz,F3,F4,Fz,Oz,P3,P4,Pz} ); clear prompt dlgtitle dims definput badData chIdx answer % start with a fresh FFT structure FFT = []; % check chanlocs (needed for topoplot) FFT.chanlocs = EEGtemp.chanlocs(PARAM.plotchans); if isempty(FFT.chanlocs(1).theta) && isempty(FFT.chanlocs(1).X) && isempty(FFT.chanlocs(1).sph_theta) % no chanloc info of any kind EEGtempCHsel = EEGtemp; EEGtempCHsel = pop_select(EEGtempCHsel,'channel',PARAM.plotchans); % select only channels to process for FFT EEGtempCHsel = pop_chanedit(EEGtempCHsel); % get channel info for those channels FFT.chanlocs = EEGtempCHsel.chanlocs; end % Process The Dataset progress = uiprogressdlg(app.CountingSheepMain,'Title','Power Spectral Analysis','Message','Running PSD Analysis...'); pause(1); % find stages to epoch stageIndex = find(ismember({EEGtemp.event.type},PARAM.stages)); % find bad data badIndex = find(ismember({EEGtemp.event.type},PARAM.baddata)); % loop over bad data events to get indices for epochs with bad data progress.Value = 1/3; progress.Message = 'Removing bad data...'; pause(1); todelete = []; ndel = 1; for nbad = 1:length(badIndex) for nstage = 1:length(stageIndex) % find stage events that start during bad data if EEGtemp.event(stageIndex(nstage)).latency > EEGtemp.event(badIndex(nbad)).latency && EEGtemp.event(stageIndex(nstage)).latency < (EEGtemp.event(badIndex(nbad)).latency + EEGtemp.event(badIndex(nbad)).duration) todelete(ndel) = stageIndex(nstage); ndel = ndel + 1; end % find stage events that end during bad data if (EEGtemp.event(stageIndex(nstage)).latency + EEGtemp.event(stageIndex(nstage)).duration) > EEGtemp.event(badIndex(nbad)).latency && EEGtemp.event(stageIndex(nstage)).latency < (EEGtemp.event(badIndex(nbad)).latency + EEGtemp.event(badIndex(nbad)).duration) todelete(ndel) = stageIndex(nstage); ndel = ndel + 1; end % find stage events that have bad data during if ~isequal(EEGtemp.event(badIndex(nbad)),EEGtemp.event(1)) % if it's not the first event in the original structure if EEGtemp.event(badIndex(nbad)).latency > EEGtemp.event(stageIndex(nstage)).latency && EEGtemp.event(badIndex(nbad)).latency < EEGtemp.event(stageIndex(nstage)).latency + EEGtemp.event(stageIndex(nstage)).duration todelete(ndel) = stageIndex(nstage); ndel = ndel + 1; end end end end clear ndel nbad nstage % remove stages with bad data goodepochs = stageIndex; todelete = unique(todelete); % get unique indices, re; can be duplicates from above todelete = ismember(stageIndex, todelete); goodepochs(todelete) = []; % delete the stages from stageIndex clear todelete stageIndex badIndex % get good event info from original EEG structure type = {EEGtemp.event(goodepochs).type}; latency = {EEGtemp.event(goodepochs).latency}; duration = {EEGtemp.event(goodepochs).duration}; urevent = {EEGtemp.event(goodepochs).urevent}; FFT.event = struct('type',type, ... 'latency',latency, ... 'duration',duration, ... 'urevent',urevent ... ); clear type latency duration urevent % epoch only good data (e.g., movement-free), according to sleep stage try EEGtemp = pop_epoch(EEGtemp, PARAM.stages, [0 PARAM.epoch], 'newname',[EEGtemp.setname '_FFT'], 'eventindices',goodepochs, 'epochinfo','yes'); catch choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Dataset not sleep stage scored. Sleep stage scoring required for spectral analysis.','Missing sleep stage scoring','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return end EEGtemp = eeg_checkset(EEGtemp); clear goodepochs % run spectral analysis on each sleep stage epoch progress.Value = 2/3; progress.Message = 'Running PSD Analysis...'; pause(1); datasize = size(EEGtemp.data); spectra = zeros(length(PARAM.plotchans),PARAM.freqrange(2)*PARAM.winsize,datasize(3)); for nepoch = 1:datasize(3) if all(all(EEGtemp.data(:,:,nepoch))) % if all elements are non-zero nspectra = spectopo(EEGtemp.data(:,:,nepoch), 0, EEGtemp.srate, 'nfft',PARAM.winsize*EEGtemp.srate, 'winsize',PARAM.winsize*EEGtemp.srate, 'freqrange',PARAM.freqrange, 'plotchans',PARAM.plotchans, 'plot', PARAM.plot); nspectra = nspectra(:,1:PARAM.freqrange(2)*PARAM.winsize); spectra(:,:,nepoch) = nspectra; else % some epochs can contain zeroed data (if amp is disconnected, or reset during acquisition). Do not run spectopo, insert zeros. nspectra = zeros(length(PARAM.plotchans),PARAM.freqrange(2)*PARAM.winsize); spectra(:,:,nepoch) = nspectra; end end FFT.spectra = spectra; clear datasize nepoch spectra nspectra % Summarize the FFT output progress.Value = 3/3; progress.Message = 'Saving output...'; pause(1); datasize = size(FFT.spectra); mspectra = zeros(datasize(1),datasize(2),length(PARAM.stages)); for nstage = 1:length(PARAM.stages) stageIndex = find(ismember({FFT.event.type},PARAM.stages(nstage))); mspectra(:,:,nstage) = mean(FFT.spectra(:,:,stageIndex),3); end FFT.mspectra.data = mspectra; FFT.mspectra.stage = PARAM.stages; clear datasize mspectra nstage stageIndex EEGtemp % Save the FFT output save([PARAM.resultDir PARAM.filename '_FFT.mat'], 'FFT', 'PARAM'); close(progress); end end
% Menu selected function: Plot_FFT_m function Plot_FFT_m_Callback(app, event) % select FFT results mat file to load if isfield(app.handles,'EEG') app.fileSelectData = fileSelect(app, app.handles.EEG.filepath, app.handles.EEG.setname, 'mat'); else app.fileSelectData = fileSelect(app, '', '', 'mat'); end waitfor(app.fileSelectData); if isempty(app.filename) returnFocus2Figure(app); return else load([app.filepath filesep app.filename],'FFT','PARAM') if ~exist('FFT','var') || ~exist('PARAM','var') choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Selected file not valid FFT output','File Select Error','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return end end % Input Dialog to get min frequency, max frequency, bad date labels, channel labels prompt = {'Minimum frequency (default 1):','Maximum Frequency (default 30):','Channel Label (single channel to plot; Default Cz):'}; dlgtitle = 'Power Spectral Density Plot Settings'; dims = [1 100]; definput = {'1','30','Cz'}; answer = inputdlg(prompt,dlgtitle,dims,definput); if isempty(answer) return else % plot options loHz = str2double(answer{1}); % low frequency limit hiHz = str2double(answer{2}); % high frequency limit [~,chIdx] = ismember(strsplit(answer{3},{', ',',',' '}),{FFT.chanlocs.labels}); % channel to plot if length(chIdx) > 1 || isempty(chIdx) choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Input only one correct channel label to plot','Input Error','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return else chLabel = answer{3}; end clear prompt dlgtitle dims definput answer % Plot mean power spectrum % rescale xlo = PARAM.winsize*loHz; xhi = PARAM.winsize*hiHz; % get min & max ylo = round(min(min(FFT.mspectra.data(chIdx,:,:),[],"omitmissing"),[],"omitmissing")); yhi = round(max(max(FFT.mspectra.data(chIdx,:,:),[],"omitmissing"),[],"omitmissing")); figure; plot(FFT.mspectra.data(chIdx,:,1)', 'color',[0.4660 0.6740 0.1880], 'LineWidth',2) % for stage W hold on plot(FFT.mspectra.data(chIdx,:,2)', 'color',[0.3010 0.7450 0.9330], 'LineWidth',2) % for stage N1 plot(FFT.mspectra.data(chIdx,:,3)', 'color',[0 0.4470 0.7410], 'LineWidth',2) % for stage N2 plot(FFT.mspectra.data(chIdx,:,4)', 'color',[0.9290 0.6940 0.1250], 'LineWidth',2) % for stage SWS plot(FFT.mspectra.data(chIdx,:,5)', 'color',[0.6350 0.0780 0.1840], 'LineWidth',2) % for stage REM axis([xlo xhi ylo yhi]) hold off % additional options: title(['Mean Power Spectrum: Channel ' chLabel]) % figure title xlabel('Frequency (Hz)') % x-axis label ylabel('Power (dB)') % y-axis label legend(PARAM.stages) set(gca,'XTick',xlo:PARAM.winsize:xhi) set(gca,'XTickLabel',loHz:hiHz) set(gcf,'color','w'); % change figure background to white clearvars -except FFT PARAM end end
% Menu selected function: Plot_Spectrogram_m function Plot_Spectrogram_m_Callback(app, event) % select FFT results mat file to load if isfield(app.handles,'EEG') app.fileSelectData = fileSelect(app, app.handles.EEG.filepath, app.handles.EEG.setname, 'mat'); else app.fileSelectData = fileSelect(app, '', '', 'mat'); end waitfor(app.fileSelectData); if isempty(app.filename) returnFocus2Figure(app); return else load([app.filepath filesep app.filename],'FFT','PARAM') if ~exist('FFT','var') || ~exist('PARAM','var') choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Selected file not valid FFT output','File Select Error','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return end end % Input Dialog to get min frequency, max frequency, bad date labels, channel labels prompt = {'Minimum frequency (default 1):','Maximum Frequency (default 30):','Channel Label (single channel to plot; Default Cz):'}; dlgtitle = 'Power Spectral Density Plot Settings'; dims = [1 100]; definput = {'1','30','Cz'}; answer = inputdlg(prompt,dlgtitle,dims,definput); if isempty(answer) return else % plot options loHz = str2double(answer{1}); % low frequency limit hiHz = str2double(answer{2}); % high frequency limit [~,chIdx] = ismember(strsplit(answer{3},{', ',',',' '}),{FFT.chanlocs.labels}); % channel to plot if length(chIdx) > 1 || isempty(chIdx) choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Input only one correct channel label to plot','Input Error','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return else chLabel = answer{3}; end clear prompt dlgtitle dims definput answer % hypnogram % find stages to epoch stages = {FFT.event.type}; stageIndexW = ismember(stages,app.handles.userStageNames{1}); stageIndexN1 = ismember(stages,app.handles.userStageNames{2}); stageIndexN2 = ismember(stages,app.handles.userStageNames{3}); stageIndexN3 = ismember(stages,app.handles.userStageNames{4}); stageIndexR = ismember(stages,app.handles.userStageNames{5}); stages(stageIndexW) = {5}; stages(stageIndexR) = {4}; stages(stageIndexN1) = {3}; stages(stageIndexN2) = {2}; stages(stageIndexN3) = {1}; % plot the sleep stage data figure; subplot(2,1,1); plot(cell2mat(stages), 'color',[0 0 0], 'LineWidth',2) % axes ylim([0 6]) % upper and lower limits of y-axis xlim([1 length(stages)]) % upper and lower limits of x-axis set(gca,'YTickLabel',[' ',flip({'Wake','REM','N1','N2','SWS'}),' ']) % need to customize depending on above axis scales % labels title('Hypnogram') % figure title xlabel('Epoch (30 sec)') % x-axis label ylabel('Sleep Stages') % y-axis label % time-frequency plot % axis scales flo = PARAM.winsize*loHz; fhi = PARAM.winsize*hiHz; % plot the time-frequency spectrogram subplot(2,1,2); image(squeeze(FFT.spectra(chIdx,flo:fhi,:)),'CDataMapping','scaled') % axes set(gca,'YDir','normal') ylim([flo fhi]) % upper and lower limits of y-axis xlim([1 length(stages)]) % upper and lower limits of x-axis set(gca,'YTick',flo:PARAM.winsize*2:fhi) set(gca,'YTickLabel',loHz:2:hiHz) % colors set(gcf,'color','w'); % change figure background to white % labels title(['Spectrogram: Channel ' chLabel]) % figure title xlabel('Epoch (30 sec)') % x-axis label ylabel('Frequency (Hz)') % y-axis label % color bar cbar('vert',0,[-1 1].*round(max(max(abs(squeeze(FFT.spectra(chIdx,flo:fhi,:))),[],"omitmissing"),[],"omitmissing"))) title('dB') % figure title clearvars -except FFT PARAM end end
% Menu selected function: Plot_Topo_m function Plot_Topo_m_Callback(app, event) % select FFT results mat file to load if isfield(app.handles,'EEG') app.fileSelectData = fileSelect(app, app.handles.EEG.filepath, app.handles.EEG.setname, 'mat'); else app.fileSelectData = fileSelect(app, '', '', 'mat'); end waitfor(app.fileSelectData); if isempty(app.filename) returnFocus2Figure(app); return else load([app.filepath filesep app.filename],'FFT','PARAM') if ~exist('FFT','var') || ~exist('PARAM','var') choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Selected file not valid FFT output','File Select Error','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return end end % Input Dialog to get min frequency, max frequency, bad date labels, channel labels prompt = {'Lower edge of frequency band to plot:','Bandwidth to plot (if using single point, eneter 0):'}; dlgtitle = 'Power Spectral Density Plot Settings'; dims = [1 100]; definput = {'1','0'}; answer = inputdlg(prompt,dlgtitle,dims,definput); if isempty(answer) return else % plot options lofreq = str2double(answer{1}); % low frequency limit bandwidth = str2double(answer{2}); % high frequency limit clear prompt dlgtitle dims definput answer % topographic plots % rescale lofreq = PARAM.winsize*lofreq; bandwidth = bandwidth*PARAM.winsize; % for freq band lof = lofreq; hif = lofreq + bandwidth; lof = fix(lof); % used as index in frequency range, needs to be nerest integer hif = fix(hif); % used as index in frequency range, needs to be nerest integer if hif > size(FFT.mspectra.data,2) choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['Upper frequency exceeds spectral data.' newline 'Please input lower bandwidth to plot.'],'Input Error','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return end % get min & max values for scaling lo = fix(min(min(mean(FFT.mspectra.data(:,lof:hif,:),2),[],"omitmissing"),[],"omitmissing")); hi = fix(max(max(mean(FFT.mspectra.data(:,lof:hif,:),2),[],"omitmissing"),[],"omitmissing")); figure('Position', [200 400 1000 200]); set(gcf,'color','w'); % change figure background to white % Stage W W = 1; subplot(1,5,1); title('Wake') if ~isnan(FFT.mspectra.data(:,lof:hif,W)) data = mean(FFT.mspectra.data(:,lof:hif,W),2); topoplot(data, FFT.chanlocs, 'maplimits',[lo hi], 'whitebk','on'); else data = zeros(height(FFT.mspectra.data(:,lof:hif,W)),1); topoplot(data, FFT.chanlocs, 'maplimits',[lo hi], 'whitebk','on'); end % Stage N1 N1 = 2; subplot(1,5,2); title('N1') if ~isnan(FFT.mspectra.data(:,lof:hif,N1)) data = mean(FFT.mspectra.data(:,lof:hif,N1),2); topoplot(data, FFT.chanlocs, 'maplimits',[lo hi], 'whitebk','on'); else data = zeros(height(FFT.mspectra.data(:,lof:hif,W)),1); topoplot(data, FFT.chanlocs, 'maplimits',[lo hi], 'whitebk','on'); end % Stage N2 N2 = 3; subplot(1,5,3); title('N2') if ~isnan(FFT.mspectra.data(:,lof:hif,N2)) data = mean(FFT.mspectra.data(:,lof:hif,N2),2); topoplot(data, FFT.chanlocs, 'maplimits',[lo hi], 'whitebk','on'); else data = zeros(height(FFT.mspectra.data(:,lof:hif,W)),1); topoplot(data, FFT.chanlocs, 'maplimits',[lo hi], 'whitebk','on'); end % Stage N3 N3 = 4; subplot(1,5,4); title('SWS') if ~isnan(FFT.mspectra.data(:,lof:hif,N3)) data = mean(FFT.mspectra.data(:,lof:hif,N3),2); topoplot(data, FFT.chanlocs, 'maplimits',[lo hi], 'whitebk','on'); else data = zeros(height(FFT.mspectra.data(:,lof:hif,W)),1); topoplot(data, FFT.chanlocs, 'maplimits',[lo hi], 'whitebk','on'); end % Stage R R = 5; subplot(1,5,5); title('REM') if ~isnan(FFT.mspectra.data(:,lof:hif,R)) data = mean(FFT.mspectra.data(:,lof:hif,R),2); topoplot(data, FFT.chanlocs, 'maplimits',[lo hi], 'whitebk','on'); else data = zeros(height(FFT.mspectra.data(:,lof:hif,W)),1); topoplot(data, FFT.chanlocs, 'maplimits',[lo hi], 'whitebk','on'); end cbar('vert',0,[lo hi]); ylabel('Power (dB)'); clearvars -except FFT PARAM end end
% Menu selected function: CurrentDatasetArt_m function detectMovement_m_Callback(app, event) % Movement artifact detection prompt = {'Enter EMG channel label to detect movement (Default: ''EMG''):', ... 'Enter gradient threshold in SD (Default 0.5 SD: leave blank for automatic):', ... 'Enter minimum movement duration in sec (Default: 1):'}; dlgtitle = 'Movement artifact detection settings'; dims = [1 100]; definput = {'EMG','','1'}; out = inputdlg(prompt,dlgtitle,dims,definput); returnFocus2Figure(app); if ~isempty(out) if ~isempty(out{1}) PARAM.EMGCh = out{1}; PARAM.EMGChIdx = find(strcmp({app.handles.EEG.chanlocs.labels}, PARAM.EMGCh)); if isempty(PARAM.EMGChIdx) choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['Could not find channel: ''' PARAM.EMGCh ''' in list of channel lables.'],'Channel Not Found','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); return end else choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Please enter a valid channel lable for EMG.','Missing Entry','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); end if ~isempty(out{2}) PARAM.gradient_threshold = str2double(out{2}); PARAM.autoThresh = 0; else PARAM.autoThresh = 1; end if ~isempty(out{3}) PARAM.gradient_duration = str2double(out{3}); else choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Please enter a minimum duration for movement artifact.','Missing Entry','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); return end else return end % calculate the envelope of the signal progress = uiprogressdlg(app.CountingSheepMain,'Title','Movement Artifact Detection','Message','Calculating the RMS of the signal...'); pause(.5); signal = app.handles.EEG.data(PARAM.EMGChIdx,:); if any(isnan(signal)) signal(isnan(signal)) = 0; % if there are sections of NaN, zero them for now. end gradient = detrend(envelope(signal,app.handles.EEG.srate*10,'rms')); % calculate threshold meanSig = mean(gradient); stdSig = std(gradient); if PARAM.autoThresh == 1 PARAM.gradient_threshold = meanSig + stdSig*0.5; % default is 0.5 SD. Note if data is very noisy / has bad data, custom may be needed. else % custom PARAM.gradient_threshold = meanSig + stdSig*PARAM.gradient_threshold; end clear meanSig stdSig nb_points = app.handles.EEG.pnts; arttime = logical(sum(gradient>PARAM.gradient_threshold,1)); tWIN = round(app.handles.EEG.srate*PARAM.gradient_duration); WIN = -tWIN:tWIN; t = 0; CONTINUE = 1; while CONTINUE t = t+1; if arttime(t) arttime(max(min(t+WIN,nb_points-1),1)) = 1; t = t+tWIN; end if t > nb_points-2 CONTINUE = 0; end end arttime(nb_points) = 0; % because of Diff % create empty EEGlab event structure to match existing to merge progress.Value = 1/3; progress.Message = 'Detecting movement...'; pause(1); fields = fieldnames(app.handles.EEG.event)'; fields{2,1} = {}; movement = struct(fields{:}); clear fields t = 0; CONTINUE = 1; while CONTINUE temp = find(arttime((t+1):end),1); if isempty(temp) CONTINUE = 0; else long = find(~arttime((t+temp):end),1); if isempty(long) long = nb_points-t-temp; CONTINUE = 0; end movement(end+1).type = 'Movement'; movement(end).latency = temp+t; movement(end).duration = long; movement(end).channel = ''; % all channels movement(end).urevent = 0; t = t+temp+long+1; end end % Merge markers with existing events progress.Value = 2/3; progress.Message = 'Merging movement events with current dataset...'; pause(1); app.handles.EEG.event = [app.handles.EEG.event movement]; app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG,'eventconsistency'); app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG); runPlot(app); progress.Value = 3/3; progress.Message = 'Movement detection complete...'; pause(1); close(progress); saveON(app); returnFocus2Figure(app); choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Movement detection complete!','Movment Detection','Icon','success'); waitfor(choice); end
% Menu selected function: BatchArt_m function batchMovement_m_Callback(app, event) prompt = {'Enter EMG channel label to detect movement (Default: ''EMG''):', ... 'Enter gradient threshold in SD (Default 0.5 SD: leave blank for automatic):', ... 'Enter minimum movement duration in sec (Default: 1):'}; dlgtitle = 'Movement artifact detection settings'; dims = [1 100]; definput = {'EMG','','1'}; out = inputdlg(prompt,dlgtitle,dims,definput); returnFocus2Figure(app); if ~isempty(out) if ~isempty(out{1}) PARAM.EMGCh = out{1}; else choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Please enter a valid channel lable for EMG.','Missing Entry','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); end if ~isempty(out{2}) PARAM.gradient_threshold = str2double(out{2}); PARAM.autoThresh = 0; else PARAM.autoThresh = 1; end if ~isempty(out{3}) PARAM.gradient_duration = str2double(out{3}); else choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Please enter a minimum duration for movement artifact.','Missing Entry','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); return end else return end if ~isfield(app.handles, 'EEG') cspsg_detectMovement(PARAM); % call movement detection function returnFocus2Figure(app); choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Batch movement detection complete!','Movement Detection','Icon','success'); waitfor(choice); else if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.data) dlgTitle = 'Warning!'; dlgQuestion = ['This will clear the current dataset.' newline newline 'You will be prompted to select datasets to batch process.' newline newline 'Continue?']; choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,dlgQuestion,dlgTitle,'Options',{'Yes','No'}); if strcmp(choice,'Yes') clearDataset_m_Callback(app); if isempty(app.handles.EEG.data) cspsg_detectMovement(PARAM); % call movement detection function returnFocus2Figure(app); choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Batch movement detection complete!','Movement Detection','Icon','success'); waitfor(choice); else return end else return end else cspsg_detectMovement(PARAM); % call movement detection function returnFocus2Figure(app); choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Batch movement detection complete!','Movement Detection','Icon','success'); waitfor(choice); end end end
% Menu selected function: CurrentDatasetEM_m function detectEyeMovements_m_Callback(app, event) % detect eye movements using Yetton's REM detector remPath = which('pop_detect_REMs'); if isempty(remPath) choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['''detect_REMs'' EEGlab pluging not found.' newline newline 'Please install/update ''detect_REMs'' EEGlab plugin.'],'Missing EEGLAB Plugin','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); return else addpath(genpath(fileparts(remPath))); saveDataset_m_Callback(app); % This will merge events with sleep stages. Required for REM detection. No pop-up. app.handles.EEG = pop_loadset('filename',app.handles.EEG.filename,'filepath',app.handles.EEG.filepath); % load the just-saved dataset, no pop-up. app.handles.EEG = pop_detect_REMs(app.handles.EEG); app.handles.stageData = rmfield(app.handles.stageData, 'events'); % remove sleep stages from EEG.event structure app.handles.EEG = pop_selectevent(app.handles.EEG,'type',app.handles.userStageNames(1:6),'select','inverse','deleteevents','on'); runPlot(app); saveON(app); end returnFocus2Figure(app); choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Rapid eye movement detection complete!','Eye Movement Detection','Icon','success'); waitfor(choice); end
