Required for SW detection. No pop-up. app.handles.EEG = pop_loadset('filename',app.handles.EEG.filename,'filepath',app.handles.EEG.filepath); % load the just-saved dataset, no pop-up. app.handles.EEG = pop_PAA(app.handles.EEG); app.handles.stageData = rmfield(app.handles.stageData, 'events'); % remove sleep stages from EEG.event structure app.handles.EEG = pop_selectevent(app.handles.EEG,'type',app.handles.userStageNames(1:6),'select','inverse','deleteevents','on'); runPlot(app); saveON(app); end returnFocus2Figure(app); choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Slow wave detection complete!','Slow Wave Detection','Icon','success'); waitfor(choice); end
% Menu selected function: BatchSW_m function batchSW_m_Callback(app, event) % detect slow waves using pop_paa plugin for EEGlab paaPath = which('pop_paa'); if isempty(paaPath) choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['''PAA'' EEGlab pluging not found.' newline newline 'Please install/update ''PAA'' EEGlab plugin.'],'Missing EEGLAB Plugin','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); return else addpath(genpath(fileparts(paaPath))); if ~isfield(app.handles, 'EEG') PAA_batch; % call slow wave detection batch function returnFocus2Figure(app); choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Batch slow wave detection complete!','Slow Wave Detection','Icon','success'); waitfor(choice); else if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.data) dlgTitle = 'Warning!'; dlgQuestion = ['This will clear the current dataset.' newline newline 'You will be prompted to select datasets to batch process.' newline newline 'Continue?']; choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,dlgQuestion,dlgTitle,'Options',{'Yes','No'}); if strcmp(choice,'Yes') clearDataset_m_Callback(app); if isempty(app.handles.EEG.data) PAA_batch; % call slow wave detection batch function returnFocus2Figure(app); choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Batch slow wave detection complete!','Slow Wave Detection','Icon','success'); waitfor(choice); else return end else return end else PAA_batch; % call slow wave detection batch function returnFocus2Figure(app); choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Batch slow wave detection complete!','Slow Wave Detection','Icon','success'); waitfor(choice); end end end end
% Menu selected function: CurrentDataset_m function coupling_m_Callback(app, event) % slow wave - spindle coupling using pop_SWSPcoupling plugin for EEGlab swspPath = which('pop_SWSPcoupling'); if isempty(swspPath) choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['''Slow Wave - Spindle Coupling'' EEGlab pluging not found.' newline newline 'Please install/update ''Slow Wave - Spindle Coupling'' EEGlab plugin.'],'Missing EEGLAB Plugin','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); return else addpath(genpath(fileparts(swspPath))); saveDataset_m_Callback(app); % This will merge events with sleep stages. Required for coupling detection. No pop-up. app.handles.EEG = pop_loadset('filename',app.handles.EEG.filename,'filepath',app.handles.EEG.filepath); % load the just-saved dataset, no pop-up. app.handles.EEG = pop_SWSPcoupling(app.handles.EEG); % remove sleep stages from EEG.event structure app.handles.EEG = pop_selectevent(app.handles.EEG,'type',app.handles.userStageNames(1:6),'select','inverse','deleteevents','on'); runPlot(app); saveON(app); end returnFocus2Figure(app); choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Coupling analysis complete!','Slow Wave - Spindle Coupling','Icon','success'); waitfor(choice); end
% Menu selected function: Batch_m function batchSPSW_m_Callback(app, event) % slow wave - spindle coupling using pop_SWSPcoupling plugin for EEGlab swspPath = which('pop_SWSPcoupling'); if isempty(swspPath) choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,['''Slow Wave - Spindle Coupling'' EEGlab pluging not found.' newline newline 'Please install/update ''Slow Wave - Spindle Coupling'' EEGlab plugin.'],'Missing EEGLAB Plugin','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); return else addpath(genpath(fileparts(swspPath))); if ~isfield(app.handles, 'EEG') batch_SWSPcoupling; % call coupling detection batch function returnFocus2Figure(app); choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Batch coupling detection complete!','Coupling Analysis','Icon','success'); waitfor(choice); else if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.data) dlgTitle = 'Warning!'; dlgQuestion = ['This will clear the current dataset.' newline newline 'You will be prompted to select datasets to batch process.' newline newline 'Continue?']; choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,dlgQuestion,dlgTitle,'Options',{'Yes','No'}); if strcmp(choice,'Yes') clearDataset_m_Callback(app); if isempty(app.handles.EEG.data) batch_SWSPcoupling; % call coupling detection batch function returnFocus2Figure(app); choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Batch coupling detection complete!','Coupling Analysis','Icon','success'); waitfor(choice); else return end else return end else batch_SWSPcoupling; % call coupling detection batch function returnFocus2Figure(app); choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Batch coupling detection complete!', 'Coupling Analysis','Icon','success'); waitfor(choice); end end end end
% Menu selected function: OnOffEventMark_m function OnOffEventMark_m_Callback(app, event) if strcmp(app.markStr.Enable,'off') markMode_On_t_Callback(app, event) else markMode_Off_t_Callback(app, event) end end
% Menu selected function: clearEvents_m function clearEvents_m_Callback(app, event) % clear all events of user-specified type events = unique({app.handles.EEG.event.type}); events = events(~ismember(events,{app.handles.userlightsOFFtag,app.handles.userlightsONtag})); % take out Lights OFF and ON tags from list to avoid issues [idx,~] = listdlg('PromptString','Select event types to delete', 'SelectionMode', 'multiple', 'ListString', events, 'ListSize', [250,250]); if ~isempty(idx) dlgTitle = 'Confirm Delete Events'; dlgQuestion = ['WARNING: This will permanently delete selected event types.' newline newline 'Continue?']; choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,dlgQuestion,dlgTitle,'Options',{'Yes','No'}); if strcmp(choice,'Yes') events = events(idx); % remove from original EEG.event structure app.handles.EEG = pop_selectevent(app.handles.EEG,'type',events,'select','inverse','deleteevents','on'); curX = xlim(app.traces); range = fix(curX(1):curX(2)); plotSleepData(app, range); app.handles.stageData.events = app.handles.EEG.event; stageData = app.handles.stageData; save(app.handles.stageFileIN, 'stageData'); saveON(app); else return end else return end returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Menu selected function: hideEvents_m function hideEvents_m_Callback(app, event) % hide events from user input if ~isfield(app.handles, 'hideEvents') app.handles.hideEvents = {}; end events = unique({app.handles.EEG.event.type}); events = events(~ismember(events,app.handles.hideEvents)); [idx,~] = listdlg('PromptString','Select event types to hide', 'SelectionMode', 'multiple', 'ListString', events, 'ListSize', [250,250]); if ~isempty(idx) for nEvt = 1:length(idx) app.handles.hideEvents(end + 1) = events(idx(nEvt)); end curX = xlim(app.traces); range = fix(curX(1):curX(2)); plotSleepData(app, range); end returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Menu selected function: showEvents_m function showEvents_m_Callback(app, event) % show events from user input if isfield(app.handles, 'hideEvents') if ~isempty(app.handles.hideEvents) if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.event) events = unique(app.handles.hideEvents); if ~isempty(events) [idx,~] = listdlg('PromptString','Select event types to show', 'SelectionMode', 'multiple', 'ListString', events, 'ListSize', [250,250]); if ~isempty(idx) for nEvt = 1:length(idx) app.handles.hideEvents(find(strcmp(app.handles.hideEvents, events(idx(nEvt))))) = []; end curX = xlim(app.traces); range = fix(curX(1):curX(2)); plotSleepData(app, range); end end end end end returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Menu selected function: editLightsTags_m function editLightsTags_m_Callback(app, event) validDate(app); prompt = {['Current Recording Start Time: ' char(app.handles.stageData.recStart, app.handles.userRecStartFormat) newline newline... 'Current Lights Off Time: ' char(app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF, app.handles.userRecStartFormat) newline... 'Enter new ''Lights Off'' time in 24-hr time format: ' app.handles.userRecStartFormat newline], ... ['Current Recording Stop Time: ' char(app.handles.stageData.recStop, app.handles.userRecStartFormat) newline newline... 'Current Lights On Time: ' char(app.handles.stageData.lightsON, app.handles.userRecStartFormat) newline... 'Enter new ''Lights On'' time in 24-hr time format: ' app.handles.userRecStartFormat newline]}; dlgtitle = 'Edit ''Lights On'' / ''Off tags'''; definput = {char(app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF, app.handles.userRecStartFormat), char(app.handles.stageData.lightsON, app.handles.userRecStartFormat)}; dims = [1 100]; out = inputdlg(prompt,dlgtitle,dims,definput); if ~isempty(out) if ~isempty(out{1}) && ~strcmp(out{1}, char(app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF, app.handles.userRecStartFormat)) % edit lights off try app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF = datetime(out{1}, 'Inputformat', app.handles.userRecStartFormat); if app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF < app.handles.stageData.recStart % just in case it is before the start of dataset app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF = app.handles.stageData.recStart; elseif app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF > app.handles.stageData.recStop % just in case it is after the end of dataset (which should not be the case) app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF = app.handles.stageData.recStart; % just apply default, re; likely some sort of user error end if app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF > app.handles.stageData.lightsON % just in case it is after lights ON app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF = app.handles.stageData.recStart; % just apply default, re; likely some sort of user error end if ~isempty(app.handles.stageData.events) oldOffTag = find(ismember({app.handles.stageData.events.type},app.handles.userlightsOFFtag)); % check stageData structure for existing tag if ~isempty(oldOffTag) app.handles.stageData.events(oldOffTag).latency = (seconds(app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF - app.handles.stageData.recStart)*app.handles.stageData.srate) + 1; else % update StageData event structure app.handles.stageData.events(end+1).type = app.handles.userlightsOFFtag; app.handles.stageData.events(end).latency = (seconds(app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF - app.handles.stageData.recStart)*app.handles.stageData.srate) + 1; app.handles.stageData.events(end).duration = 1; app.handles.stageData.events(end).channel = ''; % sort events by latency EEGtemp = app.handles.EEG; EEGtemp.event = app.handles.stageData.events; EEGtemp = eeg_checkset(EEGtemp,'eventconsistency'); app.handles.stageData.events = EEGtemp.event; end clear oldOffTag EEGtemp else % update StageData event structure app.handles.stageData.events(1).type = app.handles.userlightsOFFtag; app.handles.stageData.events(1).latency = (seconds(app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF - app.handles.stageData.recStart)*app.handles.stageData.srate) + 1; app.handles.stageData.events(1).duration = 1; app.handles.stageData.events(1).channel = ''; end if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.event) oldOffTag = find(ismember({app.handles.EEG.event.type},app.handles.userlightsOFFtag)); % check EEGLAB structure for existing tag if ~isempty(oldOffTag) app.handles.EEG.event(oldOffTag).latency = (seconds(app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF - app.handles.stageData.recStart)*app.handles.stageData.srate) + 1; else % update EEGLAB event structure app.handles.EEG.event(end+1).type = app.handles.userlightsOFFtag; app.handles.EEG.event(end).latency = (seconds(app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF - app.handles.stageData.recStart)*app.handles.stageData.srate) + 1; app.handles.EEG.event(end).duration = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(end).channel = ''; % sort events by latency EEGtemp = app.handles.EEG; EEGtemp = eeg_checkset(EEGtemp,'eventconsistency'); app.handles.EEG.event = EEGtemp.event; end clear oldOffTag EEGtemp else % update EEGLAB event structure app.handles.EEG.event(1).type = app.handles.userlightsOFFtag; app.handles.EEG.event(1).latency = (seconds(app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF - app.handles.stageData.recStart)*app.handles.stageData.srate) + 1; app.handles.EEG.event(1).duration = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(1).channel = ''; end saveON(app); catch choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Incorrect date format entered','Input Error','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return end end if ~isempty(out{2}) && ~strcmp(out{2}, char(app.handles.stageData.lightsON, app.handles.userRecStartFormat)) % edit lights on try app.handles.stageData.lightsON = datetime(out{2}, 'Inputformat', app.handles.userRecStartFormat); if app.handles.stageData.lightsON > app.handles.stageData.recStop % just in case it is past the end of dataset app.handles.stageData.lightsON = app.handles.stageData.recStop; elseif app.handles.stageData.lightsON < app.handles.stageData.recStart % just in case it is before the start of dataset (which should not be the case) app.handles.stageData.lightsON = app.handles.stageData.recStop; % just apply default, re; likely some sort of user error end if app.handles.stageData.lightsON < app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF % just in case it is before lights OFF app.handles.stageData.lightsON = app.handles.stageData.recStop; % just apply default, re; likely some sort of user error end if ~isempty(app.handles.stageData.events) oldOnTag = find(ismember({app.handles.stageData.events.type},app.handles.userlightsONtag)); % check stageData structure for existing tag if ~isempty(oldOnTag) app.handles.stageData.events(oldOnTag).latency = (seconds(app.handles.stageData.lightsON - app.handles.stageData.recStart)*app.handles.stageData.srate) + 1; else % update StageData event structure app.handles.stageData.events(end+1).type = app.handles.userlightsONtag; app.handles.stageData.events(end).latency = (seconds(app.handles.stageData.lightsON - app.handles.stageData.recStart)*app.handles.stageData.srate) + 1; app.handles.stageData.events(end).duration = 1; app.handles.stageData.events(end).channel = ''; % sort events by latency EEGtemp = app.handles.EEG; EEGtemp.event = app.handles.stageData.events; EEGtemp = eeg_checkset(EEGtemp,'eventconsistency'); app.handles.stageData.events = EEGtemp.event; end clear oldOnTag EEGtemp else % update StageData event structure app.handles.stageData.events(1).type = app.handles.userlightsONtag; app.handles.stageData.events(1).latency = (seconds(app.handles.stageData.lightsON - app.handles.stageData.recStart)*app.handles.stageData.srate) + 1; app.handles.stageData.events(1).duration = 1; app.handles.stageData.events(1).channel = ''; end if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.event) oldOnTag = find(ismember({app.handles.EEG.event.type},app.handles.userlightsONtag),1); % check EEGLAB structure for existing tag if ~isempty(oldOnTag) app.handles.EEG.event(oldOnTag).latency = (seconds(app.handles.stageData.lightsON - app.handles.stageData.recStart)*app.handles.stageData.srate) + 1; else % update EEGLAB event structure app.handles.EEG.event(end+1).type = app.handles.userlightsONtag; app.handles.EEG.event(end).latency = (seconds(app.handles.stageData.lightsON - app.handles.stageData.recStart)*app.handles.stageData.srate) + 1; app.handles.EEG.event(end).duration = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(end).channel = ''; % sort events by latency EEGtemp = app.handles.EEG; EEGtemp = eeg_checkset(EEGtemp,'eventconsistency'); app.handles.EEG.event = EEGtemp.event; end clear oldOnTag EEGtemp else % update EEGLAB event structure app.handles.EEG.event(1).type = app.handles.userlightsONtag; app.handles.EEG.event(1).latency = (seconds(app.handles.stageData.lightsON - app.handles.stageData.recStart)*app.handles.stageData.srate) + 1; app.handles.EEG.event(1).duration = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(1).channel = ''; end saveON(app); catch choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Incorrect date format entered','Input Error','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return end end end runPlot(app); % plot traces returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Menu selected function: editRecordingStart_m function editRecordingStart_m_Callback(app, event) validDate(app); origRecStart = app.handles.stageData.recStart; prompt = {['Current Recording Start Time: ' char(app.handles.stageData.recStart, app.handles.userRecStartFormat) newline newline... 'Enter new ''Recording Start'' time in 24-hr time format: ' app.handles.userRecStartFormat newline]}; dlgtitle = 'Edit Recording Start Time'; definput = {char(app.handles.stageData.recStart, app.handles.userRecStartFormat)}; dims = [1 100]; out = inputdlg(prompt,dlgtitle,dims,definput); if ~isempty(out) app.handles.stageData.recStart = datetime(out{1}, 'Inputformat', app.handles.userRecStartFormat); app.handles.EEG.comments = char(datetime(out{1}, 'Inputformat', app.handles.userRecStartFormat),app.handles.userRecStartFormat); app.handles.stageData.recStop = app.handles.stageData.recStart + seconds(app.handles.EEG.pnts/app.handles.EEG.srate - 1); % add recording start marker at first data point if any(ismember({app.handles.EEG.event.type},char(origRecStart, app.handles.userRecStartFormat))) % make sure it exists in event structure recStartIdx = find(ismember({app.handles.EEG.event.type},char(origRecStart, app.handles.userRecStartFormat))); if isscalar(recStartIdx) app.handles.EEG.event(recStartIdx).type = char(app.handles.stageData.recStart, app.handles.userRecStartFormat); app.handles.EEG.event(recStartIdx).latency = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(recStartIdx).duration = 1; else choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Multiple Recording Start markers found! Check dataset.','Edit Recording Start','Icon','error'); waitfor(choice); return end else app.handles.EEG.event(end+1).type = char(app.handles.stageData.recStart, app.handles.userRecStartFormat); app.handles.EEG.event(end).latency = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(end).duration = 1; app.handles.EEG.event(end).channel = ''; app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG, 'eventconsistency'); app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG); end % update lights on/off tags lightsOFFlatency = app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF - origRecStart; lightsONlatency = app.handles.stageData.lightsON - origRecStart; app.handles.stageData.lightsOFF = app.handles.stageData.recStart + lightsOFFlatency; app.handles.stageData.lightsON = app.handles.stageData.recStart + lightsONlatency; saveON(app); % because we changed the recstart with a manual entry end runPlot(app); % plot traces returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Menu selected function: openUserManual_m function openUserManual_m_Callback(app, event) open('User Manual.pdf') end
% Menu selected function: checkUpdate_m function checkUpdate_m_Callback(app, event) % check for updates from git if ismac curDir = pwd; try cd /usr/bin/ gitDir = exist('git', 'file'); cd(curDir) if gitDir == 2 % git is located in default directory [status, cmdOut] = cspsg_git('status'); disp(cmdOut) if status == 1 choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'New version of ''Counting Sheep PSG'' available from GitHub.','Checking for updates','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); elseif status == 0 choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'You have the most up to date version of Counting Sheep PSG.','Checking for updates','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); elseif status == 128 choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Your installation of ''Counting Sheep PSG'' is not a git repository. Unable to check for updates.','Checking for updates','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); else choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Unable to check update status for unknown reason.','Checking for updates','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); end else choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'git not installed in default directory: ''/usr/bin/''','Checking for updates','Checking for updates','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); end catch choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'git not installed in default directory: ''/usr/bin/''','Checking for updates','Checking for updates','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); end else choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Check for updates not supported on PC or Linux systems.','Checking for updates','Icon','warning'); waitfor(choice); end clear curDir gitDir status cmdOut pause(3); returnFocus2Figure(app); end
% Menu selected function: registerCountingSheep_m function registerCountingSheep_m_Callback(app, event) % registration removed — always approved choice = uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,'Thank you for registering Counting Sheep PSG!','Software Registration','Icon','success'); waitfor(choice); end
% Callback function: hKeysInfo_m, help_t function hKeysInfo_m_Callback(app, event) % helpful info about how to use Counting Sheep PSG title = 'Keyboard Shortcuts'; msg = sprintf([... '0 - Wake\n', ... '1 - NREM1 \n', ... '2 - NREM2\n', ... '3 - SWS\n', ... '4 - REM\n', ... '. - Unscored\n', ... 'backspace/delete - delete selected event(s)\n\n', ... 'Event marking:\n', ... '- Single click: single-point event\n', ... '- Click-and-drag: event with duration\n', ... '- Single-click existing event to select/deselect for delete/merge']); uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,msg,title); end
% Menu selected function: aboutCountingSheep_m function aboutCountingSheep_m_Callback(app, event) % show about info title = 'About Counting Sheep PSG'; msg = sprintf([... 'EEGlab-compatible sleep scoring and event marking\n\n', ... 'REQUIREMENTS:\n', ... 'MATLAB version R2020b or later\n', ... 'EEGlab 2023 or later (https://eeglab.org)\n\n', ... 'A revision of sleepSMG. sleepSMG developed by:\n', ... 'Stephanie Greer and Jared Saletin\n', ... 'Walker Lab, UC Berkeley, 2011\n', ... 'https://sleepsmg.sourceforge.net\n', ... 'Stuart Fogel & Sleep Well\n', ... 'University of Ottawa Sleep Research Laboratory\n', ... 'School of Psychology, University of Ottawa, Canada\n', ... 'https://www.uottawa-sleeplab.ca\n\n', ... 'How to cite:\n\n', ... 'L.B. Ray, D. Baena & S.M. Fogel (2024). “Counting sheep PSG”: EEGLAB-compatible open-source matlab software for signal processing, visualization, event marking and staging of polysomnographic data, Journal of Neuroscience Methods, 407, 110162. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jneumeth.2024.110162.', ... ]); uiconfirm(app.CountingSheepMain,msg,title) end
% Button down function: traces function tracesButtonDown(app, event) % mark event when EEG trace is mouse clicked if isfield(app.handles, 'EEG') if strcmp(app.markMode_t.State, 'on') point1 = app.traces.CurrentPoint; % button-down detected initRect = rbbox; % position and size of rectangle [X Y length height] point2 = app.traces.CurrentPoint; % button-up detected point1 = point1(1,1:2); % extract x and y point2 = point2(1,1:2); % extract x and y if point2(1) < point1(1) % selection was right-to-left, reverse them pt1temp = point1(1); pt2temp = point2(1); point1(1) = pt2temp; point2(1) = pt1temp; clear pt1temp pt2temp end % get information from clicked rectangle origin = [point1(1), point1(2)]; % location of origin offset = abs(point1-point2); % dimensions finalRect = [origin offset]; % to plot rectangle scale = app.handles.curScale; yRange = app.traces.YLim; channels = app.handles.userChannelLabels; yMax = [yRange(1), (yRange(2)/(length(channels)+1):scale:length(channels)*scale) + scale/2]; yMax(end) = yRange(2); yMid = (yRange(2)/(length(channels)+1):scale:length(channels)*scale); chIdx = find(diff(finalRect(2) <= yMax)); finalRect(2) = yMid(chIdx) - scale/2; finalRect(4) = yMid(chIdx) + scale/2; chLabel = channels{chIdx}; label = app.markStr.Value; if isempty(label); label = 'NoName'; end label(~isstrprop(label,'alphanum')) = '_'; % replace non-alphanumeric characters with '_' if finalRect(3) > 1 % event has a duration app.handles.EEG.event(end+1).type = label; app.handles.EEG.event(end).latency = fix(finalRect(1)); app.handles.EEG.event(end).duration = fix(finalRect(3)); if app.allChannelsMode.Value == 0 app.handles.EEG.event(end).channel = chLabel; elseif app.allChannelsMode.Value == 1 app.handles.EEG.event(end).channel = ''; end app.handles.EEG.event(end).urevent = NaN; elseif finalRect(3) < 1 % it's a single point event app.handles.EEG.event(end+1).type = label; app.handles.EEG.event(end).latency = fix(finalRect(1)); app.handles.EEG.event(end).duration = 1; if app.allChannelsMode.Value == 0 app.handles.EEG.event(end).channel = chLabel; elseif app.allChannelsMode.Value == 1 app.handles.EEG.event(end).channel = ''; end app.handles.EEG.event(end).urevent = NaN; end app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG, 'eventconsistency'); app.handles.EEG = eeg_checkset(app.handles.EEG, 'makeur'); app.handles.stageData.events = app.handles.EEG.event; stageData = app.handles.stageData; save(app.handles.stageFileIN, 'stageData'); curX = xlim(app.traces); range = fix(curX(1):curX(2)); plotSleepData(app, range); saveON(app); end end end
% Button down function: hypnogram function hypnogramButtonDown(app, event) % navigate dataset by clicking lower axis (hypnogram) if isfield(app.handles, 'EEG') if ~isempty(app.handles.EEG.data) pt = event.Source.CurrentPoint; winSize = str2double(app.handles.winIN); srate = app.handles.EEG.srate; ptX = fix(pt(1)*(60/winSize))*winSize*srate; jumpto(app, ptX); newX = [ptX+1, ptX + winSize*srate]; range = fix(newX(1):newX(2)); plotSleepData(app, range); end end end end
% Component initialization methods (Access = private)
% Create UIFigure and components function createComponents(app)
% Get the file path for locating images pathToMLAPP = fileparts(mfilename('fullpath'));
% Create CountingSheepMain and hide until all components are created app.CountingSheepMain = uifigure('Visible', 'off'); app.CountingSheepMain.Color = [0.9412 0.9412 0.9412]; colormap(app.CountingSheepMain, 'parula'); app.CountingSheepMain.Position = [0 0 1366 768]; app.CountingSheepMain.Name = 'Counting Sheep PSG'; app.CountingSheepMain.Icon = fullfile(pathToMLAPP, 'icons', 'sheep_t_image.png'); app.CountingSheepMain.Theme = 'light'; app.CountingSheepMain.CloseRequestFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @countingSheep_CloseFcn, true); app.CountingSheepMain.WindowButtonMotionFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @tracesCursorMotion_Callback, true); app.CountingSheepMain.KeyPressFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @CountingSheepMainKeyPress_Callback, true); app.CountingSheepMain.HandleVisibility = 'callback'; app.CountingSheepMain.Tag = 'figure1';
% Create mainMenu_m app.mainMenu_m = uimenu(app.CountingSheepMain); app.mainMenu_m.Text = 'Counting Sheep '; app.mainMenu_m.Tag = 'mainMenu_m';
% Create preferences_m app.preferences_m = uimenu(app.mainMenu_m); app.preferences_m.Text = 'Preferences'; app.preferences_m.Tag = 'preferences_m';
% Create newMontage_m app.newMontage_m = uimenu(app.preferences_m); app.newMontage_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @newMontage_m_Callback, true); app.newMontage_m.Accelerator = 'N'; app.newMontage_m.Text = 'Create New / Edit Montage'; app.newMontage_m.Tag = 'newMontage_m';
% Create deleteMontage_m app.deleteMontage_m = uimenu(app.preferences_m); app.deleteMontage_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @deleteMontage_m_Callback, true); app.deleteMontage_m.Text = 'Delete Montage'; app.deleteMontage_m.Tag = 'deleteMontage_m';
% Create ImportMenu_m app.ImportMenu_m = uimenu(app.mainMenu_m); app.ImportMenu_m.Text = 'Import'; app.ImportMenu_m.Tag = 'importMenu_m';
% Create importEDFeeglab_m app.importEDFeeglab_m = uimenu(app.ImportMenu_m); app.importEDFeeglab_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @importEDF_m_Callback, true); app.importEDFeeglab_m.Accelerator = 'I'; app.importEDFeeglab_m.Text = 'Import EDF: EEGlab (default)'; app.importEDFeeglab_m.Tag = 'importEDFeeglab_m';
% Create importEDFmatlab_m app.importEDFmatlab_m = uimenu(app.ImportMenu_m); app.importEDFmatlab_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @importEDF_m_Callback, true); app.importEDFmatlab_m.Text = 'Import EDF: Matlab (rigorous + slow)'; app.importEDFmatlab_m.Tag = 'importEDFmatlab_m';
% Create importBrainProducts_m app.importBrainProducts_m = uimenu(app.ImportMenu_m); app.importBrainProducts_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @importBrainProducts_m_Callback, true); app.importBrainProducts_m.Text = 'Import Brain Products'; app.importBrainProducts_m.Tag = 'importBrainProducts_m';
% Create ImportSleepStagesMat_m app.ImportSleepStagesMat_m = uimenu(app.ImportMenu_m); app.ImportSleepStagesMat_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @importSleepStagesMat_m_Callback, true); app.ImportSleepStagesMat_m.Separator = 'on'; app.ImportSleepStagesMat_m.Text = 'Import Sleep Stages (*.mat)'; app.ImportSleepStagesMat_m.Tag = 'ImportSleepStagesMat_m';
% Create ImportEventsMat_m app.ImportEventsMat_m = uimenu(app.ImportMenu_m); app.ImportEventsMat_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @importEventsMat_m_Callback, true); app.ImportEventsMat_m.Enable = 'off'; app.ImportEventsMat_m.Text = 'Import Events (*.mat)';
% Create loadDataset_m app.loadDataset_m = uimenu(app.mainMenu_m); app.loadDataset_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @loadDataset_m_Callback, true); app.loadDataset_m.Separator = 'on'; app.loadDataset_m.Accelerator = 'O'; app.loadDataset_m.Text = 'Load Dataset'; app.loadDataset_m.Tag = 'loadDataset_m';
% Create saveDataset_m app.saveDataset_m = uimenu(app.mainMenu_m); app.saveDataset_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @saveDataset_m_Callback, true); app.saveDataset_m.Accelerator = 'S'; app.saveDataset_m.Text = 'Save Dataset'; app.saveDataset_m.Tag = 'saveDataset_m';
% Create saveDatasetAs_m app.saveDatasetAs_m = uimenu(app.mainMenu_m); app.saveDatasetAs_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @saveDatasetAs_m_Callback, true); app.saveDatasetAs_m.Text = 'Save Dataset As...'; app.saveDatasetAs_m.Tag = 'saveDatasetAs_m';
% Create editSetname_m app.editSetname_m = uimenu(app.mainMenu_m); app.editSetname_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @editSetname_m_Callback, true); app.editSetname_m.Text = 'Edit Dataset Setname'; app.editSetname_m.Tag = 'editSetname_m';
% Create generateSleepReport_m app.generateSleepReport_m = uimenu(app.mainMenu_m); app.generateSleepReport_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @generateSleepReport_m_Callback, true); app.generateSleepReport_m.Separator = 'on'; app.generateSleepReport_m.Text = 'Generate Sleep Report'; app.generateSleepReport_m.Tag = 'generateSleepReport_m';
% Create generateEventReport_m app.generateEventReport_m = uimenu(app.mainMenu_m); app.generateEventReport_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @generateEventReport_m_Callback, true); app.generateEventReport_m.Text = 'Generate Event Report'; app.generateEventReport_m.Tag = 'generateEventReport_m';
% Create generateHypnogram_m app.generateHypnogram_m = uimenu(app.mainMenu_m); app.generateHypnogram_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @generateHypnogram_m_Callback, true); app.generateHypnogram_m.Text = 'Generate Hypnogram'; app.generateHypnogram_m.Tag = 'generateHypnogram_m';
% Create clearDataset_m app.clearDataset_m = uimenu(app.mainMenu_m); app.clearDataset_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @clearDataset_m_Callback, true); app.clearDataset_m.Separator = 'on'; app.clearDataset_m.Accelerator = 'W'; app.clearDataset_m.Text = 'Clear Dataset'; app.clearDataset_m.Tag = 'clearDatasetMenu_m';
% Create quit_m app.quit_m = uimenu(app.mainMenu_m); app.quit_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @countingSheep_CloseFcn, true); app.quit_m.Accelerator = 'Q'; app.quit_m.Text = 'Quit Counting Sheep'; app.quit_m.Tag = 'quit_m';
% Create chan_m app.chan_m = uimenu(app.CountingSheepMain); app.chan_m.Text = 'Channels '; app.chan_m.Tag = 'chan_m';
% Create setScale_m app.setScale_m = uimenu(app.chan_m); app.setScale_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @setScale_m_Callback, true); app.setScale_m.Text = 'Show/Hide Scale Lines'; app.setScale_m.Tag = 'setScale_m';
% Create zeroBadData_m app.zeroBadData_m = uimenu(app.chan_m); app.zeroBadData_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @zeroBadData_mMenuSelected, true); app.zeroBadData_m.Text = 'Remove Data Outside ''Lights Off / Lights On'''; app.zeroBadData_m.Tag = 'zeroBadData_m';
% Create markChannelAsBadData_m app.markChannelAsBadData_m = uimenu(app.chan_m); app.markChannelAsBadData_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @markChannelAsBadData_m_Callback, true); app.markChannelAsBadData_m.Text = 'Mark Channel as ''Bad Data'''; app.markChannelAsBadData_m.Tag = 'markChannelAsBadData_m';
% Create interpolateBadChannel_m app.interpolateBadChannel_m = uimenu(app.chan_m); app.interpolateBadChannel_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @interpolateBadChannel_m_Callback, true); app.interpolateBadChannel_m.Text = 'Interpolate Bad Channel'; app.interpolateBadChannel_m.Tag = 'interpolateBadChannel_m';
% Create editChannels_m app.editChannels_m = uimenu(app.chan_m); app.editChannels_m.Separator = 'on'; app.editChannels_m.Text = 'Edit Channels'; app.editChannels_m.Tag = 'editChannels_m';
% Create currentDataset_m app.currentDataset_m = uimenu(app.editChannels_m); app.currentDataset_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @editChannels_m_Callback, true); app.currentDataset_m.Text = 'Current Dataset';
% Create batchEditCh_m app.batchEditCh_m = uimenu(app.editChannels_m); app.batchEditCh_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @batchEditCh_m_Callback, true); app.batchEditCh_m.Text = 'Batch';
% Create PreprocessMenu_m app.PreprocessMenu_m = uimenu(app.chan_m); app.PreprocessMenu_m.Text = 'Pre-process';
% Create batchPreprocessChannels_m app.batchPreprocessChannels_m = uimenu(app.PreprocessMenu_m); app.batchPreprocessChannels_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @batchPreprocess_m_Callback, true); app.batchPreprocessChannels_m.Text = 'Batch Pre-process'; app.batchPreprocessChannels_m.Tag = 'batchPreprocessChannels_m';
% Create rereferenceChannels_m app.rereferenceChannels_m = uimenu(app.PreprocessMenu_m); app.rereferenceChannels_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @rereference_m_Callback, true); app.rereferenceChannels_m.Text = 'Re-reference Channels'; app.rereferenceChannels_m.Tag = 'rereferenceChannels_m';
% Create filterChannels_m app.filterChannels_m = uimenu(app.PreprocessMenu_m); app.filterChannels_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @filter_m_Callback, true); app.filterChannels_m.Text = 'Filter Channels'; app.filterChannels_m.Tag = 'filterChannels_m';
% Create downsampleChannels_m app.downsampleChannels_m = uimenu(app.PreprocessMenu_m); app.downsampleChannels_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @downsample_m_Callback, true); app.downsampleChannels_m.Text = 'Downsample Channels'; app.downsampleChannels_m.Tag = 'downsampleChannels_m';
% Create ASR_m app.ASR_m = uimenu(app.chan_m); app.ASR_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @ASR_m_Callback, true); app.ASR_m.Separator = 'on'; app.ASR_m.Text = 'Artifact Subspace Reconstrcution';
% Create ICA_m app.ICA_m = uimenu(app.chan_m); app.ICA_m.Text = 'Independent Component Analysis';
% Create runICA_m app.runICA_m = uimenu(app.ICA_m); app.runICA_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @runICA_m_Callback, true); app.runICA_m.Text = 'Run ICA'; app.runICA_m.Tag = 'runICA_m';
% Create displayICA_m app.displayICA_m = uimenu(app.ICA_m); app.displayICA_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @displayICA_m_Callback, true); app.displayICA_m.Text = 'Show/Hide ICA Components'; app.displayICA_m.Tag = 'displayICA_m';
% Create deleteICA_m app.deleteICA_m = uimenu(app.ICA_m); app.deleteICA_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @deleteICA_m_Callback, true); app.deleteICA_m.Text = 'Remove Selected Components'; app.deleteICA_m.Tag = 'deleteICA_m';
% Create PowerSpectralAnalysis_m app.PowerSpectralAnalysis_m = uimenu(app.chan_m); app.PowerSpectralAnalysis_m.Text = 'Power Spectral Analysis'; app.PowerSpectralAnalysis_m.Tag = 'PowerSpectralAnalysis_m';
% Create FFT_m app.FFT_m = uimenu(app.PowerSpectralAnalysis_m); app.FFT_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @FFT_m_Callback, true); app.FFT_m.Text = 'Run Power Spectral Density (FFT - Welch)'; app.FFT_m.Tag = 'FFT_m';
% Create Plot_FFT_m app.Plot_FFT_m = uimenu(app.PowerSpectralAnalysis_m); app.Plot_FFT_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @Plot_FFT_m_Callback, true); app.Plot_FFT_m.Text = 'Plot Power Spectrum Density'; app.Plot_FFT_m.Tag = 'Plot_FFT_m';
% Create Plot_Spectrogram_m app.Plot_Spectrogram_m = uimenu(app.PowerSpectralAnalysis_m); app.Plot_Spectrogram_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @Plot_Spectrogram_m_Callback, true); app.Plot_Spectrogram_m.Text = 'Plot Time-Frequency Spectrogram'; app.Plot_Spectrogram_m.Tag = 'Plot_Spectrogram_m';
% Create Plot_Topo_m app.Plot_Topo_m = uimenu(app.PowerSpectralAnalysis_m); app.Plot_Topo_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @Plot_Topo_m_Callback, true); app.Plot_Topo_m.Text = 'Plot Topography'; app.Plot_Topo_m.Tag = 'Plot_Topo_m';
% Create turnOnOffCursorDataMode_m app.turnOnOffCursorDataMode_m = uimenu(app.chan_m); app.turnOnOffCursorDataMode_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @turnOnOffCursorDataMode_mMenuSelected, true); app.turnOnOffCursorDataMode_m.Separator = 'on'; app.turnOnOffCursorDataMode_m.Text = 'Turn On/Off Cursor Data Mode';
% Create hideChan_m app.hideChan_m = uimenu(app.chan_m); app.hideChan_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @hideChan_m_Callback, true); app.hideChan_m.Separator = 'on'; app.hideChan_m.Text = 'Hide Channels'; app.hideChan_m.Tag = 'hideChan_m';
% Create showChan_m app.showChan_m = uimenu(app.chan_m); app.showChan_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @showChan_m_Callback, true); app.showChan_m.Text = 'Show Hidden Channels'; app.showChan_m.Tag = 'showChan_m';
% Create rescaleSelectedChannels_m app.rescaleSelectedChannels_m = uimenu(app.chan_m); app.rescaleSelectedChannels_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @rescaleSelectedChannels_m_Callback, true); app.rescaleSelectedChannels_m.Separator = 'on'; app.rescaleSelectedChannels_m.Text = 'Rescale Selected Channels'; app.rescaleSelectedChannels_m.Tag = 'rescaleSelectedChannels_m';
% Create mark_m app.mark_m = uimenu(app.CountingSheepMain); app.mark_m.Text = 'Events '; app.mark_m.Tag = 'mark_m';
% Create detectMovement_m app.detectMovement_m = uimenu(app.mark_m); app.detectMovement_m.Text = 'Detect Movement'; app.detectMovement_m.Tag = 'detectMovement_m';
% Create CurrentDatasetArt_m app.CurrentDatasetArt_m = uimenu(app.detectMovement_m); app.CurrentDatasetArt_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @detectMovement_m_Callback, true); app.CurrentDatasetArt_m.Text = 'Current Dataset';
% Create BatchArt_m app.BatchArt_m = uimenu(app.detectMovement_m); app.BatchArt_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @batchMovement_m_Callback, true); app.BatchArt_m.Text = 'Batch';
% Create detectEyeMovements_m app.detectEyeMovements_m = uimenu(app.mark_m); app.detectEyeMovements_m.Text = 'Detect Eye Movements'; app.detectEyeMovements_m.Tag = 'detectEyeMovements_m';
% Create CurrentDatasetEM_m app.CurrentDatasetEM_m = uimenu(app.detectEyeMovements_m); app.CurrentDatasetEM_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @detectEyeMovements_m_Callback, true); app.CurrentDatasetEM_m.Text = 'Current Dataset';
% Create BatchEM_m app.BatchEM_m = uimenu(app.detectEyeMovements_m); app.BatchEM_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @batchEM_m_Callback, true); app.BatchEM_m.Text = 'Batch';
% Create detectSpindles_m app.detectSpindles_m = uimenu(app.mark_m); app.detectSpindles_m.Text = 'Detect Spindles'; app.detectSpindles_m.Tag = 'detectSpindles_m';
% Create CurrentDatasetSp_m app.CurrentDatasetSp_m = uimenu(app.detectSpindles_m); app.CurrentDatasetSp_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @detectSpindles_m_Callback, true); app.CurrentDatasetSp_m.Text = 'Current Dataset';
% Create BatchSp_m app.BatchSp_m = uimenu(app.detectSpindles_m); app.BatchSp_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @batchSp_m_Callback, true); app.BatchSp_m.Text = 'Batch';
% Create detectSlowWaves_m app.detectSlowWaves_m = uimenu(app.mark_m); app.detectSlowWaves_m.Text = 'Detect Slow Waves'; app.detectSlowWaves_m.Tag = 'detectSlowWaves_m';
% Create CurrentDatasetSW_m app.CurrentDatasetSW_m = uimenu(app.detectSlowWaves_m); app.CurrentDatasetSW_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @detectSlowWaves_m_Callback, true); app.CurrentDatasetSW_m.Text = 'Current Dataset';
% Create BatchSW_m app.BatchSW_m = uimenu(app.detectSlowWaves_m); app.BatchSW_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @batchSW_m_Callback, true); app.BatchSW_m.Text = 'Batch';
% Create SpindleSlowWaveCoupling_m app.SpindleSlowWaveCoupling_m = uimenu(app.mark_m); app.SpindleSlowWaveCoupling_m.Text = 'Spindle - Slow Wave Coupling'; app.SpindleSlowWaveCoupling_m.Tag = 'SpindleSlowWaveCoupling_m';
% Create CurrentDataset_m app.CurrentDataset_m = uimenu(app.SpindleSlowWaveCoupling_m); app.CurrentDataset_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @coupling_m_Callback, true); app.CurrentDataset_m.Text = 'Current Dataset';
% Create Batch_m app.Batch_m = uimenu(app.SpindleSlowWaveCoupling_m); app.Batch_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @batchSPSW_m_Callback, true); app.Batch_m.Text = 'Batch';
% Create OnOffEventMark_m app.OnOffEventMark_m = uimenu(app.mark_m); app.OnOffEventMark_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @OnOffEventMark_m_Callback, true); app.OnOffEventMark_m.Separator = 'on'; app.OnOffEventMark_m.Text = 'Turn On/Off Event Marking Mode';
% Create clearEvents_m app.clearEvents_m = uimenu(app.mark_m); app.clearEvents_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @clearEvents_m_Callback, true); app.clearEvents_m.Separator = 'on'; app.clearEvents_m.Text = 'Delete Events'; app.clearEvents_m.Tag = 'clearEvents_m';
% Create hideEvents_m app.hideEvents_m = uimenu(app.mark_m); app.hideEvents_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @hideEvents_m_Callback, true); app.hideEvents_m.Text = 'Hide Events'; app.hideEvents_m.Tag = 'hideEvents_m';
% Create showEvents_m app.showEvents_m = uimenu(app.mark_m); app.showEvents_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @showEvents_m_Callback, true); app.showEvents_m.Text = 'Show Hidden Events'; app.showEvents_m.Tag = 'showEvents_m';
% Create editLightsTags_m app.editLightsTags_m = uimenu(app.mark_m); app.editLightsTags_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @editLightsTags_m_Callback, true); app.editLightsTags_m.Separator = 'on'; app.editLightsTags_m.Text = 'Edit ''Lights On'' / ''Lights Off'' tags'; app.editLightsTags_m.Tag = 'editLightsTags_m';
% Create editRecordingStart_m app.editRecordingStart_m = uimenu(app.mark_m); app.editRecordingStart_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @editRecordingStart_m_Callback, true); app.editRecordingStart_m.Text = 'Edit ''Recording Start'''; app.editRecordingStart_m.Tag = 'editRecordingStart_m';
% Create info_m app.info_m = uimenu(app.CountingSheepMain); app.info_m.Text = 'Help '; app.info_m.Tag = 'info_m';
% Create openUserManual_m app.openUserManual_m = uimenu(app.info_m); app.openUserManual_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @openUserManual_m_Callback, true); app.openUserManual_m.Accelerator = 'H'; app.openUserManual_m.Text = 'Open User Manual (pdf)'; app.openUserManual_m.Tag = 'openUserManual_m';
% Create checkUpdate_m app.checkUpdate_m = uimenu(app.info_m); app.checkUpdate_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @checkUpdate_m_Callback, true); app.checkUpdate_m.Text = 'Check for Updates from Git (Mac Only)'; app.checkUpdate_m.Tag = 'checkUpdate_m';
% Create registerCountingSheep_m app.registerCountingSheep_m = uimenu(app.info_m); app.registerCountingSheep_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @registerCountingSheep_m_Callback, true); app.registerCountingSheep_m.Text = 'Register Counting Sheep PSG'; app.registerCountingSheep_m.Tag = 'registerCountingSheep_m';
% Create hKeysInfo_m app.hKeysInfo_m = uimenu(app.info_m); app.hKeysInfo_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @hKeysInfo_m_Callback, true); app.hKeysInfo_m.Text = 'Keyboard Shortcuts'; app.hKeysInfo_m.Tag = 'hKeysInfo_m';
% Create aboutCountingSheep_m app.aboutCountingSheep_m = uimenu(app.info_m); app.aboutCountingSheep_m.MenuSelectedFcn = createCallbackFcn(app, @aboutCountingSheep_m_Callback, true); app.aboutCountingSheep_m.Text = 'About Counting Sheep PSG'; app.aboutCountingSheep_m.Tag = 'aboutCountingSheep_m';
% Create uitoolbar1 app.uitoolbar1 = uitoolbar(app.CountingSheepMain); app.uitoolbar1.Tag = 'uitoolbar1';
% Create open_t app.open_t = uipushtool(app.uitoolbar1); app.open_t.Tag = 'open_t'; app.open_t.Tooltip = {'Open Dataset'}; app.open_t.ClickedCallback = createCallbackFcn(app, @open_t_Callback, true); app.open_t.Icon = fullfile(pathToMLAPP, 'icons', 'open_t_image.png');
% Create save_t app.save_t = uipushtool(app.uitoolbar1); app.save_t.Tag = 'save_t'; app.save_t.Tooltip = {'Save Dataset'}; app.save_t.ClickedCallback = createCallbackFcn(app, @save_t_Callback, true); app.save_t.Icon = fullfile(pathToMLAPP, 'icons', 'save_t_image.png');
% Create scaleSmall_t app.scaleSmall_t = uipushtool(app.uitoolbar1); app.scaleSmall_t.Tag = 'scaleSmall_t'; app.scaleSmall_t.Tooltip = 'Scale smaller (zoom out)'; app.scaleSmall_t.ClickedCallback = createCallbackFcn(app, @scaleSmall_t_Callback, true); app.scaleSmall_t.Icon = fullfile(pathToMLAPP, '', 'icons', 'scaleSmall_t_image.png'); app.scaleSmall_t.Separator = 'on';
% Create scaleBigger_t app.scaleBigger_t = uipushtool(app.uitoolbar1); app.scaleBigger_t.Tag = 'scaleBigger_t'; app.scaleBigger_t.Tooltip = 'Scale bigger (zoom in)'; app.scaleBigger_t.ClickedCallback = createCallbackFcn(app, @scaleBigger_t_Callback, true); app.scaleBigger_t.Icon = fullfile(pathToMLAPP, '', 'icons', 'scaleBigger_t_image.png');
% Create resetScale_t app.resetScale_t = uipushtool(app.uitoolbar1); app.resetScale_t.Tag = 'resetScale'; app.resetScale_t.Tooltip = {'Reset scale to 100'}; app.resetScale_t.ClickedCallback = createCallbackFcn(app, @resetScale_t_Callback, true); app.resetScale_t.Icon = fullfile(pathToMLAPP, '', 'icons', 'resetScale_t_image.png');
% Create playPause_t app.playPause_t = uitoggletool(app.uitoolbar1); app.playPause_t.Tag = 'playPause_t'; app.playPause_t.Tooltip = {'Play / Pause'}; app.playPause_t.ClickedCallback = createCallbackFcn(app, @playPause_t_Callback, true); app.playPause_t.Icon = fullfile(pathToMLAPP, 'icons', 'playPause_t_image.png'); app.playPause_t.Separator = 'on';
% Create lightsOff_t app.lightsOff_t = uipushtool(app.uitoolbar1); app.lightsOff_t.Tag = 'lightsOff_t'; app.lightsOff_t.Tooltip = 'Jump to lights off'; app.lightsOff_t.ClickedCallback = createCallbackFcn(app, @lightsOff_t_Callback, true); app.lightsOff_t.Icon = fullfile(pathToMLAPP, '', 'icons', 'lightsOff_t_image.png'); app.lightsOff_t.Separator = 'on';
% Create lightsOn_t app.lightsOn_t = uipushtool(app.uitoolbar1); app.lightsOn_t.Tag = 'lightsOn_t'; app.lightsOn_t.Tooltip = {'Jump to lights on'}; app.lightsOn_t.ClickedCallback = createCallbackFcn(app, @lightsOn_t_Callback, true); app.lightsOn_t.Icon = fullfile(pathToMLAPP, '', 'icons', 'lightsOn_t_image.png');

% Create markMode_t app.markMode_t = uitoggletool(app.uitoolbar1); app.markMode_t.Tag = 'markMode_t'; app.markMode_t.Tooltip = {'Mark events mode On/Off'}; app.markMode_t.Icon = fullfile(pathToMLAPP, 'icons', 'mark_t_image.png'); app.markMode_t.Separator = 'on'; app.markMode_t.OffCallback = createCallbackFcn(app, @markMode_Off_t_Callback, true); app.markMode_t.OnCallback = createCallbackFcn(app, @markMode_On_t_Callback, true);

% App creation and deletion methods (Access = public)
% Construct app function app = countingSheepPSGapp(varargin)
runningApp = getRunningApp(app);
% Check for running singleton app if isempty(runningApp)
% Create UIFigure and components createComponents(app)
% Register the app with App Designer registerApp(app, app.CountingSheepMain)
% Execute the startup function runStartupFcn(app, @(app)countingSheep_OpenFcn(app, varargin{:})) else
% Focus the running singleton app figure(runningApp.CountingSheepMain)
app = runningApp; end
if nargout == 0 clear app end end
% Code that executes before app deletion function delete(app)
% Delete UIFigure when app is deleted delete(app.CountingSheepMain) end end end
